title: 蕭勇明搭話
body:
Michael Hsiao: Hey, Jason.
Thought: Him again...
Thought: Situ and 23 said he's not a threat, although...
Thought: Is it really OK, if he keeps bumping into me like this...?
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Hi.
    //
->Yo, we're kinda seeing each other every day.
    Michael Hsiao: R-right! Haha...
    Thought: What's this awkward vibe about?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: Um...;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Something's up?
    Michael Hsiao: No. It's just that...
->I'd better be going.
    Michael Hsiao: Hey, wait...
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: I saw you at the Flop Core yesterday, remember?
Michael Hsiao: Did something happen when you and that engineering manager guy left?;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Nope. We finished work and just left.
    Michael Hsiao: Is that so...
->What do you mean?
    //
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: The IIB questioned me today.
Michael Hsiao: I was kind of on the fence whether or not to tell them about you.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站低頭)>>
Michael Hsiao: Nothing good when the IIB is involved, right?
<<#Simple(8)>>
->You told them about me?
    Michael Hsiao: I did...
->What were they questioning you for?
    Michael Hsiao: Didn't tell me anything, other than speaking truth.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Michael Hsiao: So I told them in the end.;<<PlayUntil(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站低頭返回)>>
Michael Hsiao: You were just doing your job, right? So I thought nothing could go wrong.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭)>>
Michael Hsiao: Then again, I suppose you deserve a heads-up.
Michael Hsiao: Terribly sorry if this causes you any trouble.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Don't be sorry. Nothing wrong with speaking the truth.
    Michael Hsiao: Thank you.
->Not a problem. I'll explain to them later.
    Michael Hsiao: Right...
->You sold me out, man!
    Michael Hsiao: So...
    Michael Hsiao: Did you do something you're not supposed to?
    Thought: Dammit.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->No, it's just that they will see me as a suspect.
        Michael Hsiao: Oh, I'm sorry.
        Michael Hsiao: ...
    ->None of your business.
        Michael Hsiao: ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>

Michael Hsiao: I should be going. Have work to do.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Bye.
    //
->Wait. What's the name of the agent who questioned you?
    Michael Hsiao: I-I didn't ask for his name.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站低頭)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->What does he look like?
        Michael Hsiao: Guy, very tall, kind of tanned.
        Thought: ...Could it be one of Yuna Hsu's men?
    ->I see. Thank you.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Michael Hsiao: I shouldn't be talking about this anymore...
    Michael Hsiao: Time to go. See you.;<<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站低頭返回)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Thought: ...
Thought: Now I need to put on my uniform and find Lawrence at his desk.
<<#End>>

title: 到篩選辦公室
body: //if沒有歸還採歆通行證 <<#If($IntoCellarByStealID=0)>> Quentin Qiu: Look again! You must have missed a pocket or two. Cathy Hsieh: I checked every one of them! Quentin Qiu: Then where could it be? Cathy Hsieh: Forget about it. I applied for a replacement. Thought: Oops, I forgot to put Cathy's pass back... <<#EndIf>> Quentin Qiu: Morning, Jayster.;<> Cathy Hsieh: It's evening already. Quentin Qiu: Morning is a relative concept. The four hours starting from the moment you get out of bed.;<> Tyler Cao: Jason? I thought your job won't start until next week? <> //if篩選組 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Wanna find some work. To warm up, you know. Tyler Cao: Warm up, huh... Quentin Qiu: You seriously love work, dude. ->I got bored at home. Quentin Qiu: You seriously love work, dude. ->Can't I be here? Tyler Cao: It's not like that... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: Oh, Mr. Liao is taking a day off today.;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: He was gone about halfway through yesterday. Did something happen?;<> Thought: They don't know that Liao's taken away? Quentin Qiu: Do you know something, Jayster?;<>;<> Thought: Tyler's looking at me in a funny way, as if trying to signal something...?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He was taken away by a special agent yesterday.;<> Quentin Qiu: What!?;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: How come we didn't hear anything about it!? Thought: Tyler's face seems to say I've just done the stupidest thing in the whole world. Thought: Oh...;<> Thought: He was trying to tell me not to say it. Now I see. Tyler Cao: Wayne said don't spread rumors yet. Wait for his official announcement.;<>;<> Quentin Qiu: What? You know something, too? Spill!;<> Tyler Cao: Don't ask me! Just wait for Wayne. <> ->I have no idea. Quentin Qiu: Huh. <> ->What's with the funny face, Tyler? Tyler Cao: Ah, um... Tyler Cao: Must have got a speck of dust in the eye.;<>;<> Quentin Qiu: Huh? Cathy Hsieh: Haha! Tyler Cao: I heard Mr. Liao was not feeling well yesterday, so he's taking a couple of days off.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Quentin Qiu: Shouldn't Wayno be here by now? Cathy Hsieh: I think he's summoned to HQ.;<> Quentin Qiu: HQ sure is busy these days.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Because of Auntie, maybe. Quentin Qiu: Oh...;<>;<> Quentin Qiu: Or maybe they're finally shutting the farm down...;<> Cathy Hsieh: ...;//大家低頭;<> Tyler Cao: ...;<> Quentin Qiu: ...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Don't lose hope just yet. Quentin Qiu: It's hard to have hope. This place is falling apart by the minute.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Yeah. Tyler Cao: ...;<> ->Cheer up, guys. Wayne will sort things out. Quentin Qiu: ...Can he?;<> Cathy Hsieh: You can trust Wayne. He's very serious about it. Quentin Qiu: I know. Still...;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: It will be alright.;<> Tyler Cao: Let's trust Wayne. He won't fail us. Quentin Qiu: Tyler...;<> Cathy Hsieh: Tyler... Quentin Qiu: You're the beacon of hope!;<> Cathy Hsieh: You're the beacon of hope! Tyler Cao: Stop it, you guys!;<> <> <<#EndIf>> //if操作組 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> Quentin Qiu: The thing is, he belongs to Ops now. What's he doing here? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Wanna find some work. To warm up, you know. Tyler Cao: Warm up, huh...;<> Quentin Qiu: Then you should be looking for work down there. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I love you guys more. Quentin Qiu: Awwww I'm so happy to hear you say it.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Stop. ->You're right. ->They don't seem to need me there. Quentin Qiu: We're your Plan B, huh?;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: Don't be so mean, QQ! <> <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: Haha, you seriously love work. ->Come on, don't be so cold, guys! Tyler Cao: Haha!;<> Cathy Hsieh: Be gone! Evil agent of Ops!;<> Tyler Cao: Hey, don't be like that!;<> Quentin Qiu: Jayster is the bridge connecting Screening and Ops!;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: Now you're the sweet talker. <> ->Ops staff can't come here? Quentin Qiu: It's not like that... Quentin Qiu: Wayne did say he's making this office permanently open house, didn't he?;<> Tyler Cao: He did.;<> Quentin Qiu: Then Jayster is the bridge connecting Screening and Ops!;<> Cathy Hsieh: Now you're the sweet talker. <<#EndSimple>> Quentin Qiu: Hey, did Mr. Liao take a day off or what?;<> Quentin Qiu: He was gone about halfway through yesterday. Did something happen? Thought: Gone?;<> Quentin Qiu: Do you know something, Jayster?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->How am I supposed to know? Quentin Qiu: Right. ->Maybe he's sick? Quentin Qiu: He? Sick? He's kinda giving everyone health tips all the time. Cathy Hsieh: But he's not getting any younger. <<#EndSimple>> Quentin Qiu: Say, shouldn't Wayno be here by now?;<> Tyler Cao: I think he's summoned to HQ.;<> Quentin Qiu: HQ sure is busy these days.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Because of Auntie, maybe.;<> Quentin Qiu: Oh...;<> Quentin Qiu: Or maybe they're finally shutting the farm down...;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: ... Tyler Cao: ...;<> Quentin Qiu: ... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Don't lose hope just yet. Quentin Qiu: It's hard to have hope. This place is falling apart by the minute.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Yeah. Tyler Cao: ...;<> ->Shutting down the farm is not necessarily a bad thing. Tyler Cao: ...;<> Quentin Qiu: ...You are one of them now?;<> Quentin Qiu: I guess they brainwash people in the Cellar. <<#Simple(8)>> ->The situation is terrible down there. This place can't run much longer. <<@球球堅持廢廠很糟糟糟糕>> Quentin Qiu: To a lot of people, we represent their last straw.;<> Quentin Qiu: If this farm is shut down, where do they get money for living? <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sending them to die in the Cellar is not a solution. ->That is a separate problem that deserves a separate discussion. <<#EndSimple>> Quentin Qiu: But you... Tyler Cao: Enough.;<> Tyler Cao: Now is not the time to talk about sensitive matters.;<>;<> Tyler Cao: We don't need a fight in the office. If you absolutely have to talk about this, find some after work hours.;<> Quentin Qiu: Yeah.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Okay. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->You're being brainwashed by Screening. Quentin Qiu: ... <<#GoTo(@球球堅持廢廠很糟糟糟糕)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: Ahem! Tyler Cao: I know Mr. Liao and Wayne are not here to chase us, but we have deadlines to meet.;<> Tyler Cao: Or are you all done with your work? Quentin Qiu: About that...;<> Cathy Hsieh: Um... <<#EndIf>> <<#End>> ///隆生進來

title: 被隆生叫出去對話
body: Lawrence Chang: OK, this looks like a safe place. Lawrence Chang: Jason, 23 and Nin are still not back yet. We need to improvise. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I say we need to wait a bit more. Lawrence Chang: We're running out of time.;<> Lawrence Chang: If we miss the consultation window, today is done for. <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->We'd better not fool around without a plan. Lawrence Chang: Not without a plan. I'm saying that we should come up with our own plan. ->Good thinking. What do you suggest? <<#GoTo(@隆生仔說總之我們得先開始行動。)>> ->Situ said she has Plan B.;<> Lawrence Chang: She was just trying to make us feel better. <<#Simple(10)>> ->You could be right. Lawrence Chang: All I'm saying is that we should come up with our own plan. ->I don't think she's that irresponsible. Lawrence Chang: Listen, I've been working with her for a long time.;<> Lawrence Chang: Sometimes she does say things without meaning it... Thought: I can't tell if this is some sort of retaliation or what...;<> ->You can't make presumptions like that. Lawrence Chang: But— ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->What do you suggest? <<@隆生仔說總之我們得先開始行動。>> Lawrence Chang: We should have the ball rolling. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Hello? Can you hear me?;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I can. Frances Cheng(c): I'm asking Lawrence. Haha! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Ms. Cheng...? Frances Cheng(c): Hey! Ms. Situ asked me to give you remote support. Lawrence Chang: What!?;<>;<> Frances Cheng(c): She said I'm her Plan B. //IFIF隆生有質疑沒有備案 <<#If($DLState=隆生說備案是假的)>> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Well, she does have a Plan B. Lawrence Chang: Looks like so... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Frances Cheng(c): 23 taught me the basics, so I guess I can do it.;<> Frances Cheng(c): Let me see. Following the plan, the next step is... //if篩選 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> Frances Cheng(c): Jason, find someone and offer to cover their consultation shift. <<#EndIf>> //if操作 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> Frances Cheng(c): Lawrence, find someone and offer to cover their consultation shift. <<#EndIf>> Lawrence Chang: Eh? Who has upcoming consultation shift? Frances Cheng(c): I think I have the schedule here. Hold on... Lawrence Chang: ...;//主角跟隆生互看 Frances Cheng(c): Here it is! Jeff Wu, Tyler Cao, and Jade Lin. <> //if操作 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> Lawrence Chang: Really!?;<> Lawrence Chang: Hey, it's my lucky day! Lawrence Chang: They all owe me favors. Asking for a shift switch should be a walk in the park.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->They all owe you? Lawrence Chang: Uh-huh.;<> <<@說明隆生人情三人發生啥>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You've been working here for, like, what? A couple of weeks? Lawrence Chang: I'm a nice guy who's always ready to help! ->What kind of favor? Lawrence Chang: Um... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Doing a ton of work and distracting Mr. Liao for Jeff, about a dozen times.;<> Thought: Right. I saw Jeff taking a cigarette break while dumping his work on Lawrence. Lawrence Chang: As for Tyler, he brings booze to work, you know that?;<> Lawrence Chang: I've been watching his back all this time! Frances Cheng(c): Why do you keep doing bad things for people!;<> Lawrence Chang: Eh? Are these things bad?;<> Frances Cheng(c): They're against company rules!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I keep forgetting you're the farm supervisor. Lawrence Chang: Ha! Right, your job is to uphold company rules. Frances Cheng(c): This has nothing to do with my job! ->You're one naughty boy, Lawrence. Lawrence Chang: Hee hee. Frances Cheng(c): This is not the time, you two... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Ahem!;<> ->Is it that simple? Lawrence Chang: I don't think there will be any problem. <<#GoTo(@說明隆生人情三人發生啥)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Anyhow, Lawrence, you can cover someone's shift with ease, right? Lawrence Chang: Yes!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Lucky you. Lawrence Chang: Lucky me! ->You didn't say what you did for Jade. Lawrence Chang: Oh, that. Catsitting. <<#Simple(8)>> ->She left her cat to you? Lawrence Chang: Yeah. What's wrong? I'm a very experienced pet owner. ->Where do you keep her cat? You don't have a home. Lawrence Chang: In Nin's safehouses, of course. Thought: Is that allowed...? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Jade said I look like a nice guy. She could trust me with the cat.;<> Frances Cheng(c): You do look like a nice guy. Lawrence Chang: See? Ms. Cheng thinks so, too.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Alright. Lawrence Chang: That's it? Just "alright"? ->I agree. Lawrence Chang: Heh heh! ->Do you? Lawrence Chang: Oi! ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Enough talk. Lawrence, find someone and take over their consultation shift.;<> Lawrence Chang: I'll start with Jade. She won't be too hard. Lawrence Chang: Um, I don't know where she is, though.;<> Frances Cheng(c): Let me check... Frances Cheng(c): She's in another wing, near the analysis lab. Lawrence Chang: Ah, I see. On my way.;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is there any task for me? // ->Good luck. Lawrence Chang: I won't disappoint! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): You just head to the consultation lobby, Jason. Frances Cheng(c): Can you do that?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Roger. // ->Huh? I don't need to take someone's shift? Frances Cheng(c): You're already taking Lawrence's shift. Frances Cheng(c): Now is about time for him to begin. <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Good! Let's see some action! <> <<#EndIf>> //if篩選組 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> Frances Cheng(c): Jason, you should have time to talk to three people, trying to take consultation shifts over from them. Frances Cheng(c): You can't possibly fail all three shots. <<#Simple(8)>> ->No problem. // ->What if I do fail all three? Frances Cheng(c): Then we have to take the loss. Everything will depend on Lawrence, in that case. Lawrence Chang: You can do it, Jason! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: What about me? Frances Cheng(c): Lawrence, you take your assigned consultation sessions. Frances Cheng(c): You should be starting now. Go over to the consultation lobby, hurry. Lawrence Chang: Roger! Frances Cheng(c): Good. Move, boys! <<#EndIf>> <> //球球晉茶水間 <<#End>>

title: 說服曹泰銘換班
body: <> //if剛剛跟大家說了廖哥的事情 <<#If($ToldEveryoneLiauTaken=1)>> <> Tyler Cao: Hey, Jason! Tyler Cao: Why did you tell them about Mr. Liao!? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Nobody told me not to. Tyler Cao: That is right, but... ->Sorry, I wasn't thinking straight. Tyler Cao: Never mind. ->They will find out anyway. Tyler Cao: Yes, but you shouldn't provoke them unless absolutely necessary. <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: With farm closure looming and IIB agents all over the place...;<> Tyler Cao: The last thing we need is the news of a colleague being taken away. Tyler Cao: Never mind. It could be that I'm worrying too much. Tyler Cao: Oh.;<> <<#EndIf>> //if沒說 <<#If($ToldEveryoneLiauTaken=-1)>> <> Tyler Cao: Hey, Jason! Tyler Cao: I'm glad you didn't tell them about Mr. Liao.;<> Tyler Cao: Looks like my signal worked. <<#Simple(8)>> ->That was a signal? Tyler Cao: Don't tell me you didn't get it!?;<> Tyler Cao: Haha! ->Haha, I almost missed it. Tyler Cao: Haha!;<> Tyler Cao: That was close. ->I thought it's not the best time to bring that up. Tyler Cao: Ah, yeah...;<> Tyler Cao: Good judgment. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: ... Tyler Cao: With farm closure looming and IIB agents all over the place...;<> Tyler Cao: The last thing we need is the news of a colleague being taken away. Tyler Cao: Oh.;<> <<#EndIf>> <> //IF董欣麗事件有完成 <<#If(SQ_WhoLetHerIn=3)>> <> <<#EndIf>> Tyler Cao: Can I help you? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Can I take your shift? Tyler Cao: What shift? Tyler Cao: Oh, you mean consultation. Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I could use more hands-on experience. Tyler Cao: No worries about that.;<> Tyler Cao: You're officially hired. There will be plenty of hands-on work going forward. <> ->I just need something to do. Tyler Cao: That's hardly an...;<> Thought: An excuse, he wanted to say. <> <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: I need more shifts for the monthly performance review. Tyler Cao: Sorry. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Alright. Tyler Cao: Sorry, really. ->But you said you owe me one. ($DLStateFloat2);//IF有完成調查董欣麗事件 <<@換班時提當初董欣麗事件人情>> Tyler Cao: You mean for investigating Sydney Tung?;<> Tyler Cao: Well, I did say so... <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Don't you try to back out of it now, man! Tyler Cao: I won't! I'm not QQ, okay? ->So, can we switch shifts? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: ... Tyler Cao: OK, I could do that.;<> Tyler Cao: First of all, tell me why you want my shift, why now. <> <<@穩哥問為啥要換班給正經理由>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I already told you. ($DLStateFloat);//選過消失 <> Tyler Cao: Don't think you can fool me with that. Tyler Cao: I'm not stupid, Jason. I can tell you have some other reason. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Is that important? Tyler Cao: I need this shift for my performance review. Unless you have a good enough reason, or...;<> Tyler Cao: Or I'd rather keep it for myself. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@穩哥問為啥要換班給正經理由)>> ->I'm investigating a scandal that Vision is trying to cover. ->I'm trying to save a poor child. Frances Cheng(c): Jason!? Tyler Cao: What the heck...? Tyler Cao: Are you kidding me? I'm dead serious about this.;<> Tyler Cao: ... Tyler Cao: That look on your face... You mean, for real? Tyler Cao: Sorry, I can't accept random excuses like that.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Alright. // ->But you said you'd return the favor. Tyler Cao: I did, although this particular request is an issue.;<> Tyler Cao: I will return the favor in some other way. Anything but this. Tyler Cao: What do you say?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Alright. Tyler Cao: Thank you for understanding. ->You don't believe what I said? Tyler Cao: I don't know if I do or not.;<> Tyler Cao: You can't expect me to just accept something like that... Tyler Cao: *Sigh*;<> <<#GoTo(@跟穩哥直說歡班目的她妥協)>> ->What I'm doing will potentially affect a lot of people. <<@跟穩哥直說歡班目的她妥協>> Tyler Cao: ... Tyler Cao: ...;<> Tyler Cao: *Sigh* Tyler Cao: Listen, Jason... Tyler Cao: You know what? Something is off about you. I've been feeling so since day one. Tyler Cao: Exactly how, I can't put my finger on it. It's like you're not really you, but...;<> Tyler Cao: Geez, what the hell am I talking about?;<> Tyler Cao: As far as I have seen, though, I'm confident to say you're not a bad guy. Tyler Cao: Honestly, I don't believe the excuse you just gave.;<> Tyler Cao: But I can tell you really need this shift, for whatever real reason. Let's switch shifts then.;<> Tyler Cao: Now we're even.;<> Frances Cheng(c): You did it! <> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Thank you. Tyler Cao: Don't mention it.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: I'll leave the rest to you. Tyler Cao: If that settles it, I'll go back to my desk. <> <> <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I can't tell you, but this matter is of critical importance. Tyler Cao: What is that supposed to mean...;<> Tyler Cao: Sorry, I can't accept that as a legit reason. Find someone else, maybe. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What I'm doing will potentially affect a lot of people. <<#GoTo(@跟穩哥直說歡班目的她妥協)>> ->Alright. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#EndSimple>> ->What if I cover your shift in your name? You get the credit for your review. Tyler Cao: ...;<> Tyler Cao: Not gonna work. The system will find out.;<> Thought: What if 23 could trick the review system... Thought: Maybe Fran could do it...?;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What if I told you I can trick the review system? Tyler Cao: Huh? How? Frances Cheng(c): Jason! Don't let him know we can tamper with the system! <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I've hacked into the system. <<@跟泰銘說可以駭進評級系統>> Frances Cheng(c): JASON DAI! <> Tyler Cao: Haha, as if I'll believe you.;<> Tyler Cao: Don't waste your time here. Go find someone else. <> ->I just can. Tyler Cao: Not very convincing. Not at all. Tyler Cao: Let's not take the risk. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Alright. // ->What if I told you that I can hack into the review system? <<#GoTo(@跟泰銘說可以駭進評級系統)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->OK, you got me, I can't. Tyler Cao: Haha. ->Hey, you said you owe me one. ($DLStateFloat2);//IF有完成調查董欣麗事件 <<#GoTo(@換班時提當初董欣麗事件人情)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Alright. // ->Hey, you said you owe me one. ($DLStateFloat2);//IF有完成調查董欣麗事件 <<#GoTo(@換班時提當初董欣麗事件人情)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: You should ask Jeff. His shift is about that time, too. Tyler Cao: And he's done more than enough shifts. Don't need to worry about the review. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Do you know where he is? Tyler Cao: Should be smoking on the Logistics floor. I guess he likes the smell of gas there. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Smell of gas? Tyler Cao: I don't get it, but a lot of people somehow like the smell of gasoline, no? Tyler Cao: That's it, then? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah, thank you. // ->What about Jade? <<#GoTo(@問林姐在哪才能換班壓壓)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Thank you. Tyler Cao: Don't mention it. ->What about Jade? <<#GoTo(@問林姐在哪才能換班壓壓)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->What about Jade? <<@問林姐在哪才能換班壓壓>> Tyler Cao: Jade? Ah, right, she has a shift around that time, too. Tyler Cao: The thing about Jade is...;<> Tyler Cao: I guess it won't work? She's the type that follows rules. Switching shifts with you is unlikely. Tyler Cao: She should be near the contract rooms right now. You can ask her yourself.;<> ->I see. Thank you. Tyler Cao: Don't mention it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tyler Cao: If that settles it, I'll go back to my desk. <> <> <> <<#End>> ->Never mind. Tyler Cao: Yeah. <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> //我可以幫你想應對方案喔！這樣好酷喔，就跟23小姐一樣。

title: 說服林靜慧換班
body: //這裡不管失敗還成功林靜慧對話結束都會走去簽約室 //硬碟拿給廖哥結束後，1.找到硬碟沒說林靜慧搞丟 // 2.找到硬碟說她搞丟，獨攬功勞害她被懲罰 // 3.找到硬碟說她搞丟，不過幫她說話 // 4.沒找到但是有幫忙說話 // 5.沒找到又沒幫忙說話 // 6.找到硬碟，但卻跟俊恩下去沒給廖哥導致林靜惠來罵人 <> <> <> //硬碟事件有好結果，134 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=1||$LinGinHueDiskEnding=3||$LinGinHueDiskEnding=4)>> <> <<#EndIf>> <>;<> //if認識主角(第二日有解廖哥任務線) <<#If($LieYouDontFindLin=-1||$LieYouDontFindLin=1)>> Jade Lin: Ah, Mr. Dai. //if第二日廖哥任務線明明拿到硬碟卻跟俊恩下去導致林靜慧罵人 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=6)>> Thought: Ice-cold greeting... Jade Lin: What are you standing there for?;<> <> Thought: She must be still mad at me for the hard drive last time...;<> Thought: Looks like a dead end. Frances Cheng(c): It's not gonna work... <> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> Jade Lin: Hello. Can I help you? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Can I take your shift? //if不認識 <<#If($LieYouDontFindLin=0)>> Jade Lin: My shift? Jade Lin: But I need this shift for my monthly review...;<> Jade Lin: And I don't really know you... Thought: Right, we hardly ever talked... Jade Lin: Sorry, I can't help you.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Not a problem. Sorry for bothering. Jade Lin: No worries. <> Thought: Well, that was quick...;<> Frances Cheng(c): It's not gonna work... <> <> <<#End>> ->I saved you the other day. Thought: She's the girl running from the stabber... Jade Lin: Ah!;<> Jade Lin: Yes! You stopped the psychopath the other day! Jade Lin: Sorry, I almost forgot! Jade Lin: But...;<> <<#Simple(4)>> ->Please! They will fire me if I don't get enough shifts. Jade Lin: Um... <<#GoTo(@對林靜慧情緒勒索)>> ->You wouldn't be here if not for me. Jade Lin: You're right, yet... <<@對林靜慧情緒勒索>> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Consider this a favor. Then we're even. ->Do you have the heart to watch me being fired? Jade Lin: Ah...;<> Jade Lin: In that case... Jade Lin: Okay...?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Great! Thank you! Jade Lin: Hm... ->I wouldn't force you if you're having a really hard time. Jade Lin: I-is that so? In that case... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Don't worry about it! I won't push you. // ->I'll try begging them for one more chance then. Jade Lin: Ah...;<> Jade Lin: Let's switch shifts. Jade Lin: You did save my life, after all.;<> <<#GoTo(@情緒勒索林靜慧成功路線)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jade Lin: Let's not switch shifts, then. Jade Lin: Sorry!;<> Jade Lin: I-I should be going. <> Frances Cheng(c): That didn't go well...;<> Thought: It could have worked if I insisted... <> <> <<#End>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<@情緒勒索林靜慧成功路線>> Jade Lin: See you. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Frances Cheng(c): That worked!;<> Frances Cheng(c): Although the way you did it feels a bit too... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Cheeky? Frances Cheng(c): Haha... ->Easy? Frances Cheng(c): No. Frances Cheng(c): Never mind. It's not important. Haha... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> <<#End>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jade Lin: ... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jade Lin: Sorry! I really need this shift for my performance review.;<> Jade Lin: I really appreciate what you did, but I'm afraid I can't help you today. Jade Lin: You could try asking someone else...;<> <> Thought: Um...;<> Frances Cheng(c): That didn't work... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah. // ->I should have tried pushing her a little. Frances Cheng(c): Maybe. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> <<#End>> ->I desperately need a consultation shift today. Jade Lin: I'm in the same boat! Jade Lin: Sorry! You could try asking someone else...;<> <> Thought: Well, that was quick...;<> Frances Cheng(c): It's not gonna work... <> <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<@認識路線的說服林靜慧換班>> Jade Lin: Switch shifts? You mean the upcoming consultation session? Jade Lin: I'm not sure if...;<> Jade Lin: But I need this shift for my monthly review... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Please. Jade Lin: Hmm... ->Does it have to be this shift today? Jade Lin: Actually, what I really need is to sign a few more contributors on. Jade Lin: For that, I must take as many shifts as possible. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jade Lin: Sorry to disappoint, Mr. Dai.;<> //if有幫到 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=1||$LinGinHueDiskEnding=3||$LinGinHueDiskEnding=4)>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->But I did put in a good word for you with Mr. Liao. ($DLStateFloat);//姐所選項 ->You said you'd return the favor. Please! ($DLStateFloat1);//有先選關心林靜慧的選項且當初是好結局，就解鎖 Jade Lin: That I did... //if有幫找回硬碟 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=1||$LinGinHueDiskEnding=3)>> Jade Lin: Okay. There could be penalties for failing the review.;<> Jade Lin: But it won't be too bad, especially since you managed to find the hard drive for me. Jade Lin: If I lost that, and fail the performance review, that would be a disaster. Jade Lin: Anyway, I do owe you a favor! Let's switch shifts.;<> Jade Lin: That's it, then. See you later! <> Frances Cheng(c): That worked!;<> Frances Cheng(c): Your good deeds are paying off, J! <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah. // ->Luck is on my side. Frances Cheng(c): Not luck! You earned it! ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if沒幫找回硬碟 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=4)>> Jade Lin: You did help me, so I wasn't fired the other time...;<> Jade Lin: However, I didn't find the lost hard drive. Jade Lin: Now I'm on the verge of being fired. Can't afford any risk. Jade Lin: I'm really sorry...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Alright. // ->Wayne and Mr. Liao won't mind! ->I did lobby Mr. Liao for you last time, and it worked! Jade Lin: You're right...;<> Jade Lin: My performance this month will look ugly no matter what... Jade Lin: ... Jade Lin: Okay! Let's switch shifts! Jade Lin: I wouldn't have this shift in the first place if not for your help.;<> Jade Lin: For that I'm very grateful, haha... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Thank you. ->Yeah. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jade Lin: That's it, then. See you later! <> Frances Cheng(c): That worked!;<> Frances Cheng(c): Your good deeds are paying off, J! <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah. // ->Luck is on my side. Frances Cheng(c): Not luck! You earned it! ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> <<#End>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jade Lin: That's it, then. See you later. <> Thought: ...;<> Frances Cheng(c): That was so close. You almost convinced her. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah. Frances Cheng(c): *Sigh* ->I wasn't really counting on it. Frances Cheng(c): Huh... ->Well, she has her own issues to deal with. Frances Cheng(c): Right. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jade Lin: I really can't this time. Maybe next time.;<> Jade Lin: Ah, I'm being late. Better be going. <> Thought: Ah...;<> Frances Cheng(c): Jason! You could have pushed her a little more! <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I give up. It's a dead end. Frances Cheng(c): No! You can't just give up!;<> ->Sorry, my head went blank for a moment. Frances Cheng(c): Went blank!?;<> Frances Cheng(c): What for!? <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Hey! That sounds like a good opportunity! Frances Cheng(c): ...;<> <> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if沒幫到，這不用if以免是完全不認識 Jade Lin: ...That's it, then. Jade Lin: I-I should be going! <> Frances Cheng(c): It's not gonna work...;<> <> <> <<#End>> ->Did you end up alright? ($DLStateFloat);//硬碟事件好結果才出現此選項 //硬碟拿給廖哥結束後，1.找到硬碟沒說林靜慧搞丟 // 2.找到硬碟說她搞丟，獨攬功勞害她被懲罰 // 3.找到硬碟說她搞丟，不過幫她說話 // 4.沒找到但是有幫忙說話 // 5.沒找到又沒幫忙說話 // 6.找到硬碟，但卻跟俊恩下去沒給廖哥導致林靜惠來罵人 //if有幫忙 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=1||$LinGinHueDiskEnding=3||$LinGinHueDiskEnding=4)>> <> Jade Lin: Ah, you mean the lost hard drive?;<> Jade Lin: I managed to keep my job, all thanks to you! Jade Lin: I owe you more than I can imagine. Jade Lin: Ah, it's about time. I should get going.;<> Jade Lin: Or can I help you with something? <<#Simple(8)>> ->Wait, can we switch shifts? I need your next shift. <<#GoTo(@認識路線的說服林靜慧換班)>> ->Yeah, have a productive day. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jade Lin: See you later. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Thought: Do I just let this opportunity slip...?;<> Frances Cheng(c): Jason! Why didn't you stop her? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She's busy, so... Frances Cheng(c): You could have asked!;<> ->My head went blank for a second there. Frances Cheng(c): Went blank!?;<> Frances Cheng(c): What for!? ->I don't think she'd agree. Frances Cheng(c): You could have asked!;<> <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Gah! Frances Cheng(c): What are you thinking...;<> <> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if沒幫硬碟，不用if因為這裡一定是認識路線，有幫那邊沒進去一定就是沒幫 Jade Lin: Ah, you mean the lost hard drive the other day? Jade Lin: I managed to keep the job, but barely. Right now I'm like inches away from the chopping block.;<> Jade Lin: If anything goes wrong again, I don't think even Wayne could help me. Jade Lin: And now I'm about to fail this month's performance review... Jade Lin: *Sigh* Jade Lin: ...You came here just to ask about that?;<> Jade Lin: I should be going, if that's all you need. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Wait, can we switch shifts? I need your next shift. <<#GoTo(@認識路線的說服林靜慧換班)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jade Lin: I'm off to work, then. <> Thought: The way said it, I don't think switching shifts is a possibility.;<> Frances Cheng(c): Jason! Why didn't you stop her? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You heard her. Not gonna happen. Frances Cheng(c): Okay...;<> Frances Cheng(c): You're right. I can tell she really needs this shift. Thought: Maybe because of the lost hard drive.;<> ->I don't think I have a chance. Frances Cheng(c): You can't just give up... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> <<#End>> ->Nothing. Jade Lin: Ah, OK. <>;<> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>>

title: 說服吳晉峰換班
body: //第一日幫她拿阿姨辦公室東西 //幫他跟廖哥和好 //吳晉峰回去需要搭電梯走回辦公室 Jeff Wu: What's up, Jason?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Can I take your shift? Jeff Wu: Consultation shift?;<> Jeff Wu: Why? <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I could use more hands-on experience. Jeff Wu: Woah! A hard-working, model employee, in real life!;<> Jeff Wu: Dude, I must be hallucinating! ->I just need something to do.;<> Jeff Wu: For real? You wanna kill time with work!?;<> <<#EndSimple>> Jeff Wu: ... Jeff Wu: Um...;<> //if料哥事件友邦到 <<#If($FonLiauEventStatus=2)>> Jeff Wu: Sure! Let's switch shifts! I owe you that much. Jeff Wu: I'd be sill bickering with old man Liao if not for you.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Thank you. Jeff Wu: No biggie. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jeff Wu: I'll leave today's shift to you, then! Jeff Wu: And I can take a much-needed break. Win-win!;<> <> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> Jeff Wu: Sorry. I'm about to fail this month's performance review. Better play it safe. //IF剛說想找事做 <<#If($DLStateFloat=1)>> Jeff Wu: Especially when you just wanna kill some time. Haha... <<#EndIf>> Jeff Wu: You should try someone else.;<> //if有參與幫開門 <<#If($HelpYehOfficeDoor=0)>> <> <<#Simple(6)>> ->But I did keep watch for you the other day! ($DLStateFloat);//要解鎖 Jeff Wu: You mean that, huh...;<> //if沒把風成功 <<#If($SaidsomethingYehOfficeDoor=false)>> Jeff Wu: Actually, Auntie caught us in the end. Jeff Wu: She went to check surveillance records and saw us hacking the office lock... Jeff Wu: Then, you know... Jeff Wu: And she cut our salaries, QQ and I.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'll probably see a salary cut, too... ->Sorry. Jeff Wu: It's nothing. Jeff Wu: We dragged you into it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jeff Wu: Hey, cheer up!;<> Jeff Wu: It didn't work out, but you did try to help me. The intention counts. Jeff Wu: Okay, a favor for a favor! <<#GoTo(@因為幫忙開門事件而成功換班欸欸)>> <<#EndIf>> //if把風成功 <<#If($SaidsomethingYehOfficeDoor=true)>> Jeff Wu: You did save my ass... Jeff Wu: ...;<> Jeff Wu: Okay, a favor for a favor!;<> <<@因為幫忙開門事件而成功換班欸欸>> Jeff Wu: You scratch my back, I scratch your back! Jeff Wu: Let's switch shifts. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Thank you. Jeff Wu: No biggie. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Jeff Wu: We have a deal. Jeff Wu: And I can take a much-needed break. Win-win! <> <> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <> <<#EndSimple>> <> <> <<#End>>

body:
