<<#End>>

title: 進面談大廳見到徐媛
body: Yuna Hsu: Don't you have someone that you care about, Jason Dai? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. Yuna Hsu: Then you can relate.;<> ->I only care about myself. Yuna Hsu: You're a bad liar.;<> Yuna Hsu: Now, listen. ->I don't have time for this. Yuna Hsu: Show some patience and listen.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: I have people that I care about. Yuna Hsu: I want to protect them. That is my motive, plain and simple.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Are you trying to say you have a kind heart? Yuna Hsu: I'm trying to say I'm not a heartless, cold-blooded animal. ->Then you're like most people. Yuna Hsu: I take it as that you can relate. Good. ->Cut to the chase. Yuna Hsu: ... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: If I'm down, all these people will go down with me.;<> Yuna Hsu: I would try my best to avoid that, obviously. Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: Now, tell me... Yuna Hsu: Do you have shit for brains or what, Jason Dai?;<> Yuna Hsu: A fight at the Flop Core, and using explosives? What the hell were you thinking? Yuna Hsu: Do you have any idea how huge a mess you left? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->It's not like I had a choice. Yuna Hsu: ...No choice, huh? ->Sorry. Yuna Hsu: Sorry?? Yuna Hsu: That's all you have to say? Yuna Hsu: Heh. You're unbelievable... ->What does that have to do with you? Yuna Hsu: That has everything to do with me. <<#EndSimple>> //if徐媛幫主角下去 <<#If(LetYuanHeipOpenAccesses=true)>> Yuna Hsu: You have no idea how much risk I'm taking on your behalf.;<> Yuna Hsu: I let you into the Flop Core. There were precautions, yes...;<>;<> Yuna Hsu: But if they caught you, they'd certainly have found me. Yuna Hsu: You'd be a dead man if I were not in charge of this investigation.;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You're just trying to save your own skin. Yuna Hsu: Of course I am. Do you think I'm doing all this for you? ->Thank you. Yuna Hsu: Thank you? Yuna Hsu: You're unbelievable... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //IF徐媛沒幫主角下去 <<#If(LetYuanHeipOpenAccesses=false)>> Yuna Hsu: My man asked one quick question, and your name came right up. He wasn't even trying.;< Yuna Hsu: You'd be a dead man if I were not in charge of this investigation. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What do you care if I were caught? // ->Appreciated. Yuna Hsu: Appreciated...?;<> Yuna Hsu: Hahaha... Yuna Hsu: My, can't you be any stupider?;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: If you were caught, they'd ask questions.;<> Yuna Hsu: Then maybe you'd mention our deal. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I wouldn't. Yuna Hsu: So you say. I'd be stupid to trust you on that.;<> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: Let me remind you of the situation... ->I could have told people any time. You didn't mind. Yuna Hsu: I could, but you won't, because that would be against your interest.;<> Yuna Hsu: If you were caught, though, you'd have a good reason to tell them whatever they want to hear. ->Even if I did tell, there's no evidence leading to you. Yuna Hsu: You have underestimated Vision.;<> Yuna Hsu: And they don't need evidence to have me disposed of. Mere suspicion is good enough. Yuna Hsu: ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Yuna Hsu: Not being caught is not enough. You can't appear on Vision's radar, not even for one second. Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: The only thing special about you, Dai, is that you're a nobody. Yuna Hsu: No one cares about what you're doing. They're not aware of your existence. Yuna Hsu: Protected by this anonymity, you're free to move around and ask questions.;<> Yuna Hsu: I, on the other hand, don't have any legit reason to appear on this farm other than this investigation on Eva Yeh. Yuna Hsu: This morning I had to submit the closing report regarding Eva Yeh's case. Can't hold back any longer.;<> Yuna Hsu: Do you know what that means? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Means your job here is done. ->Means you have got what you want. Yuna Hsu: Wrong.;<> Yuna Hsu: It means I don't have a reason to be here anymore. ->Means you must leave this farm. Yuna Hsu: Correct.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Now you know. Yuna Hsu: Going forward, you will be one of the few pawns I have on this farm.;<> Yuna Hsu: What you did yesterday almost obliterated your own worth.;<> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: Your turn now. Tell me.;<>;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Tell you what? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: What happened at the Flop Core? Why explosives? <> <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I don't feel like talking. Yuna Hsu: Do you still not get the idea? You owe me an explanation. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What if I just refuse to? Yuna Hsu: I can tell Vision about your visit to the Flop Core. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Okay, you win. I was attacked by mercenaries. <<#GoTo(@根源源說傭兵之事)>> ->You said you'd go down with me. Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: Can't you just be cooperative for once, Dai?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->My top priority is to keep myself safe.;<>;//選了之後此變數改為1，原本0 ->I don't trust you.;<>;//選了之後此變數改為1，原本0 Yuna Hsu: I see.;<> <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#EndSimple>> ->Okay. I was attacked by mercenaries. <<#GoTo(@根源源說傭兵之事)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Did you know about those mercenaries? <<@根源源說傭兵之事>> Yuna Hsu: What mercenaries?;<> Thought: She doesn't know...? Frances Cheng(c): Wait, J. Is it safe to tell her about this? <> Yuna Hsu: What are you talking about?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->There were mercenaries at the Flop Core. Identity unknown. White uniform. <<@跟徐媛媛說核心有傭兵欸>> Yuna Hsu: You were attacked by mercenaries? Yuna Hsu: That explains the absence of security guards...;<> Yuna Hsu: Hmm... Thought: She seems to have realized something. Yuna Hsu: Thank you for the intel. Now I have a few ideas.;<> Thought: Is that supposed to be good news for me? ->You don't know? Well, forget I ever mentioned it. Yuna Hsu: No. Tell me what you saw. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I don't feel like talking. Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: Is this uncooperative attitude some kind of negotiation strategy, or just a personal grudge? Yuna Hsu: With you, it's really hard to tell.;<> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: Okay. I think I've got the idea. The mention of mercenaries says enough. Yuna Hsu: That's all I need from you about that.;<> <> ->What's in it for me? Yuna Hsu: Not losing an ally who cleans up after you. Is that good enough? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I don't need you. Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: Can't you just be cooperative for once, Dai? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->My top priority is to keep myself safe.;<>;//選了之後此變數改為1，原本0 ->I don't trust you.;<>;//選了之後此變數改為1，原本0 Yuna Hsu: I see.;<> <<#EndSimple>> <> ->OK. There were mercenaries at the Flop Core. <<#GoTo(@跟徐媛媛說核心有傭兵欸)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Let's put that aside, for now. Yuna Hsu: What you did yesterday proves you're not a trustworthy partner.;<> //if不配合說運算核心或傭兵的事情。 <<#If($DontTellYuanMercenary=true)>> Yuna Hsu: This uncooperative attitude makes things even worse. <<#EndIf>> <> <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=2)>> <> <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I did offer you valuable intel yesterday. ($DLStateFloat2);//if有給徐媛情報 //if有讓她幫忙開通往運算核心 <<#If(LetYuanHeipOpenAccesses=true)>> Yuna Hsu: And I returned the favor. What did you do with it, huh? <<#EndIf>> //if沒有讓她幫忙去運算核心 <<#If(LetYuanHeipOpenAccesses=false)>> Yuna Hsu: So?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->So you owe me a favor. You said it. Yuna Hsu: Does that make what you did any less stupid?;<> ->So I'm a trustworthy partner. Yuna Hsu: I beg to differ.;<> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> ->Maybe. Thought: I'm not sure what that grin of hers means. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: Here's a plan, so you can prove yourself. //if說不能信任 <<#If($DLStateFloat4=0)>> Yuna Hsu: Something that you won't mind doing, trusting me or not. <<#EndIf>> //if說要保護自己 <<#If($DLStateFloat=0)>> Yuna Hsu: I know you're trying to keep yourself safe.;<> Yuna Hsu: Think about it again. Yuna Hsu: Having me watching your back would be in your best interest, no?;<> <<#EndIf>> //if有說傭兵的事情 <<#If($DontTellYuanMercenary=false)>> <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I told you about the mercenaries. We're even. ($DLStateFloat2);//解所選項 Yuna Hsu: You literally told me that. One word. Nothing else of value.;<> Yuna Hsu: Do you call that even? <> ->Tell me about it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //這段竊聽可以改成不裝在主角身上主角只要偷偷放在座位上。後來徐源回收就從椅子裡拿出來。 //如果是不幫忙路線，徐員會說她得想辦法搞到嚴勝和的行程變的很麻煩。 //或是要竊聽的時候把機器打開，會想這些事為了避免全程帶著徐媛的竊聽器主角跟呈芳說啥都聽到。 Yuna Hsu: You will meet with the CEO later today. I need you to record the conversation.;<> Thought: ...Shane Yan?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Shane Yan? Yuna Hsu: Who else could it be? ->Why would he want to meet me? Yuna Hsu: You will know soon. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: What do you say? Covert recording. Easy enough.;<> <> <> <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure, I'll do it. Yuna Hsu: Good.;<> <<@搭營媛媛竊聽嚴勝和>> Yuna Hsu: A wise choice. <> //徐苑下桌向前靠貼近戴世界盯著她看， Yuna Hsu: You have chosen the easier path, Dai. <<#Simple(8)>> ->The easier path for you. Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: Sometimes I really like you. Thought: That unreadable grin again.;<> ->Hopefully. Thought: That unreadable grin again. ->I don't need no easy path. Yuna Hsu: That might be true. Yuna Hsu: The thing is, you never know what you need until it's too late. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //徐媛給主角竊聽器或是拍拍她肩膀裝上去 <> Yuna Hsu: I just installed a bug on you. Thought: With a light touch??;<> Thought: She must have done this thousands of times... Yuna Hsu: When you see Yan, press it once to start recording.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->How can I possibly meet with the CEO? Yuna Hsu: You will. Thought: She never answers my questions. ->That simple? Yuna Hsu: Unless you choose to do anything stupid. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Now, listen.;<> Yuna Hsu: Remember. You need to record every conversation with Yan. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Roger that. Yuna Hsu: Good.;<> ->I don't think he'd want to meet me twice. Yuna Hsu: Every. Single. Conversation.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Sure. Yuna Hsu: Good. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: That's it, then.;<> Yuna Hsu: I will see you later. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Wait, when are you retrieving this? Yuna Hsu: When it's time. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#End>> //徐媛走出面談大廳 ->Why do you want to record his conversations? <<@竊聽why媛媛>> <> Yuna Hsu: There are a few things I need to confirm.;<> Yuna Hsu: And... Yuna Hsu: You might capture unexpected guests on the recording.;<> Thought: Guests? <<#Simple(8)>> ->By "guests", you mean? ->What is it that you need to confirm? Yuna Hsu: Classified. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Now you know everything you need to know. Will you do it or not? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure, I'll do it. <<#GoTo(@搭營媛媛竊聽嚴勝和)>> ->No. <<#GoTo(@咀嚼媛媛竊聽嚴勝和)>> ->Will this hurt the CEO in any way? ($DLStateFloat5) <<#GoTo(@在乎執行長的喔有喔)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Will this hurt the CEO in any way? <<@在乎執行長的喔有喔>> <> Yuna Hsu: Why do you suddenly care so much about him? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Count me in if this makes that bastard bleed. <<@徐媛猜傑哥因為芳不爽嚴勝和>> <> Yuna Hsu: You want to see him bleed, because you think he's responsible for what happened to Frances. <<#Simple(8)>> ->He is responsible. ->I just want to see that motherfucker cry. Frances Cheng(c): Jason... <> ->It has nothing to do with Frances. Yuna Hsu: Heh.;<> Yuna Hsu: You're a bad liar, Dai. Thought: ...;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: I don't work with people driven by personal grudges.;<> Yuna Hsu: But this time, I will make an exception. Yuna Hsu: Right, my plan will hurt him.;<> Yuna Hsu: What do you say? Are you in? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure, I'll do it. <<#GoTo(@搭營媛媛竊聽嚴勝和)>> ->No. <<#GoTo(@咀嚼媛媛竊聽嚴勝和)>> ->Why do you want to record his words? ($DLStateFloat2) <<#GoTo(@竊聽why媛媛)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I need to know who I'm going against. Yuna Hsu: Isn't that too late?;<> Yuna Hsu: After that episode at the Flop Core, you're against the entire Vision Corp. Yuna Hsu: I don't think that is why you're asking.;<> <<#GoTo(@徐媛猜傑哥因為芳不爽嚴勝和)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->No. <<@咀嚼媛媛竊聽嚴勝和>> Yuna Hsu: Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I said I don't trust you. ($DLStateFloat4);//前面說不信任會出現 Yuna Hsu: You don't need to trust me, and I'm not asking you to take any risks. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I wouldn't call this risk-free. <<@進入拒絕媛媛之後他拍肩竊聽器環節>> Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: So be it. <> //徐苑下桌向前靠貼近戴世界盯著她看， Yuna Hsu: You have chosen the hard path, Dai. Yuna Hsu: Now you're on your own.;<> Yuna Hsu: Bye. //徐媛走出面談大廳 <<#End>> ->Sure, I'll do it. <<#GoTo(@搭營媛媛竊聽嚴勝和)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I said I must keep myself safe. ($DLStateFloat);//前面說要保護自己 ->I don't want no trouble. Yuna Hsu: Ha! After setting off explosives at the Flop Core? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Okay, I'm in. <<#GoTo(@搭營媛媛竊聽嚴勝和)>> ->Making an enemy of the CEO is a whole different matter. ->Whatever you say. <<#GoTo(@進入拒絕媛媛之後他拍肩竊聽器環節)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>>

title: 第二人換班失敗對話
阿緯登場
body:
//主角走到電腦之前，啊偉突然出現

Jeff Wu: Hey, is Mr. Liao back yet?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外)>>
Cathy Hsieh: ...No.
Jeff Wu: I see...;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐低頭)>>
Quentin Qiu: Let's wait for Wayne. He knows what's happening.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回)>>;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺)>>
Jeff Wu: ...Yeah.
<<Set($DLState,阿緯回歸解釋廖哥)>>
Quentin Qiu: Hey!;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐低頭返回)>>;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後)>>
Quentin Qiu: Wayne's back!;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背坐右看)>>
//if有提廖哥的事情
<<#If($ToldEveryoneLiauTaken>0)>>
    Jeff Wu: Wayne! How is Mr. Liao?
    Cathy Hsieh: What happened to him?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐低頭)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站抓頭)>>
    Wayne Zheng: Huh? What are you talking about?
    Quentin Qiu: I heard Mr. Liao was taken away by an agent from HQ?;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站抓頭返回)>>
    Cathy Hsieh: Tyler says it's confidential. But we're his colleagues!;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐低頭返回)>>;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後返回)>>;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背坐右看轉左)>>
    Wayne Zheng: Tyler?;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰)>>
    Tyler Cao: Ugh, it's... It's Jason!;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外)>>;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭)>>
    Thought: Wayne sends over a heavy stare, laden with disappointment.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
    Wayne Zheng: Okay, I'll tell you.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺轉頭返回)>>;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背坐左看轉右)>>
    Wayne Zheng: What's happening to Mr. Liao is still ongoing. I'm not authorized to disclose too much.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐看外返回)>>
    Jeff Wu: We don't even know what it is...
    Quentin Qiu: Does it have anything to do with farm closure...?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後)>>;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背坐右看返回)>>
    Thought: Wayne is a bit surprised.
    Wayne Zheng: No, nothing to do with that at all.;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背坐右看)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰低頭)>>
    Wayne Zheng: All I can say is that Mr. Liao is OK. Don't make wild speculations.
<<#EndIf>>
//if沒提廖哥的事情
<<#If($ToldEveryoneLiauTaken<0)>>
    Jeff Wu: Do you know what's happening to Mr. Liao, Wayne?
    Wayne Zheng: Mr. Liao?;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐低頭)>>
    Wayne Zheng: He's at HQ, working on a project. Will stay there for a few days.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰)>>
    Jeff Wu: Not even coming home?
    Wayne Zheng: He won't have time to. HQ is keeping him busy around the clock.
    Jeff Wu: That doesn't make sense.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後返回)>>
    Jeff Wu: His job has nothing to do with HQ.
    Cathy Hsieh: Can I ask what project it is...?
    Wayne Zheng: Sorry, that is classified.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰低頭)>>
    Wayne Zheng: You only need to know that Mr. Liao is well and very busy.;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐低頭返回)>>
<<#EndIf>>
Wayne Zheng: I will tell you a bit more later, Jeff.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰低頭返回)>>
Jeff Wu: Ah, okay...;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後返回)>>
Cathy Hsieh: ...What about us?
Quentin Qiu: Right! We are in the same office. We deserve to know.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後)>>
Wayne Zheng: The rest of you, back to work. Go.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰返回)>>;<<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側坐低頭)>>;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺看後返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: Come here for a second, Jason.;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回)>>;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背坐右看返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 阿緯解釋執行長
body: Wayne Zheng: ...;<> Wayne Zheng: I'll be straightforward with you, Jason. Wayne Zheng: I need you to come with me. We're meeting with the CEO.;<> Frances Cheng(c): Yuna was right... <> <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What is the meeting about? // ->What do you need me for?;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> //if沒解開廖哥事件 <<#If($InspectWhoTakeLiau=-1)>> Wayne Zheng: ...I have found out what's going on with Mr. Liao. Wayne Zheng: He's working for a member of the board, who is now summoning him to HQ. Thought: The board of directors? That escalated quickly... Wayne Zheng: Remember I said I had a theory yesterday?;<> Wayne Zheng: So far, the theory looks very solid. Wayne Zheng: Some members of the board wants to keep Silencio running! Wayne Zheng: They must be counting on us to take in more contributors.;<> Wayne Zheng: As long as our flop farms are taking in more people... Wayne Zheng: That would be an effective remedy for social issues such as widespread unemployment. Wayne Zheng: Consequently, Vision will gain more political influence. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I see. // ->What's Mr. Liao's role in this? Wayne Zheng: A board member has been allocating us extra funding, in the custody of Mr. Liao. Wayne Zheng: He's supposed to recruit more contributors with this money. Wayne Zheng: However, he spent it on the benefits and subsidies of existing contracts. Wayne Zheng: That made some directors very unhappy. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: What's happening right now is actually in our favor. Wayne Zheng: If we can establish communication, there's a chance to take Mr. Liao back and save Silencio. <<#GoTo(@篩選版開始說明和董事見面細節)>> <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: About what happened yesterday, I have made some progress.;<> Thought: He's talking about Mr. Liao secretly working for the board. <<@篩選版開始說明和董事見面細節>> Wayne Zheng: Through the CEO, I have made contact with directors in favor of keeping Silencio running. Wayne Zheng: Although I don't know which directors they are yet...;<> Wayne Zheng: Mr. Yan will see me later today. By then we will find out more. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is that good or bad news? Wayne Zheng: It's an opportunity. Although for me personally, it could go either way. ->That was quick. Wayne Zheng: I'm surprised, too. Normally this should take a few days. Wayne Zheng: But anyway... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Now I have a chance to pitch my ideas to them in person.;<> Wayne Zheng: If I manage to convince them, Silencio will get much more funding. Wayne Zheng: That should help to address the differences between us and Ops!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->So, what do you need me for? //if剛剛有選為什麼要找我一起去 <<#If($DLStateFloat=0)>> Wayne Zheng: Oh, sorry, I forgot to answer your question. <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: I asked to bring a colleague along.;<> Wayne Zheng: I thought it would be beneficial to have a fresh perspective. Wayne Zheng: When the meeting is done, we can compare notes and opinions.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I see. // ->Why me? Wayne Zheng: I'm trying to keep this within a small circle. So it's either you or Tyler. Wayne Zheng: Tyler is occupied, so... <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'm only your Plan B? Wayne Zheng: No! There's no preference really.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Huh, really? Wayne Zheng: I mean it! Swear! ->Haha, no worries, I don't mind. Wayne Zheng: Were you testing me? Wayne Zheng: Gimme some trust, man! ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> ->Roger. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I'll do what I can to play support. Wayne Zheng: Thank you.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: OK, let's go. <<#End>>

title: 篩選路線_見執行長
body: //glitch消失 Thought: That guy over there is the agent from yesterday.;<> Shane Yan: Allow me to introduce. This gentleman is Mr. Logan Chu, special agent directly answering to the board.;<> Wayne Zheng: Um, I thought we would be meeting with directors in person.;<> Shane Yan: Ha, don't flatter yourself. The board is too busy for something like this.;<> Wayne Zheng: I—;<> Shane Yan: Mr. Chu is the appointed representative of a director. Thought: Clearly, he doesn't want to disclose the director's name... Shane Yan: The director likes your work, Wayne!;<> Wayne Zheng: I'm humbled. Thanks.;<> Shane Yan: His original aid wasn't very smart. It's great that you offered to take over. Thought: That must refer to Mr. Liao. Shane Yan: This meeting today says a lot about how much he'd like to work with you.;<> Wayne Zheng: Sure. May I know who this director is?;<> Shane Yan: Wayne, oh Wayne.;<> Shane Yan: You are playing with fire. Shane Yan: You haven't been burned yet. Chalk it up to sheer luck. Shane Yan: If you keep pushing your luck, though, things could take a nasty turn any moment. Shane Yan: Am I clear?;<> Wayne Zheng: ...;<> Wayne Zheng: ...I see.;<> Logan Chu: Let's begin. Shane Yan: Yes, sir. Please.;<>;<>;<> Thought: "Sir"? This agent outranks the CEO? Frances Cheng(c): An appointed representative wields the same power as a director. Watch your tongue, J. <> Logan Chu: Wayne Zheng, is it?;<> Wayne Zheng: Yes.;<>;<> Logan Chu: Tell me what you think of flop farms. Wayne Zheng: They are the cornerstone of modern society, as well as the last failsafe. Logan Chu: Elaborate. Wayne Zheng: The universal reliance on artificial intelligence demands a steady supply of computational power. It also reduces the need for human labor on a large scale.;<> Wayne Zheng: Flop farms generate computational power, and provides for the unemployed population. Essentially, the world as we know can't sustain without it. Logan Chu: Wrong. Logan Chu: Only a fraction of the world can't sustain without it.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Pardon me, sir. The unemployed account for 35% of the overall population... Wayne Zheng: They are hardly "a fraction". Logan Chu: First.;<> Logan Chu: This is not a discussion. Know your place. Logan Chu: Second. Logan Chu: The effective population is not a simple head count. Include economic contribution in your math. Logan Chu: What you call "35% of the overall population"... Logan Chu: They contribute nothing to society.;<> Logan Chu: In that sense, they account for 0%.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: ...;<> Logan Chu: This farm is an incinerator. It collects trash and burns it. Logan Chu: Think of it as one of those waste-to-energy power plants. It extracts some value out of the worthless. Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: I beg to differ...;<>;<> Thought: The agent is sizing Wayne up. Wayne Zheng: Flop farming is a way of facilitating transition.;<> Wayne Zheng: The fourth industrial revolution has created equal parts problems and solutions. Flop farming offers equilibrium, for now. Wayne Zheng: Those made unemployed by AI are now able to sustain their lives, barely, by contributing flops.;<> Wayne Zheng: The pay is not much, but better than nothing. Wayne Zheng: This is far from an ideal solution. However, it's a powerful argument that technology could change the world for the better.;<> Wayne Zheng: We should rely on flop farming while it's still working, while searching for the next step. Wayne Zheng: Eventually, we will find a solution that benefits every member of society and make the world a better place. Wayne Zheng: ... Logan Chu: ...;<>;<> Logan Chu: Haha...;<> Logan Chu: Every member of society? Don't tell me you're serious.;<> Logan Chu: Universal basic income? Wayne Zheng: That is one possible solution. Logan Chu: Ridiculous. Logan Chu: You still have these naïve ideas, after so many years in this industry?;<> Thought: I see he's not convinced. Wayne must have, too. Logan Chu: Can't believe you're saying it with a straight face... Wayne Zheng: Please don't get me wrong. I mean—;<>;<> Logan Chu: You have passed.;<> Thought: Passed what...?;<>;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: I have passed...what? Logan Chu: My boss told me to give you a thorough test. Logan Chu: You know what Silencio means to him, don't you? Wayne Zheng: I do. Providing for the unemployed population and creating political influence...;<> Logan Chu: Correct, for the short term. Logan Chu: The ultimate plan is to market Vision as the savior of this world. Wayne Zheng: ...The savior? Logan Chu: People don't care about the unemployment rate as much as you think.;<> Logan Chu: A powerful corporation that has an answer to every problem, though, is a very different story. Logan Chu: Once recognized as the savior, Vision have significant control over this country. No more competition. Money will come to us. Logan Chu: Sunrise is an oversized mafia. Growell? A pest leeching on the government.;<> Logan Chu: Vision intends to outplay them once and for all. We will kill the competition. Logan Chu: To this end, we don't need a good manager who can make the balance sheets look pretty. That would be backward thinking.;<> Logan Chu: We need an idealist, a poster child, someone who can go out there and win hearts.;<> Logan Chu: Someone who seriously believes Vision is the savior. If you can fool yourself, you can fool everybody. Logan Chu: And this someone is you.;<> Logan Chu: You will be the first step of the plan, putting Silencio out there as a model farm.;<> Logan Chu: A great institution that strives to provide more for the disadvantaged.;<> Logan Chu: Let's not get ahead of ourselves. Back to the pressing issue. Wayne Zheng: I'm not fooling myself. I really do believe—;<> Logan Chu: Stop.;<>;<> Logan Chu: Save it for them. I'm not interested.;<> Wayne Zheng: I— Wayne Zheng: I see.;<> Logan Chu: Good. Now you have passed my test.;<> Logan Chu: Next, we can discuss how to keep this farm running. Wayne Zheng: That I do have a plan.;<> Logan Chu: Tell me about it. Wayne Zheng: There will soon be a board meeting regarding the fate of Silencio. They will need a full farm assessment report.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Normally this report should be made by the farm manager. Given Ms. Yeh's situation… Logan Chu: She is not available. Do go on. Wayne Zheng: I can make the report as the Head of Screening, highlighting the farm's value beyond revenue and profit.;<> Wayne Zheng: Procedure-wise, this can be a bit problematic, although... Logan Chu: We can use it to convince swaying directors. Wayne Zheng: Indeed.;<> Logan Chu: ...;<> Logan Chu: That is a doable plan. Logan Chu: Provided you can finish up the report within today. Wayne Zheng: Within today!? But—;<>;<> Logan Chu: Since you brought it to the table, I take it that you are already somewhat prepared.;<> Wayne Zheng: That is correct. However—;<>;<> Logan Chu: Within today. Wayne Zheng: ...Yes, sir.;<> Logan Chu: We will pitch the idea to each director before the meeting.;<>;<> Logan Chu: Make sure you have a convincing report. Leave the rest to us. Logan Chu: We have a deal, then. Any other questions? Wayne Zheng: About George Liao. Logan Chu: Relax. He's on his way home, if not there already. Wayne Zheng: In that case... Wayne Zheng: ...;<>;<> Logan Chu: Speak. Wayne Zheng: If we manage to keep Silencio, I want to be the new farm manager.;<> Wayne Zheng: I will stop the strife between Screening and Ops, so that Silencio will operate at optimal efficiency. Shane Yan: Ambitious young man. Good.;<>;<> Logan Chu: That can be arranged. As I have said, we need you as the poster child. Wayne Zheng: This is not about ambition. I need the power to get things done. Thought: Chu obviously doesn't believe him. Shane Yan: Haha!;<> Shane Yan: Don't worry about it. Every young man starts off shy. Shane Yan: You will have a bright future.;<> Wayne Zheng: ...;<> Wayne Zheng: Also, I need to establish direct contact with you. Logan Chu: No need. We will not meet again, not in a long time. Logan Chu: Submit your report to Mr. CEO here. Wayne Zheng: No, sir. This is for future demands that I may have to make from time to time. Logan Chu: ...;<> Logan Chu: Demands, for what? Wayne Zheng: Simply put, for resources to upgrade and service the Cellar.;<> Logan Chu: What made you think you're in a position to make demands? Thought: His attitude took a cold turn, although I can't tell if he's offended...;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: I, I—;<> Wayne Zheng: I believe that is absolutely necessary to keep Silencio running.;<> Logan Chu: Focus on your report. If Silencio is shut down, you won't need any resources. Understand? Wayne Zheng: Yes, sir.;<> Logan Chu: That seals our deal. Logan Chu: I should be on my way now, Mr. Yan.;<>;<> Shane Yan: Back to HQ?;<> Logan Chu: Yes. Shane Yan: Please take the direct elevator. Your flight is ready at the roof helipad. Logan Chu: Thank you.;<> Logan Chu: Aren't you going with me? Shane Yan: I have some trivial matters to discuss with them.;<> Logan Chu: I see. <>;<>;<> //特勤走掉 <<#End>>

title: 篩選路線_回辦公室
body: //回辦公室後看到廖哥在座位上 Jeff Wu: Oh hi, Jason.;<>;<> Quentin Qiu: Hey, Jayster!;<>;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: Mr. Liao is back!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah, I know. ->Great. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jeff Wu: I'm surprised that he did what he did.;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: He's just trying to do some good, Jeff. Jeff Wu: I can tell that! Tyler Cao: Wayne told us about the deal with the CEO and the director.;<>;<>;<>;<> Quentin Qiu: Does that mean Silencio is saved?;<> Cathy Hsieh: Not necessarily. Wayne must present a report that convinces the board.;<> Quentin Qiu: What's so hard about that? We have everything at the ready.;<> Tyler Cao: It's hard because they want the report within today.;<>;<>;<>;<> Quentin Qiu: Ugh, crazy deadline.;<> <> Wayne Zheng: I think I can beat it.;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: Wayne!;<>;<>;<> Quentin Qiu: A round of applause for the hero!;<> Wayne Zheng: Haha, no need for that.;<> Wayne Zheng: I trust you all know what's going on. This is our make-or-break moment. Wayne Zheng: I need everyone's support.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: QQ, convert facility data feed into spreadsheets. Quentin Qiu: Roger. Wayne Zheng: Cathy, give me a complete list of all contributors in the past three years.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Not a problem.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Mr. Liao—;<>;<>;<>;<> George Liao: All contracts and human resource records are already organized.;<>;<> George Liao: Working on the HR expenditure sheet. Will be ready soon. Wayne Zheng: Good.;<> Tyler Cao: What about me?;<>;<>;<> Jeff Wu: And me?;<>;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Keep doing your everyday work for now. I may need you later. Jeff Wu: Roger. Wayne Zheng: Jason, come with me for a moment... <> Justin Wu: WAYNE ZHENG!;<> Wayne Zheng: Justin?;<> Wayne Zheng: Wait, you...;<> Justin Wu: WHAT THE FUCK HAVE YOU DONE!?;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Calm down.;<> Justin Wu: Do you have any idea how many people will die if we keep Silencio running?;<> Justin Wu: All because of your ignorance! You have blood on your hands!;<> Wayne Zheng: I don't intend to have anyone killed. Actually, I'm working on—;<> Justin Wu: Working on what? There is no solution! The Cellar is done for! How the hell can I make you understand!;<> Wayne Zheng: If I can convince the board to keep Silencio, they will give enough funding to overhaul the Cellar.;<> Justin Wu: Overhaul? How the hell do you overhaul a totaled car? You can't! It goes to the trash yard!;<> Wayne Zheng: You're exaggerating. I have done my research—;<> Justin Wu: Shut the hell up.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: ...;<> Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: You always have this problem... Justin Wu: Taking a quick look and coming up with a judgment without really knowing shit.;<> Justin Wu: Do you have any idea at all how big the Cellar is? How many advanced technologies are mingled together to create it?;<> Justin Wu: How dare you say you have done research when you never had one day's professional training? Wayne Zheng: Everyone is entitled to a judgment on anything. It doesn't have to be 100% accurate—;<>;<> Justin Wu: So what? Do you believe your judgement is more accurate than mine? Wayne Zheng: I don't mean that—;<> Justin Wu: THEN WHAT THE HELL DO YOU MEAN!?;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: I know you're the professional, and I respect you for that— Justin Wu: Then listen to the professional. Shut down this farm. Don't make things any worse!;<> Wayne Zheng: But you never showed me any respect.;<> Wayne Zheng: You throw my opinions on the ground and trod on them, forcing me to accept yours.;<> Wayne Zheng: Your judgment may be technically accurate, but I refuse to listen, because you never bothered to understand what it is that I need.;<> Wayne Zheng: You have no idea what my concern is, nor do you care. How can I believe you have the right answer when you don't even know what the question is?;<> Wayne Zheng: I'd agree with you, if shutting down this farm doesn't have any negative consequences. Wayne Zheng: But have you realized how many people will lose their last income?;<> Wayne Zheng: And I'm not only talking about contributors. Farm workers, too!;<> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I see. This is your concern. Wayne Zheng: What? Justin Wu: You're right. I never bothered to understand your concerns.;<> Justin Wu: All this talk about juicers and their last straw... Justin Wu: But deep down inside, what you really care about is your team. They will lose employment. Justin Wu: Where will they go, if you agree to shut the farm down? Won't they hate you for it, huh?;<>;<> Justin Wu: I know you all too well. Going out of your way to be the nice guy, always. Justin Wu: You're doing this because you don't want to feel guilty, to be hated by your colleagues.;<> Justin Wu: You're scared by the idea of it, so much so that you don't have the guts to do the right thing. Justin Wu: I see that providing for the poor is only an excuse. Justin Wu: You're trying so hard not to become the bad guy.;<>;<> Justin Wu: In the process, you're willing to sacrifice lives. Justin Wu: Pathetic. Wayne Zheng: ...;<>;<> Justin Wu: ...;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Are you done yet?;<> Justin Wu: No. It's the same with Cathy.;<> Justin Wu: I've been wondering why you tried so hard to send her over to Ops for training.;<>;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: JUSTIN WU!;<> Justin Wu: Now I see. It was part of your plan to help your own people. Wayne Zheng: Enough!;<> Justin Wu: ... Wayne Zheng: You're right. I do care about my people. Wayne Zheng: On the other hand, I care about the contributors, too, including those to come.;<> Wayne Zheng: I get it that you don't believe the Cellar can be salvaged, and being the professional, you're probably right. Wayne Zheng: The thing is, we don't know for sure without at least trying. If you want to be the quitter, I'll have to try double hard.;<> Wayne Zheng: If we both give up, that would be pathetic. Wayne Zheng: This is what I believe.;<> Wayne Zheng: Feel free to shout at me, call me names. It won't change my mind. Justin Wu: ...;<> Wayne Zheng: Show yourself out, if your lecture is done. Wayne Zheng: I have a tight deadline to beat.;<> Justin Wu: ... <<#End>> //俊恩往回走等幾秒

title: 說服賴潔
body: <> Jesse Lai: Hey.;<> Jesse Lai: ... Jesse Lai: You're here to lobby me, eh? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. // ->How do you know? Jesse Lai: Your boss sent me a fat stack of stuff. The intention is pretty obvious. <<#EndSimple>> ;<> Jesse Lai: ... Jesse Lai: *Sigh* Jesse Lai: Do you know why your boss is reaching out to me? <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He needs data from Ops. Jesse Lai: That he does, but it's not the real point. ->He needs your talent. Jesse Lai: Nice choice of words.;<> Jesse Lai: Ha, he does have a good team. Jesse Lai: Yep, he needs my talents. However...;<> ->No idea. Jesse Lai: Haha! Honest enough.;<> Jesse Lai: Let me tell you. <> <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: He needs a replacement for Justin. Thought: Replacement...? Jesse Lai: That is probably not the most appropriate word. Let's say, successor.;<> Jesse Lai: Suppose he becomes the farm manager, he still needs a capable Ops team. Jesse Lai: I guess if Wayne is promoted, Justin will quit. Jesse Lai: He must have tried to convince Justin, no?;<> Thought: Ah, that is why Wayne tolerated Justin back in the Screening office... <<#Simple(8)>> ->He did ask Justin to join his cause. ->He just told me to get data from you. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Honestly, I don't like the way he talks.;<> Jesse Lai: Always trying to sugarcoat everything, never saying what he wants outright. Jesse Lai: He wants everyone, especially those working for him, to see him as a simple, nice guy.;<> <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You don't know that. Jesse Lai: Point proven. Feeling compelled to speak for the nice guy, eh? <<#Simple(8)>> ->I don't think so. ->I'm not speaking for him. <> Jesse Lai: Hey, aren't you supposed to be lobbying me?;<> Jesse Lai: Starting an argument won't get you anywhere. Thought: ...;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I decline to comment. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Hmph. Jesse Lai: You know what? I—;<> <> Paxton Luo: Jason Dai!? Paxton Luo: How dare you come here!?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Can't I be here? Paxton Luo: You're with Screening. Thought: I can tell he hates me for real. ->Hey, Packs. Paxton Luo: Don't you Packs me! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: Justin already told us. Screening wants to grab the whole farm and oust us!;<> Jesse Lai: That's not what he said.;<>;<> Paxton Luo: That's what he meant! Paxton Luo: Can't you just stop fooling around and leave this to us professionals?;<> <> <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Watch your attitude.;<> Jesse Lai: Calm down, you guys.;<> Paxton Luo: I don't need to. Now I see everything.;<> Paxton Luo: These people live in their little bubble. They don't know shit about real life. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->As if you know anything about Screening.;<> Paxton Luo: Oh, we know everything.;<> Paxton Luo: A bunch of deplorable dipshits sending juicers here to die, so that they get great performance reviews. <<@胖胖說篩選組小人>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Don't talk about what you don't know. Paxton Luo: The hell did you say!? <<@胖胖跟主角吵起來被賴潔制止>> Jesse Lai: I said enough! You both!;<> Jesse Lai: Paxton. I'm talking about serious business with Jason. Jesse Lai: Give us a minute. Paxton Luo: ...;<> Paxton Luo: Damn... <> Jesse Lai: ...;<> <> <<#End>> ->They are only trying to help more people. It has nothing to do with performance review. Paxton Luo: Help more people? By sending them down here for torture? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What you call "torture" is the last straw for a whole lot of people. Paxton Luo: What?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->They need this line of income to feed themselves and their families. ->You people have never really talked to what you call "juicers". You don't know anything about them. <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: I... Paxton Luo: ...;<> <<#GoTo(@跟胖胖提篩選組要跟過世算勞家屬談)>> ->Yeah, you're the good guys, everyone else is dipshit. Paxton Luo: Damn right. <<#GoTo(@胖胖跟主角吵起來被賴潔制止)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->You're not wrong, but Wayne is trying to correct this issue. Paxton Luo: Try what?;<> Paxton Luo: They're just a bunch of deplorable dipshits sending juicers here to die, so that they get great performance reviews. <<#GoTo(@胖胖說篩選組小人)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->The Screening staff are trying their best to understand the situation down here. Paxton Luo: No need.;<> Paxton Luo: We have done that for you.;<> Paxton Luo: We know everything about the Cellar. Just ask us. Don't come up with half-baked ideas. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->How am I supposed to cooperate with you, with you being arrogant like that? <> <<@指責胖胖高傲態度環節>> Paxton Luo: I'm not arrogant. This is called a professional opinion.;<> Jesse Lai: I'm not sure about that. Sounds pretty arrogant to me.;<> Paxton Luo: Whose side are you on?;<> Jesse Lai: The sensible side.;<> Paxton Luo: You call them sensible? All the big talk without any responsibility? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Who are you to talk about responsibility? Have you ever interacted with any jucier, even one? Paxton Luo: I— <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Every time someone dies, it's Screening who deals with their family. <<@跟胖胖提篩選組要跟過世算勞家屬談>> Paxton Luo: ... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->The work of Screening is not a walk in the park. Don't you see? ->The Screening staff are not a bunch of selfish dipshits. You can trust me on this. Paxton Luo: ...;<> <> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Running away when you can't win, huh? Pathetic.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> ->You have not. So, put away your self-righteous face and listen.;<> Paxton Luo: WHAT!? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I said put away your self-righteous face and listen. <<#GoTo(@胖胖跟主角吵起來被賴潔制止)>> ->Screening handles the ass end of the job. They deal with the families of dead juicers. <<#GoTo(@跟胖胖提篩選組要跟過世算勞家屬談)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->The Screening team has its own responsibilities. Paxton Luo: Is that so? Paxton Luo: They're just a bunch of deplorable dipshits sending juicers here to die, so that they get great performance reviews. <<#GoTo(@胖胖說篩選組小人)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Look at yourself in the mirror, self-righteous bastard.;<> Paxton Luo: The hell did you say!? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I said you're ignorant and arrogant, in case you don't speak English.;<> Paxton Luo: Who the hell do you think you are? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm not are frustrated stupid ass like you. Paxton Luo: Motherf—! <<#GoTo(@胖胖跟主角吵起來被賴潔制止)>> ->Your arrogance is counterproductive in this conversation. <<#GoTo(@指責胖胖高傲態度環節)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I said your arrogance is making it incredibly hard to communicate. <<#GoTo(@指責胖胖高傲態度環節)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> //羅龐安開始離開一陣子以後

title: 遇到吳俊恩
body: Thought: Oh, it's Justin... Thought: This is not the best timing...;<> Justin Wu: Jason? <> <> <<@在安裝發送走廊與俊恩尷尬相見>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Are you OK? Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: Not exactly. Justin Wu: Can I help you?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No, just checking on you. ->You really don't want to work with Wayne? Justin Wu: ... <<#EndSimple>> ->I'm sorry. Justin Wu: What are you sorry for? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm sorry that Wayne won the upper hand. Justin Wu: The upper hand? Justin Wu: The way I see it, we both failed.;<> Justin Wu: I failed to stop this farm from hurting and killing more people. Justin Wu: He's gonna fail, too. This farm won't be helping anyone like he thought. Justin Wu: He just refuses to see reality.;<> ->I have no idea. Justin Wu: ... ->Sorry for seeing you lose control. Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: The apology is all mine. I should have got a grip. Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: However, I don't regret anything I said.;<> <<#EndSimple>> ->You were seriously losing it back there. ($DLStateFloat);//選過消失 ->Justin. ($DLStateFloat);//選過消失 <> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: Bye. <<#Simple(3)>> ->Wait. Justin Wu: ... <<#GoTo(@在安裝發送走廊與俊恩尷尬相見)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: Jason, I...;<> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: ...Why don't you people understand? Justin Wu: I just don't get it. Justin Wu: You tell me now. How could Wayne be so ignorant and arrogant at the same time? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He did spend a lot of time doing research. Justin Wu: That I believe. But it doesn't change anything. Justin Wu: He can do as much research as he wants, a layman is still a layman. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He did consult the professionals. Justin Wu: Who would that be?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I don't know. ->I can't tell you. Justin Wu: Someone in Ops, it has to be! Justin Wu: Damn...;<> Thought: He seems frustrated... <<#GoTo(@進入反問安裝發送俊嗯可以信啊緯沒)>> ->Jesse.;<> <<#GoTo(@告訴俊嗯賴潔幫阿緯很久拉拉拉)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->You have a point. Justin Wu: Then why do you still refuse to listen!?;<> <<#EndSimple>> ->He did consult Jesse.;<> <> <<@告訴俊嗯賴潔幫阿緯很久拉拉拉>> Justin Wu: Jesse!? Justin Wu: She's...;<> Thought: He's surprised, frustrated, and furious at the same time. Thought: Maybe a little bit defeated, too. <<@進入反問安裝發送俊嗯可以信啊緯沒>> Justin Wu: No wonder...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Would you trust Wayne now? <<#If($ToldLaiJieHelpSelection=true)>> Justin Wu: Now I'm having trouble trusting Jesse.;<> Thought: Maybe I shouldn't have told him about Jesse... <> <<#EndIf>> Justin Wu: Let me guess. He told you that he had to bypass me, because I refuse to communicate. <<#GoTo(@俊嗯發表對於溝通要建立在專業上亞)>> ->Because you refuse to communicate. Justin Wu: The same old excuse. <<@俊嗯發表對於溝通要建立在專業上亞>> Justin Wu: Communication doesn't solve all problems. And there is a cost.;<> Justin Wu: Instead of wasting time on ineffective communications, I'd do something that matters. Justin Wu: I'm not against communications, provided they're based on professionalism. Justin Wu: On the other hand, Wayne keeps doubting me. Every single thing takes hours of explanation.;<> Justin Wu: What's the point in that? Thought: I kinda agree with him... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: I've had enough. All of you, all the same...;<> Justin Wu: Stupid idealists refusing to face reality. Justin Wu: They say the road to hell is paved with good intentions.;<> Justin Wu: Now I know what they mean. Good intentions, and ignorance. Justin Wu: You're killing people without being aware of it.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Look at you, pathetic. Justin Wu: You know who's really pathetic? The juicers to be killed by your "kindness". ->Keep telling yourself that. Justin Wu: ... ->I know you're frustrated, Justin. Justin Wu: ... <<#Simple(8)>> ->But self-pity will not make the situation any better. Justin Wu: Can the situation be any better? Justin Wu: Wayne has won, hasn't he? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He still wants to work with you. Justin Wu: No, he wants to control me. <<#Simple(8)>> ->He needs your talent and professionalism. <<#GoTo(@跟俊恩說如果你幫鄭緯你怕的事情可以避免)>> ->Do you really think he is that kind of person? Justin Wu: ...I know he is not. <<#GoTo(@跟俊恩說如果你幫鄭緯你怕的事情可以避免)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: ... ->I don't think there is win or lose. Justin Wu: No... Justin Wu: Maybe he didn't win, but I definitely lost. Justin Wu: Now I must watch this farm implode, one day at a time. <<#Simple(8)>> ->It doesn't have to be that way, if you could give Wayne the support he needs. <<@跟俊恩說如果你幫鄭緯你怕的事情可以避免>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I don't know. I don't think it matters.;<> Justin Wu: Shutting this place down is the only right way out. Justin Wu: Even if I do work with him, the bulk of my job would be to remind him that over and over again.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->In that case, it's kinda pointless. Justin Wu: Yeah. ->Have you ever heard about his plan? Justin Wu: ...No. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I think you should spend more time on getting to know him. Justin Wu: I've spent more time than he deserves. Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: ...Let's not talk about this anymore. That's it for now. Thought: ...;<> ->But he's always got time for you, no?;<>;//只有這裡是正解，波姐所棟話 Justin Wu: I— Justin Wu: I need to think about it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: ... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: And, Jason. Justin Wu: Sorry, I was really mean just now. Justin Wu: ... ->You really think Wayne will ruin this farm? Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: He will try to avoid it, but whatever he tries will fail. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Because he need someone like you for support. <<#GoTo(@跟俊恩說如果你幫鄭緯你怕的事情可以避免)>> ->You're being unreasonably pessimistic. Justin Wu: Whatever. I don't care anymore. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Still, you've got to show people minimum respect. Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: You're right. Sorry. Justin Wu: I was too mean. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: I must go now. See you.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>>

title: 篩選:談失敗以後芳通話
body:
Frances Cheng(c): This is our last chance and we blew it...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Sorry.
    Frances Cheng(c): Never mind.
->How's Lawrence doing?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng(c): He's session was rather smooth.
Frances Cheng(c): At least we have one shot.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->What now?
    //
->Will you tell Situ?
    Frances Cheng(c): Hm, I will update them first.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>

Frances Cheng(c): ...Now all we can do is to wait for the signing session.
Frances Cheng(c): Hm?
Frances Cheng(c): Someone' calling you. Let me patch them in.
//if篩選(只可能是篩選才會失敗)
<<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>>
    Wayne Zheng(c): Hello? Jason?
    Thought: He sounds anxious.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->The very same.
    ->What's up?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Wayne Zheng(c): Sorry for this abrupt call. There's something urgent that I need your help.
    Wayne Zheng(c): Let's meet up in person.
    Wayne Zheng(c): Hmm...
    Wayne Zheng(c): Wait for me at your desk in the Screening office. I'll see you there.
    Wayne Zheng(c): That's it. See you later.
    <<CloseCommunicator()>>
    Thought: He hung up...
    Frances Cheng(c): Meet with Wayne and see what he needs, J.
<<#EndIf>>
Frances Cheng(c): Signing won't start in a while, and Ms. Situ is still out there. We have time.
Thought: ...It's not like I have a choice.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 說服謝采欣
body:
//跟采欣


Cathy Hsieh: Jayster...?
Cathy Hsieh: No, Jason, what's up?;<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背坐摸頭)>>
Cathy Hsieh: Sorry, I was in QQ mode just now.
<<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_背坐摸頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->No worries. Jayster is as good a name as any. Haha.
    Cathy Hsieh: Um...
->Have you got a minute?
    Cathy Hsieh: Yes.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Thought: He looks a bit grim.
Cathy Hsieh: Did Justin send you?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->You know?
    Cathy Hsieh: I guessed.
->Yes.
    Cathy Hsieh: I see...
<<#EndSimple>>
Cathy Hsieh: ...Shall we find a quiet corner, then?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah.
    //
->You know what I'm about to say?
    Cathy Hsieh: More or less.
<<#EndSimple>>
Cathy Hsieh: Let's go to the break room.
Quentin Qiu: Eh? Jayster?;<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看)>>
Quentin Qiu: What are you doing here?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Nothing, just checking on you guys.
    Quentin Qiu: Eh...?
->I'm looking for Cathy.
    Quentin Qiu: For what?
    Cathy Hsieh: Don't be nosy, QQ.
    Quentin Qiu: Oh?
<<#EndSimple>>
Cathy Hsieh: Let's go, Jason.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看返回)>>
<<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_側坐後躺返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 胖胖指引路
tags: 這裡情境改了，可能側站講話系列動畫不適合
body: Thought: Is that...? Thought: ...Paxton? Paxton Luo: Wow!?;<>;<> Paxton Luo: J-Jason Dai? Thought: Why so surprised? <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Hey, Packs.;<> Paxton Luo: ...What's up? Thought: He's not quite used to being called Packs by me. ->Hi, Paxton. Paxton Luo: Yeah, what's up? ->What are you doing here? Paxton Luo: Having some snacks! Thought: Why here...? Paxton Luo: What you want? <<#EndSimple>> <> <> <<@問胖胖俊恩在哪裡時間>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Snacks? Why here? ($DLStateFloat5) <> Paxton Luo: I—;<> Paxton Luo: Because of reasons. Paxton Luo: What are you doing here?;<> <<#GoTo(@問胖胖俊恩在哪裡時間)>> ->I'm looking for Justin. Is he here? Paxton Luo: ... Paxton Luo: What do you want him for? Paxton Luo: You should leave him alone for a while. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I must talk to him. ->Trust me. He doesn't want to talk. <<#EndSimple>> <<@胖胖擔心找俊恩結果不好>> Paxton Luo: ... Paxton Luo: What are you gonna say, if you see him? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'll try to convince him to work with Wayne. <<@跟胖胖說想說服俊恩跟鄭緯合作>> Paxton Luo: ...Are you sure? <<#Simple(8)>> ->You think he'd be mad? // ->Of course I'm sure. Paxton Luo: He's not in the talking mood right now. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: Honestly, I don't know how he will respond.;<> Paxton Luo: ... Paxton Luo: Let me ask you something.;<> Paxton Luo: Why do you want to convince him? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because I believe that's in everyone's best interest. ->Because he's wrong. Paxton Luo: Then I'd say better not go. Paxton Luo: The last thing he needs is someone to tell him that he's wrong. <<#Simple(8)>> ->A lot of people's future depend on this. Paxton Luo: I know. Still, he's not able to think straight at the moment. ->What do you think I should do? Paxton Luo: Whatever, as long as you don't point fingers. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: ... Paxton Luo: I can tell you where he is, although... ->Because I think it's a shame. Paxton Luo: A shame? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He and Wayne share essentially the same vision. Paxton Luo: But their approaches can't be more different. ->He used to be a good friend of Wayne's. Paxton Luo: Friend? Paxton Luo: Haha... ->If Wayne makes any bad decision in his absence, the fault may as well be his. Paxton Luo: You're truly a saint, aren't ya? <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: Whatever you do, just don't make him feel any worse. Please. Paxton Luo: As a friend, I don't want to see him tortured by this mess. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure, I see. Paxton Luo: Thank you. ->He's in charge. If there's any torture, it should be first and foremost his. ->No can do. Reality stinks. Paxton Luo: ... Paxton Luo: Whatever you do, it's your call. <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: Justin is outside. Go find him if you've made up your mind. Paxton Luo: I wanted to talk to him myself, although... Paxton Luo: I could make the situation even worse. Paxton Luo: I'm counting on your, Jason... <<#End>> ->Just wanna see how he's doing. Paxton Luo: ... Paxton Luo: You should leave him alone, if that's the best reason you can manage. Paxton Luo: Right now he needs some alone time. Paxton Luo: Don't bother, unless you have real business. <<#Simple(6)>> ->I need to talk to him about working with Wayne. <<#GoTo(@跟胖胖說想說服俊恩跟鄭緯合作)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: Take that advice from me. <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Sorry for what happened back there. I didn't want to start a fight. Paxton Luo: ... Paxton Luo: *Sigh*;<> Paxton Luo: I should apologize. Paxton Luo: I started it first. Lost control, said a bunch of crap that I shouldn't have said. Paxton Luo: Sorry, Jason.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I don't mind, Packs. Paxton Luo: Haha... Paxton Luo: Great. //if剛剛叫他綽號 <<#If($DLStateFloat=1)>> Thought: Now he's seeing me as a closer friend. <<#EndIf>> ->Not a big deal, Paxton. Paxton Luo: Yeah. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: ... Paxton Luo: But you know, right...? Paxton Luo: This is a moment of total defeat for the entire Ops. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->That is the problem I'm trying to resolve. <> Paxton Luo: I knew it... ->I know, and I'm sorry. Paxton Luo: ... <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: Looking for Justin, right? You can be honest with me. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. // ->What? I didn't know he's here. //IF剛剛說是來解決問題 <<#If($DLStateFloat2=1)>> Paxton Luo: Didn't you say you're here to resolve the problem? <<#EndIf>> Paxton Luo: It's OK. You can be honest with me. Paxton Luo: I won't hold you back. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. // ->I'm really not looking for him. Paxton Luo: ... Paxton Luo: Sorry, my mistake. <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@胖胖擔心找俊恩結果不好)>> <<#EndSimple>>

title: 到頂樓遇到吳俊恩
body: //離吳俊恩有段距離他突然搭話 Justin Wu: It's you, huh...;<> Justin Wu: What are you here for?;<> <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You should work with Wayne.;<> Justin Wu: ... ->I'm worried about you. Justin Wu: Worried about me? Justin Wu: You think I'll jump from here or what?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Will you? Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: Haha...;<> Justin Wu: I'm tougher than that. ->No, just wanted to check on you. Justin Wu: Is that so?;<> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> //if剛剛沒說要說服 <<#If($DLStateFloat=-1)>> Justin Wu: I suppose you want me to work with Wayne. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. <<#GoTo(@開始說服俊恩跟鄭緯合作環節)>> ->What made you think so? Justin Wu: Intuition, and perception. Justin Wu: Am I wrong? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You're right. Justin Wu: Haha... <<#GoTo(@開始說服俊恩跟鄭緯合作環節)>> ->You're wrong. I'm here to check on you, really. Justin Wu: I appreciate that, although right now I need some alone time.;<> Justin Wu: Please leave me alone. Thought: Hey, I can't go back line that! <<#Simple(6)>> ->You really don't want to work with Wayne? Justin Wu: I knew it. You still hope to convince me.;<> Justin Wu: ... <<#GoTo(@開始說服俊恩跟鄭緯合作環節)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: I guess this is it, then...;<> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<@開始說服俊恩跟鄭緯合作環節>> Justin Wu: Wayne wants you to persuade me? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes.;//這個選項之後再兩人合作對談時會反撲 Thought: ...Will that make him happier?;<> Justin Wu: I see. He's not given up yet, huh...;<> Thought: He's smiling. That must mean I said the right thing.;<> ->No, I come of my own accord. Justin Wu: Meaning he's given up...;<> Thought: He's disappointed. Maybe I should have lied. <<#Simple(8)>> ->He still wants to work with you. // ->He didn't give up. You did. Justin Wu: ...Did I? ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: You are aware that I know this farm better than anyone, aren't you?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah, I know. // ->Not necessarily. Justin Wu: Typical Screening thinking... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: This is your...;<> Justin Wu: Fourth day? You've been working here for merely four days. Justin Wu: And you think you can change my mind. This idea itself is insulting. Justin Wu: That suggests you think we're on the same rookie level.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->That is rude. ->You think a rookie is not entitled to an opinion? Justin Wu: Yes. So what? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->So you must take it back. ->So you owe me an apology. Justin Wu: Whatever. I don't care.;<> Justin Wu: If you think at this stage I care about what you people think... Justin Wu: Then you're stupider than I thought.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No wonder you screwed it up. ->You're disappointing. Justin Wu: Now you know. Justin Wu: Leave me alone.;<> Thought: Looks like I've killed the conversation...;<> <<#End>> ->I know you're frustrated. Justin Wu: ... <<#EndSimple>> ->So nothing. Go on. <<#EndSimple>> ->I know how you feel. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: You can't possibly know this farm better than I do. What made you think you can change my mind about shutting it down? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I want to change your mind about Wayne. Justin Wu: The reason being? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He trusts you. Justin Wu: He doesn't. I figured that much out. <<@進入成功說服俊恩再去跟阿緯談談路線>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You're wrong. He said he fully trusts your professional judgment. Justin Wu: Why doesn't he listen to me, then? ->Trusting you doesn't necessarily mean doing everything you tell him to. Justin Wu: What does it mean, then? <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: If he really trusted me, why is he so firmly against me? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He wants you to understand his plan first. Justin Wu: His plan means nothing, because he doesn't know enough! ->He thinks you're making judgments solely from your own perspective. Justin Wu: My own perspective is the professional perspective, the only perspective. <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: The Cellar is beyond repair. The budget we receive is far from enough. That is a fact.;<> Justin Wu: Shutting it down is the only solution. What other perspective could there be? Justin Wu: How could Wayne's plan, whatever it is, matter?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Wayne's concern is that once this farm is shut down, unemployment in this area will soar. ->Too many people are relying on us as the last lifeline. Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: There's nothing we can do about that... Justin Wu: If we take them in, there's always a chance that they could die.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: As the Cellar deteriorates, the death rate will only go up.;<> Justin Wu: You have seen with your own eyes, haven't you? Justin Wu: What revenue we make is far from enough to fix the Cellar. Justin Wu: What could Wayne do, against these hard facts?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He is trying to get more funding from the board. ->The board will provide funding. <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: The board? Why would they? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Some directors want to gain political leverage by soaking up the unemployed population with Silencio. Justin Wu: Political leverage...? ->Some directors want to market Vision as the savior corporation. Silencio is part of their campaign. Justin Wu: ...Savior? <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I see...;<> Justin Wu: I never thought about that... <<#Simple(6)>> ->See? You don't know everything. Justin Wu: I— Justin Wu: You are correct. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Wayne is thinking from that direction, huh...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->For technical issues, he's been seeking Jesse for help. //if還沒跟俊恩說賴潔再幫忙。 <<#If($ToldLaiJieHelpSelection=false)>> Justin Wu: Jesse!? Justin Wu: He is not inventing groundless ideas on the fly... <<#EndIf>> <<#If($ToldLaiJieHelpSelection=true)>> Justin Wu: I know. You told me. <<#EndIf>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I fully trust Jesse's judgment. If she believes Wayne has a chance... Justin Wu: I'd like to give it a try.;<> //if有先跟俊恩說賴潔有幫阿緯 <<#If($ToldLaiJieHelpSelection=true)>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I said I don't trust Jesse anymore because she's working with Wayne. Justin Wu: I didn't mean it. I take it back. <<#EndIf>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I'm confused, now... Justin Wu: If Wayne has been doing and planning so much...;<> ->He's been working incredibly hard on it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: How come I wasn't aware? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because you didn't trust him. Justin Wu: I never thought he could take such an approach... ->Because you were busy shouting at him instead of listening. Justin Wu: ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#If($ControlGoRest=0)>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I've been thinking about everything you said today. Justin Wu: You said I never cared to hear Wayne's opinions... Justin Wu: But on the other hand, does he care about mine? Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I know better than anyone that he does. He takes everything I say seriously. Justin Wu: Although he chooses to rebuke me in the end... <<#EndIf>> Justin Wu: I thought he's just another idealist idiot.;<> Justin Wu: I could be wrong. Thought: He's starting to sway. Justin Wu: I must talk to him, if he's trying to tackle the problem from that direction... Justin Wu: There are things he should know. Justin Wu: I'm calling him right away. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Now? Justin Wu: Yeah, now. ->What is it that he should know? Justin Wu: You will know soon enough. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Let's move. We don't have much time left. Justin Wu: I must clarify everything before it's too late. Justin Wu: ...Oh, and...;<> Justin Wu: Thank you. Justin Wu: You pointed out my blind spot. I don't know everything, indeed. Justin Wu: And... Justin Wu: Sorry for being so mean. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Don't mention it. ->As long as you come to your senses. // ->You should tell that to Wayne. Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: You're right.;<> Justin Wu: But right now I find that a bit... Justin Wu: Challenging. Justin Wu: ...;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: OK, let's go.;<> Justin Wu: We don't have much time left.;<> <> <<#End>> ->Wayne could save this farm. Justin Wu: He thinks he could.;<> Justin Wu: And he thinks he doesn't need my input. Justin Wu: He hasn't shown me any trust, as a friend or a colleague.;<> <<#GoTo(@進入成功說服俊恩再去跟阿緯談談路線)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Because I see something you fail to see. Justin Wu: Like what? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Wayne's trust in you. Justin Wu: He doesn't trust me. I figured that much out. <<#GoTo(@進入成功說服俊恩再去跟阿緯談談路線)>> ->Wayne's capabilities. Justin Wu: I know he believes he can save this farm.;<> Justin Wu: And he thinks he doesn't need my input. Justin Wu: He hasn't shown me any trust, as a friend or a colleague.;<> <<#GoTo(@進入成功說服俊恩再去跟阿緯談談路線)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>>

title: 進面談大廳有人攔下說話
body:

title: 面談駱思敏2
body: Simone Lo: Name's Simone Lo. Simone Lo: Let's begin. I don't have all day.;<> Thought: A hostile beginning. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Good day. Simone Lo: Whatever. Thought: She can't wait to be done with it. ->Let's start with self instruction. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: I live in the Shithole. Handle toxic waste from your farm for a living.;<> //菌窟的毒品很多是從工業區廢料提取出來的 <> <> <> <> <> <<@第四日面談第一人問題集>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Do you like your job? ($DLStateFloat) <> <> <> Simone Lo: Do I like my job? Thought: She sounds like she's taking offense. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'll take that as a no. Simone Lo: Of course it's a no.;<> ->I don't know. You tell me. Simone Lo: ...;<> Simone Lo: Not at all. ->You might want to adjust your attitude. Simone Lo: Hmph.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: No one should be doing a shitty job like that. Simone Lo: Wait. Does it matter? Whether or not I like my job?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Is there any reason you don't want to talk about it? Simone Lo: ...No. ->The point of this session is to find out who you are and how you're doing. Simone Lo: Oh... <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: That's it? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Is the income from that job enough to feed your family? ->Do you have other sources of income? Simone Lo: I'd rather not answer that. Thought: I can tell she's tensing up... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Why? Simone Lo: Just don't wanna. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->In that case, I will have to disqualify you.;<> <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人你不回答就不能錄取。)>> ->Okay, let's continue to the next question. <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->In that case, I will have to disqualify you.;<> <<@第四日面談第一人你不回答就不能錄取。>> Simone Lo: ...;<> Simone Lo: Damn... Simone Lo: You want to know, huh?;<> Simone Lo: The pay from this shitty job is far from enough to feed the family. Happy now? Simone Lo: I've been looking for other jobs.;<> Simone Lo: But I just can't find any... Simone Lo: That's why I'm here. Understand?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I see. Let's continue to the next question. <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> ->Are you operating any illegal business? Simone Lo: In the Shithole? Is anyone operating a legal business? Simone Lo: Of course I have done illegal work. Nothing too big, though. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I see. Let's continue to the next question. <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> ->Have you conducted anything related to or involving human trafficking? Simone Lo: Huh!?;<> Simone Lo: No way! I'll never—! Thought: She's in shock. Frances Cheng(c): Jason!;<> Frances Cheng(c): Don't push her! You're scaring her. Frances Cheng(c): Leave questions like that for the contract room. <> <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Okay, let's continue to the next question. <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Okay. Let's continue to the next question. <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Does your job affect your family in any way? ($DLStateFloat2) <> <> <> Simone Lo: Family? Simone Lo: Don't think so. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Like your children. Aren't you worried they may contact toxic waste?;<>;//問小孩問題+1 Simone Lo: Children? What do you bring that up for?;<> Simone Lo: Leave my daughter out of this. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Shall I take it as that you don't care about your daughter? Simone Lo: No! I mean my daughter has nothing to do with this session!;<> Simone Lo: I care the world about my daughter. You take that back. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sorry, my bad. Simone Lo: ... Thought: She looks all strung up. ->Let's continue. Simone Lo: You... <<#EndSimple>> ->I just want to know more about your family. Thought: Her eyes are shifty. I may be onto something.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: My daughter is perfectly healthy. I won't allow anyone or anything to harm her. Thought: Yet you sold her to Vision for human experiments...? <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> ->Good. Thought: She's looking at me in a weird way. <<#EndSimple>> ->How old is your child? Or do you have multiple children? ($DLStateFloat3);<> <> <> <> Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: She's seven. About time for elementary school.;<> Simone Lo: There is no such thing as an elementary school in the Shithole, though. <<#Simple(8)>> ->She's staying home? Simone Lo: ...Yeah. ->What about her education? ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Simone Lo: You could call it home-schooled. Simone Lo: That's the best I can provide. Simone Lo: She's born to rot in the Shithole just like her mother. Simone Lo: People like us, we don't have a choice.;<> Thought: ... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why did you have a child, then? Simone Lo: Huh?;<> Thought: Why the hell am I asking this? Simone Lo: None of your damn business. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You knew this child won't have a happy life, didn't you? Simone Lo: The fuck...!?;<> Frances Cheng(c): Jason! Stop! <> Simone Lo: Yeah, you're right. Simone Lo: You fancy pants are always right.;<> Simone Lo: We are stupid breeding machines, right? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I just wanted to understand your way of thinking. ->I do believe you have made a bad life decision. Simone Lo: Haha!;<> ->Sorry, I shouldn't have said that. I don't mean it. Simone Lo: ...;<> Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: Never mind. Simone Lo: Whatever questions you have, bring them on. <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: Go fuck yourself. Simone Lo: I don't want this job anymore.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You know this is another unwise decision, don't you? ->Wait, I didn't many any offense. Simone Lo: Fuck you. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> Thought: I screwed up...;<> Frances Cheng(c): If she really walks out on us... Frances Cheng(c): Then we will lose a precious opportunity. <<#Simple(8)>> ->She didn't mean it. Frances Cheng(c): That is possible... ->I screwed up. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): ... Frances Cheng(c): Ah... Frances Cheng(c): She canceled her application.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Sorry. // ->Maybe the next will be better. Frances Cheng(c): Could be... Frances Cheng(c): Alright. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Now we have to nail the next session. Frances Cheng(c): Hey, look on the bright side of life. Now you don't have to choose. Frances Cheng(c): Haha... <> <<#End>> ->Okay, let's continue to the next question. Simone Lo: Hmph...;<> <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> ->Where is your child right now? ($DLStateFloat4);<> <> <> <> Simone Lo: ...What's that about? //if已經問了兩個小孩問題 <<#If($AslKidsRelateQuestion>2)>> Simone Lo: You care an awful lot about my child.;<> Simone Lo: All these questions about her. <> <<#EndIf>> Simone Lo: They don't have anything to do with my application. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Just answer my questions. ->It is related. Simone Lo: I refuse to answer. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->In that case, I will have to disqualify you. //if前面選過類似選項 <<#If($DontAnswerDontChooseYou>0)>> Simone Lo: Unfair! You don't play the disqualify card again! <<#EndIf>> Simone Lo: ...;<> Simone Lo: *Sigh* Simone Lo: She's home. <> //if問過小孩幾歲就代表知道小孩在家裡被長輩帶 <<#If($DLStateFloat3=-1)>> Simone Lo: I told you so. <<#EndIf>> Simone Lo: I have a few relatives taking care of her.;<> <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> ->Okay, let's continue to the next question. <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I'm done with questioning. ($DLStateFloat5);//一個選項蕭失以後出現 //if只問兩題以內後又立刻說沒東西問 <<#If($AskOnly2=0)>> Simone Lo: Huh? Are you serious?;<> Frances Cheng(c): Jason... <> <<#GoTo(@跳過反悔問駱思敏問題機會)>> <<#EndIf>> //if只問兩題以內 <<#If($DLStateFloat5<5)>> <> Simone Lo: That's it? Frances Cheng(c): Jason! Ask some more questions while you still can! <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I think it's enough. Simone Lo: Huh? What's enough?;<> Frances Cheng(c): Don't talk to me! <> Thought: Oops, almost forgot... Thought: No, I did forget...;<> ->Hold on. I have a few more questions. <> Simone Lo: Ask, then. <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第一人問題集)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndSimple>> <<@跳過反悔問駱思敏問題機會>> Simone Lo: So, the session is done? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. // ->Unless you have anything else to share. Simone Lo: Nope. <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: I'll be going then. Wait for your further notice, eh?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. ->You will see the notice very soon. <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: You'd better be quick.;<> <> Thought: She's hostile throughout. Frances Cheng(c): She's not very...cooperative? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah, not what we need. Frances Cheng(c): Right... ->I think she's not too bad. Frances Cheng(c): Really? ->Can't decide yet. We have another one coming. Frances Cheng(c): Right. <<#EndSimple>> //穿襯衫，頭髮梳得特別整齊，感覺不出是窮人 Frances Cheng(c): Before they call his number, let me go over his profile with you.;<> Frances Cheng(c): The next candidate is Shawn Chen. Frances Cheng(c): His profile is a lot thicker, but most of it is unimportant. Frances Cheng(c): He's from the slums, married, with a son. No crime record. Frances Cheng(c): Working for Vision as a security guard, under the waste disposal division. Frances Cheng(c): The salary is not much. He's relying on the wife's family for economic support. Frances Cheng(c): That changed recently when he divorced. He is now in desperate need of money. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Divorced? Who's taking care of the son? Frances Cheng(c): The lawsuit for custody is ongoing. Right now they are taking turns. Frances Cheng(c): I know what you're about to ask. Frances Cheng(c): The child was sold to Vision while under Shawn Chen's custody. The ex doesn't know a thing about it. Frances Cheng(c): She did report to the police, about the child being missing. Frances Cheng(c): Given that they're both illegal immigrants... Frances Cheng(c): I suppose the police will not investigate. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Oh, he's here.;<> <<#End>>

title: 面談陳昇文
body: //穿襯衫，頭髮梳得特別整齊，感覺不出是窮人 Shawn Chen: Hello, sir. My name is Shawn Chen. Shawn Chen: It must be a tough job, talking to so many people.;<> Thought: Well, that's an attitude I can work with... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Haha, it's not so bad. Shawn Chen: Keep up the good work! ->Actually, I only have two consultation sessions today. Shawn Chen: Ah, um... Shawn Chen: That's pretty tough, too! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: Ahem!;<> Shawn Chen: Let me start with my self-introduction. Shawn Chen: Truth be told, I work for Vision. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Your job is? Shawn Chen: I was a security guard, night watch. Thought: Was? <<#Simple(6)>> ->Was? Shawn Chen: The company bought a batch of patrol robots, so...;<> Thought: So he was fired. Frances Cheng(c): The profile from Helper didn't mention this. Maybe it happened recently.;<> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Small world. Shawn Chen: Yeah, right!;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: I recognize Vision's excellence in the industry. That's why I'm applying to work on this farm as a contributor. Shawn Chen: Please kindly consider my case. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Continue with your introduction, please. Shawn Chen: OK, sure.;<> ->Ass-kissing won't earn you any points. Shawn Chen: No, I really— ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: Ahem!;<> Shawn Chen: About my personal life, there's really nothing to talk about. Shawn Chen: I live alone these days. Used to have a wife. Divorced. Shawn Chen: That's it.;<> <> <> <> <> <<@第四日面談第二人問題集>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What's the reason for your divorce? ($DLStateFloat) <> <> <> Shawn Chen: I-is that relevant? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. ->Answer my question. Shawn Chen: Sure.;<> Shawn Chen: We didn't get along. <<#Simple(8)>> ->That's it? Shawn Chen: Yes. ->I see. Let's continue to the next question. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第二人問題集)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Do you have any children? ($DLStateFloat) <> <> <> Shawn Chen: Yes, a son.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Who's taking care of your son now? Shawn Chen: My ex and I, we take turns. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: Plus, he's ten years old. Doesn't need a lot of care. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Where is he now? Shawn Chen: You mean...? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->At your place, or your ex's? Shawn Chen: My place. ->Your home? Shawn Chen: Yes. <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: Hmm... Thought: He doesn't want to bring up the missing person case at all...? <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第二人問題集)>> ->Why do you need this job? ($DLStateFloat3) <> <> <> Shawn Chen: Because of money. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Is it urgent? I mean, the need for money. Shawn Chen: Not particularly. ->What do you need this money for? Shawn Chen: Pay bills. <<#EndSimple>> Thought: I'm not getting anything useful... <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第二人問題集)>> ->I'm done with questions. ($DLStateFloat4);//一個選項蕭失以後出現 //if只問兩題以內(且上一人也沒問過。) <<#If($DLStateFloat4<3)>> <> Shawn Chen: That's it?;<> Frances Cheng(c): Jason, aren't you gonna ask more questions while you still can? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I think it's enough. Shawn Chen: Huh? What's enough?;<> Frances Cheng(c): Don't talk to me! <> Thought: Oops, almost forgot... Thought: No, I did forget... ->Hold on. I have a few more questions. <> Shawn Chen: Ask, please.;<> <<#GoTo(@第四日面談第二人問題集)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#If($AskOnly2=0)>> Shawn Chen: Ugh... Shawn Chen: Okay...? <<#EndIf>> <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: Does that mean our session is over? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. Shawn Chen: I'll make room for the next person, then. ->Unless you have anything else to share. Shawn Chen: Yes, there is!;<> Shawn Chen: I'd like you to know that you're a nice consultant officer and I enjoyed this session very much. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Thank you. Shawn Chen: Great! ->My job is not for your enjoyment. Shawn Chen: Too right! I just meant to say that...;<> Shawn Chen: Um... <> ->Enough ass-kissing. Shawn Chen: Don't say that!;<> Shawn Chen: I genuinely feel so. Haha... <> <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: Ahem!;<> Shawn Chen: I guess I should make room for the next person. <> <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: Next, I should expect a notice, right? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Correct. ->You will see the notice very soon. <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: I see. Thank you very much.;<> <> Thought: I don't like this guy...;<> Frances Cheng(c): Hmm... //if洛斯敏報器那就直接陳昇文 <<#If($LouSheMinLeft=0)>> Frances Cheng(c): Since Lo has quit, Chen is our only option. <> <<#GoTo(@跳過選駱還選陳環節)>> <<#EndIf>> Frances Cheng(c): What do you think? Which one? <> <<@跟程芳選要跟誰簽約>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What do you think? ($DLStateFloat5) <> Frances Cheng(c): Don't throw the question back at me! Frances Cheng(c): Hmm... Frances Cheng(c): Lo is very uncooperative. Chen should be the easier option? Frances Cheng(c): Although... Frances Cheng(c): Chen really isn't saying much. Frances Cheng(c): That is what I think, as an observer. Frances Cheng(c): You talked to them in person. You know better. Frances Cheng(c): It's up to you now. <<#GoTo(@跟程芳選要跟誰簽約)>> ->I guess Lo is the better option. Frances Cheng(c): Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She's hostile, but predictable. Frances Cheng(c): Predictable, huh... Frances Cheng(c): Alright. ->I just have this feeling. Frances Cheng(c): Right. Feeling plays a large part in decisions like this. ->I feel that she cares more about her child. Frances Cheng(c): I know what you mean. <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Alright! Simone Lo it is.;<> ->I guess Chen is the better option. Frances Cheng(c): Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because he's more cooperative? Frances Cheng(c): More cooperative than Lo, for sure. ->I just have this feeling. Frances Cheng(c): Right. Feeling plays a large part in decisions like this. ->I feel that he cares more about his child. Frances Cheng(c): Does he? I feel the opposite. Frances Cheng(c): But you know him better than I do. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah, let's choose Chen. // ->Wait, I changed my mind. Let's go with Lo. Frances Cheng(c): Are you sure? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. Frances Cheng(c): Alright! Simone Lo it is.;<> ->Wait, no! I choose Chen! Frances Cheng(c): Haha! <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): OK! Shawn Chen it is.;<> <<#EndSimple>> <<@跳過選駱還選陳環節>> Frances Cheng(c): I've put the candidate into the contract pool. Frances Cheng(c): You and Lawrence may continue with interrogation in the contract room.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Roger. // ->Where should I go next? Frances Cheng(c): Um... Frances Cheng(c): I don't know, haha... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): We must wait for 23 and Ms. Situ. <<#Simple(8)>> ->We did pretty well without them! Frances Cheng(c): Right, partner! Frances Cheng(c): Although... ->Are they coming back at all? Frances Cheng(c): They will! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): We can't handle the next step on our own. Must wait for them. Frances Cheng(c): There's nothing else on the agenda for now. J, what would you—;<> <> Yolanda Chen: Oi! You! Counter 3!;<> Yolanda Chen: Your sessions are all done!;<> Yolanda Chen: Make room for the next! Move your ass! Frances Cheng(c): Wow! You should get out, J! <<#End>> //主角下做離開後有另一個人走過去上椅子

title: 操作路線_大廳到建修
body:
//進電梯一下以後
//俊恩左主角右 by凡
Justin Wu: That was...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Yeah.
    Justin Wu: ...
->How are you feeling?
    Justin Wu: Not good.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Justin Wu: Wayne was my best friend, or so I believed.;<<Play(吳俊恩,MBU_吳俊恩_正站低頭)>>
Justin Wu: I always thought we could get back to the good old days...
