title: 下車討論作戰
body: //主角淡入淡出到下車口，然後走下去 Thought: Is this a parking lot or what? I can't tell if it's above or underground...;<> Lawrence Chang: Say, what is this damn place?;<> 23(c): Parking lot, basement level L7, Joy Tower.;<>;<> 23(c): They were building a shopping complex. The project was called off midway because of the Wanpei elevation plan. 23(c): This whole area is designated as an evacuation zone, leaving behind many half-built structures like this one.;<> <> Nin Situ: Gangs are using them as their hideout.;<> Nin Situ: Chameleon has put the children in this building. Yaron Kun: Sorry to interrupt, miss tour guide, but we have real business to do.;<>;<>;//攝影機往右拉，看到幫手靠在旁邊地上躺著一個幫派人 <<#Simple(6)>> ->Who's that guy on the ground? Yaron Kun: This one?;<> Yaron Kun: He's our ticket. Thought: Ticket? <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Recon report, Helper. Yaron Kun: The entrance is that way, deeper in the parking lot.;<> Yaron Kun: All hostile units are indoors. We have no visual from the outside.;<> Yaron Kun: I have checked for exits. All boarded up, except for this one. It's the only way in and out.;<> Yaron Kun: Those vans by the gate are for transporting the kids, all of whom, by the way, should have been moved inside. Yaron Kun: They probably want to check the merchandise or something, before shipping them out.;<> Nin Situ: Positive? Yaron Kun: As positive as can be. I can't go inside.;<> Yaron Kun: The thing is, I saw at least one boy being taken into the facility. Yaron Kun: And I've checked the vans. All empty. Putting two and two together... Nin Situ: Roger that.;<> Nin Situ: ... 23(c): The simplest plan is to kick the door in and shoot everything that moves. You two can handle it without much of a problem.;<> <> Nin Situ: With children potentially inside, we can't engage them in a gunfight.;<> Yaron Kun: Would be great if we can map the inside, eh?;<> Nin Situ: ...What's your plan? Yaron Kun: What made you think I have a plan?;<> 23(c): Your cheeky tone. Yaron Kun: You mean my genius aura.;<> 23(c): Cut the crap. <> Yaron Kun: Okay, okay.;<> Yaron Kun: I told you to prepare optical masks, yeah? Yaron Kun: Don't tell me you didn't? <<#Simple(6)>> ->I have one here. Yaron Kun: Great! ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): We do have optical masks ready... 23(c): Don't tell me your plan is just to cover your face and walk right in? <> Yaron Kun: Bingo! Yaron Kun: Now enters our ticket, this guy here on the ground. Yaron Kun: I caught him while doing recon. Gave him a good shakedown in case he has any intel to offer.;<> Nin Situ: ...You used torture? Yaron Kun: Chill. Nothing that he could sue me for.;<> Yaron Kun: Verbal threatening, mostly. Nin Situ: ...Go on. Yaron Kun: He's running errands for someone inside, to fetch some Mac III. Yaron Kun: You there could pick up where he left off and be our eyes inside the facility.;<>;<> Thought: This "you" means me?;<> <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why me? Yaron Kun: Did I say it has to be you? ->Do I even look like him? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yaron Kun: He's a newbie. No one has remembered his face yet.;<>;<>;<> Yaron Kun: That's why they sent him to get the drugs. Always bully the newbie. Yaron Kun: Plus, everyone in their gang wears an optical mask. They can't see your face anyway.;<> Nin Situ: ...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why not you, or Situ? Yaron Kun: Chickening out already, huh?;<>;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm pointing out a more reasonable alternative. // ->Yeah. Yaron Kun: Ha! I like the honesty. <<#EndSimple>> Yaron Kun: Don't worry just yet.;<>;<> ->Sounds like a plan. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yaron Kun: Situ and me are going in, too, through the air ducts.;<>;<> Yaron Kun: The building has some seriously roomy ducts. Easy enough to move around in. Yaron Kun: The drawback is that the visibility is poor. Not the ideal place to launch an assault.;<> Yaron Kun: But if things go awry, we can bust out of the ducts to provide support. You're safe and sound, eh... Yaron Kun: What's your name again?;<>;<>;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Jason Dai. Yaron Kun: Ah, right.;<> ->Doesn't matter. Yaron Kun: Cool guy, huh.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Yaron Kun: How's that, your ladyship? My Plan?;<> Nin Situ: ... Nin Situ: Good. We will follow your plan. Lawrence Chang: Ugh, hold on!;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Do we really need to send Jason? I could— Nin Situ: You stay here. Protect 23 and the van, and wait for further instructions. Lawrence Chang: But—;<> Nin Situ: We don't have time. Lawrence Chang: ... Nin Situ: Jason, try the optical mask.;<> <> //這裡放打開投影紋面的動畫 Nin Situ: ...Looks good. Nin Situ: Action time, everyone.;<> Nin Situ: Let's go, Helper.;<>;<> Yaron Kun: Sure thing.;<> <> //司徒往上射離肢，然後飛走。 //大家看向幫手 //昆燁: 幹嘛？ //昆燁: 又不是每個人都跟他一樣怪物。 //昆燁: 我用走的一樣能到我要去的地方好嗎。 //向右走出畫面 23(c): Jason, do you copy?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Copy. ->What's up? <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): I will stay online to provide support. Relax.;<> 23(c): Just follow my instructions. 23(c): We have done this many times! 23(c): And you, Lawrence.;<> Lawrence Chang: ... 23(c): LAWRENCE CHANG!! Lawrence Chang: Uh, oops, what's up?;<> 23(c): Keep your guard up! You're protecting the command center, which is me. Lawrence Chang: I know that! 23(c): Brooding in a corner again because Nin doesn't trust you, huh? Lawrence Chang: That's, um...;<> 23(c): I told you that's not the case! Man the hell up! Lawrence Chang: Okay!;<> 23(c): If things go south, this van is our only ticket out. 23(c): Your job is crucial. Lawrence Chang: Roger.;<> 23(c): Good. 23(c): Now, approach the construction site, Jason. <<#End>>

title: 工地守門
body:
//玩家敲門
Vincent Kuo: Who's there?
Vincent Kuo: Oh, the errand boy.
Vincent Kuo: You the newbie, huh?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yes.
    //
->Sort of.
    Vincent Kuo: Yes or no.
    Vincent Kuo: What's "sort of", huh?
<<#EndSimple>>
Vincent Kuo: Took you damn long to fetch the stuff.
Vincent Kuo: He's gone nuts without a Mac III. Totally losing it.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站低頭_臉譜)>>
Vincent Kuo: Was howling at the ceiling and shooting the shit out of it. Better give him his fix before he starts shooting people.
Vincent Kuo: Come on, hurry the hell up.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站低頭返回_臉譜)>>
Vincent Kuo: Wait, shit, I forgot.
Vincent Kuo: Forgot to ask...
Vincent Kuo: What's the crap again...
Vincent Kuo: Ah, the password.
Vincent Kuo: No password, no entry.
Vincent Kuo: Or Nathan's gonna bitch me to death.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站低頭_臉譜)>>
23(c): Don't worry. Helper has the password.
23(c): The password is, H-LI-NA-K-RB-CS-FR-BE-MG-CA-SR-BA-RA.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站低頭返回_臉譜)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->H-LI-NA-RB-FR-CS-K-BE-MG-CA-SR-BA-RA.
->H-LI-NA-RB-CS-FR-K-BE-SR-CA-MG-BA-RA.
    <<#GoTo(@對守門笨流氓講錯暗號)>>
->H-LI-NA-K-RB-CS-FR-BE-MG-CA-SR-BA-RA.
    Vincent Kuo: Um...
    Vincent Kuo: That sounds...right?
    Vincent Kuo: Come on in.
->CTHULHUFHTAGN.
    <<@對守門笨流氓講錯暗號>>
    Thought: What the hell am I talking about...!?
    23(c): Jason Dai!!!
    Vincent Kuo: Um...
    Vincent Kuo: It's kinda...wrong? I guess?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Sorry, I forgot the password.
    ->What is the correct password then?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Vincent Kuo: About that, um...
    Vincent Kuo: I don't remember it, either.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->So...what now?
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Vincent Kuo: How about you come inside, ask them for the right password, and let me know?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Sure.
        Vincent Kuo: Thanks man.
    ->If you have no problem with it?
        Vincent Kuo: Of course! You're doing me a favor!
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Vincent Kuo: Come on in.
    23(c): My IQ is degrading as I listen to this conversation...
    <<#End>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Vincent Kuo: Where did Nathan get these crap passwords? Who the hell could remember that?
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Yeah, it's like super long random combination.
    //
->It's the periodic table, of elements.
    Vincent Kuo: Elements?
    Vincent Kuo: Like, water, earth, fire, air and stuff?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Close enough.
        Vincent Kuo: Ah, I see.
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->Um... Never mind.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->No, chemical elements, lined up in rows and columns.
        Vincent Kuo: ...
        Vincent Kuo: ...
        Vincent Kuo: ...Come again?
        23(c): Don't waste time explaining, Jason.
        23(c): I can hear his brain overloading.
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Vincent Kuo: Whatever, come on in.
<<#End>>

body:

Thought: Growell, dominating the construction and housing sector, made some incredible profit out of it.
<<#End>>

title: 調查:發電機
body:
//這裡早就斷水斷電，所以黑社會有般自己的柴油發電機。
Thought: These old-style power generators are outlawed. Can't get them anywhere other than the black market.
Thought: The government has banned all means of power generation with carbon emission. The real purpose is to jack up the utility fee rate.
Thought: Only those not connected to the power grid for one reason or another use these gas generators.
<<#End>>

title: 跟蝦情侶黨
body:
//一個戴耳機女生，跟一個難的站在一起。

Eric Feng: Oi oi oi!;<<Play(馮元駿,MBU_李宗霖_紅椅右看)>>
Eric Feng: Yo, I'm talkin to you, mothafucka. What the hell you starin at, huh?
Eric Feng: Fuckin' all swag like you run this damn joint, huh?
Eric Feng: You eyein my girl, huh? You got a problem or what?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I'm not.
    Eric Feng: Bullshit! You damn well were!
    <<#GoTo(@邏輯死掉混混環節)>>
->Which is your girl?
    Eric Feng: She is!
    <<#GoTo(@邏輯死掉混混環節)>>
->Yeah, I'm eyeing her alright.
    <<@邏輯死掉混混環節>>
    Eric Feng: Damn, you got some nerve, huh!
    Eric Feng: Who the fuck you think you are, eyeballin my girl like that, huh?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Then who's supposed to look at her, huh?
        <<@邏輯死掉混混環節2>>
        Eric Feng: Who?
        Eric Feng: Me, of course!
        Eric Feng: Only her man, that's who—and that's me, got it?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Not even cashiers at the supermarket?
            Eric Feng: Hell yeah they can! How is she supposed to check out otherwise? You dumb or somethin?
            <<#Simple(99999)>>
            ->So, all cashiers are her men.
                Eric Feng: The hell...? Nah, man, that ain't it!
                <<#Simple(99999)>>

Zoe Wu: Quiet, you two!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站低頭_臉譜)>>;<<Play(吳子芸,MBU_吳子芸_紅椅音樂右看)>>

title: 白壁虎靠牆對話
body: //看要解謎還是玩家直接過去白壁虎就出現 //白壁虎靠牆出現 ?Camleon Bai: Bunch of stupid clowns, eh? Thought: What the...!? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Pardon? ?Camleon Bai: Those human trash. ->You mean those gangsters? ?Camleon Bai: Yep. <<#EndSimple>> Thought: ...Who is this guy? ?Camleon Bai: I can't live with them, myself.;<> ?Camleon Bai: No value, no purpose, no ambition. Lolling around driven by basic instinct. ?Camleon Bai: Fight for territory. Fight for mate. Fight for every damn thing. Animals. Thought: Wait, this voice... ?Camleon Bai: You know what's the first thing I'd do, now that I'm here? Kick them all out. ?Camleon Bai: Ah, sorry, I take it back.;<> ?Camleon Bai: Before that, I've gotta knock you out. ?Camleon Bai: Don't blame me. Haha. Thought: Yeah, it's definitely him... ?Camleon Bai: I was off topic. Thought: This is the guy who shot Fran! ?Camleon Bai: You are the star of our little show.;//抱胸指主角 <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Who are you? ?Camleon Bai: Chameleon. ->You're Chameleon. ?Camleon Bai: Ha, spitting that name out as if it's just a name. ?Camleon Bai: I see you know nothing. <<#EndSimple>> ?Camleon Bai: You have no idea what that name insinuates.;<> ?Camleon Bai: All those events associated with it, you don't know anything. To you, it's just a... ?Camleon Bai: A name.;<> ?Camleon Bai: A name attached to the asshole who almost killed your girlfriend. ?Camleon Bai: I don't blame you. ?Camleon Bai: Situ isn't very inclined to share. I figured she wouldn't tell you what you don't need to know. Thought: He knows about Situ...!? Thought: ...Does he know that she's here? ?Camleon Bai: I've been watching you for a while. ?Camleon Bai: Not much training. A lousy agent, if you are a field agent at all. ?Camleon Bai: I'll ask straight away. ?Camleon Bai: You're not part of OWL, are you? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm not. ?Camleon Bai: Uh-huh. Thought: He sounds a bit disappointed. ->What if I am? ?Camleon Bai: ... ?Camleon Bai: Do you think lying could save your ass? ->What do you want? ?Camleon Bai: Don't answer a question with another question. ?Camleon Bai: Didn't they teach you manners in elementary school? <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> //消失踹人

title: 跟幫手討論要不要殺出去
body:
Yaron Kun: Motherfucker. Is he gone?
Yaron Kun: Don't tell me he's cloaked and hiding in this room.
Nin Situ: ...;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_大跑看外)>>
Yaron Kun: I saw you were handling it fabulously well. Didn't want to slow you down.;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站插腰)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->What's going on?
->Where have you guys been?
    Nin Situ: We were tricked.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_大跑看外)>>
    //if有情報
    <<#If($GetIntel>0)>>
        Nin Situ: The mercenaries we spotted were reinforcement.
        Nin Situ: Or rather, decoy.
        Nin Situ: He made us believe we're having the upper hand.
    <<#EndIf>>
    Nin Situ: Meanwhile, they set up an ambush in the duct system.
    Nin Situ: We were pinned down upon entry. It took me a while to find an opening.
    Yaron Kun: Plus, they had jammers all around. Our comms were cut off.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_大跑看外返回)>>;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站插腰抬手)>>
    Yaron Kun: Still can't get in touch with 23.
    Yaron Kun: One heck of a booby trap it was.;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站插腰抬手返回)>>
    Nin Situ: ...
->...
<<#EndSimple>>



Yaron Kun: Hey, listen.
Yaron Kun: We have this chance because he doesn't want to kill us yet.
Yaron Kun: Your legs still working?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah.
    //
->I can run.
    Yaron Kun: Hmph.
<<#EndSimple>>
<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_大跑待機轉側站)>>
Yaron Kun: Move your ass then.
//司徒看著門外
Nin Situ: ...;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_大跑看外返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站看外)>>;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站插腰返回)>>
Yaron Kun: ...Fuck me.
Yaron Kun: I heard lots of stories about you, and I thought they were just stories...;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站低頭)>>
Yaron Kun: Hey, listen to me...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站看外返回)>>
Yaron Kun: I know you want to save those brats for real.;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站低頭返回)>>
Yaron Kun: How about we evacuate first, then follow their fleet?
Nin Situ: Intercepting a fleet midway is too risky. There are children on board.;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_大跑看外)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站看外)>>
Yaron Kun: Not intercepting. We just follow them to their hideout.;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站手指)>>
Yaron Kun: Spend a couple of days on recon and refreshment, make a plan—
Nin Situ: No time. We don't know what they will do to the children during these couple of days.;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站手指返回)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Chameleon said Vision means the children no harm.
    Nin Situ: I don't trust a single word he says.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Nin Situ: Also, if to break into their hideout, we will need more hands.
Yaron Kun: You will have more hands. Count me in.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站看外返回)>>
Nin Situ: No, you won't help me.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站看外)>>
Nin Situ: You job is to find something solid to blackmail Vision. You won't take any unnecessary risk.
Nin Situ: Furthermore, you have all the reasons to see the children hurt. Good blackmailing material.;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_大跑看外返回)>>;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站低頭)>>
Yaron Kun: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站看外返回)>>
Yaron Kun: You're paranoid.;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站低頭返回)>>
Nin Situ: I'm objective.;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_大跑看外)>>
Yaron Kun: Then take this objective fact—I will not risk my life going out with you, gun blazing.
//if有情報
<<#If($GetIntel>0)>>
    Yaron Kun: Thank our guy for getting the intel out of the gangsters.;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站手指)>>
    Yaron Kun: Or else we'd have no idea about his reinforcement!
    Yaron Kun: 23 ran a quick analysis. They had at least 30 men!;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站手指返回)>>
<<#EndIf>>
//if沒情報
<<#If($GetIntel<1)>>
    Yaron Kun: Do you know how much reinforcement they called in?
    Yaron Kun: ...;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站低頭)>>
    Yaron Kun: I did a quick count from up there.
    Yaron Kun: Upwards of 30 men.;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#EndIf>>
Yaron Kun: Thirty! Seasoned mercenaries trained by Chameleon!
Yaron Kun: That was about half of his group!
Yaron Kun: One step out of this door and they'll fill you full of lead!;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站插腰)>>
Yaron Kun: He's daring you to leap into this trap!;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_大跑看外返回)>>
Yaron Kun: Use your damn brain, will ya?
Nin Situ: ...
Nin Situ: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站看外)>>
Nin Situ: I have done the math. I can handle them on my own.;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_大跑看外)>>
Yaron Kun: You're insane...
Yaron Kun: Calm down. Don't let him get into your head!
Yaron Kun: You will do more good alive than dead. Just calm the hell down.
Nin Situ: I am calm.;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_大跑看外返回)>>
//「連我都看得出來司徒寧在隱忍……」我這邊改掉
Thought: Even I can tell she's on the verge of eruption...
Thought: She's fuming.
Yaron Kun: What did you say in the van, huh?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站看外返回)>>
Yaron Kun: You asked if I had a death wish, remember?
Yaron Kun: Now is time to return the favor.;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站插腰抬手)>>
Yaron Kun: Do you have a death wish, Situ?;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_大跑看外)>>
Nin Situ: No, because I will not die.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站看外)>>;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站插腰抬手返回)>>
Nin Situ: The situation has changed.;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_大跑看外返回)>>
Yaron Kun: What has changed? Enlighten me.;<<Play(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站插腰抬頭)>>
Yaron Kun: Holy mother of God...
Yaron Kun: No. You will screw up my plan. I won't be able to find their hideout.;<<PlayUntil(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站插腰抬頭返回)>>
Yaron Kun: If you insist, I will have to—;<<PlayUntil(昆燁,MBU_昆燁_鴞隊_側站插腰返回)>>
//司徒射出離肢電他，然後收回，幫手倒地大力喘氣
<<#End>>

title: 屠殺結束
body:
//白壁虎身上插著黑樁，跟司徒寧對視，兩人都受了重傷
Thought: Situ!
Thought: Did she win!?
?Camleon Bai: Heh.
?Camleon Bai: Welcome, Mr. Dai.
Nin Situ: It's done, Jason.
Nin Situ: *Cough* I have the situation under control...
?Camleon Bai: Ha, have you?
Nin Situ: ...
?Camleon Bai: Sorry folks, I lied.
?Camleon Bai: I did keep a few men watching over the van.
?Camleon Bai: If things go south, they will, you know.
?Camleon Bai: So...
Nin Situ: ...
?Camleon Bai: ...
?Camleon Bai: I see...
?Camleon Bai: Haha...
?Camleon Bai: I know that look.
?Camleon Bai: You have disposed of them, haven't you?
?Camleon Bai: You never believed a single word I said.
?Camleon Bai: Who can I blame? My own fault! Haha...
Nin Situ: You have lost.
?Camleon Bai: Lost? Are you seeing this as a game? With winners and losers?
?Camleon Bai: That's mighty childish of you.
?Camleon Bai: Did they wire your brain wrong when they did the genetic engineering or what?
?Camleon Bai: You're seeking a meaning? I call it insanity.
Nin Situ: ...
?Camleon Bai: Pathetic, eh?
?Camleon Bai: No one appreciates your values, because you're—
Nin Situ: ...Shut up.
?Camleon Bai: Hahaha!
Nin Situ: Tell me everything Vision's hiding.
Nin Situ: It's about time, Chameleon.
?Camleon Bai: Yeah...
?Camleon Bai: About time to use my camouflage.
//開始發出逼逼的聲音
//白壁虎爆炸爆出一陣毒霧氣，司徒寧在爆炸前後退，並丟出一個機器，機器把所有毒氣瞬間吸入其中
//這段也可以是司徒用離肢把假白壁虎舉在半空中，最後發出逼逼聲，司徒立刻把白壁虎用黑樁用力推遠)
<<#End>>

title: 跟黑面搭話
body: //還沒問滿人數之前，黑面沒有在看主角這邊(背對攝影機單腳站立修練姿態)，問購之後轉身，可以主動對話 Yevin He: I greet thee, warrior.;<> Thought: ...Warrior? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You talking to me? Yevin He: Verily. ->What's up? <<#EndSimple>> Yevin He: Mine eyes perceive thy stature bold and strong, surely thou art one versed in the art of arms?;<>;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I did learn a few kungfu moves alright. Yevin He: Ah, well met! A true man of valor! Yevin He: On the morrow, we two shall surely cross swords in friendly contest! ->I'm not the fighter type. Yevin He: Alas, what a pity it is! Yevin He: Beholding thy robust form, perchance thou art a prodigy in martial training. <<#EndSimple>> Thought: What's his problem? Talking like one of them medieval chivalry novels... //劉承虎坐在椅子上轉過來看主角 <> Tighe Liu: Yo, Yin. Who's this guy?;<> Thought: He's the thug in the hospital! 23(c): Don't panic. You're behind an optical mask. <> Thought: The thing is, I'm wearing the same clothes...;<> Yevin He: Yon fellow is one whom I have but newly met. <> Tighe Liu: Huh, the newbie, right?;<> Tighe Liu: Neighbor something...? <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yes, Neighfour Ma. Tighe Liu: I'll just call you Neigh. <<#Simple(8)>> ->How do I know you're not mimicking a horse? Tighe Liu: What the hell would I want to do that for? ->Sure. Tighe Liu: Great. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->My name is not important.;<> Tighe Liu: Come on! No way! Tighe Liu: We're all brothers. Brothers call each other by their names! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tighe Liu: Tall guy, huh? Spent lotta time in the gym?;<>;<> //if說不重要 <<#If($DLStateFloat=0)>> Thought: So much for calling brothers by the name... <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->The gym doesn't help you grow taller. Tighe Liu: Eh...? Yevin He: This stalwart knight speaketh with reason.;<> Tighe Liu: Makes sense, haha!;<> <> ->Sort of. ->Nope. Tighe Liu: Really...;<> <<#EndSimple>> Tighe Liu: ... Thought: He's staring at me right in the face... Tighe Liu: Say, have we met somewhere...?;<> Tighe Liu: Come on, show me your face. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No. ->Don't wanna. ->I'm ugly. ->I'm shy. <<#EndSimple>> Tighe Liu: Shit, are you a pussy or what?;<> Tighe Liu: Just show me your damn face! //這邊何以墨轉單立握拳待機 Lily Chen: Give him a break, Tiger. It's bad enough that you break the rules yourself.;<>;<>;<> Lily Chen: Nathan told us to have faces covered at work. He means it. Tighe Liu: Damn, do I look like I give two shits about Nathan?;<>;<> Lily Chen: Give two shits about the cops, at least. Lily Chen: They'd bust you in no time if you keep flashing that ugly face around.;<> Lily Chen: Cameras everywhere these days. Tighe Liu: ... Tighe Liu: He's not wearing masks himself.;<>;<> Lily Chen: He doesn't do the dirty work. We do. Lily Chen: And he has friends in the cops. Do you?;<> Tighe Liu: ... Lily Chen: Stop it and just do what Nathan told us to do.;<> Yevin He: Brother, the words of this noble lady are indeed wise. Tighe Liu: I know, I know. I have my plans.;<> Lily Chen: You'd better. Tighe Liu: I told you a thousand times. Optical masks are for pussies.;<> Tighe Liu: I'm going for a full face tattoo!;<> Lily Chen: Go get it then! Tighe Liu: Can't find a good tattoo parlor! Lily Chen: He's afraid a half-ass tattooist's gonna ruin his pretty face.;<> Tighe Liu: Fuck you.;<> Yevin He: Brother, temper thy haste, for such impetuous spirit bodes ill. Tighe Liu: Shut up! ;<>;<>;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Why would you want a real full face tattoo? Tighe Liu: Because it's damn cool! Tighe Liu: Takes a real man to do it, understand? Tighe Liu: Look at Brother Yin here! His whole gang's got face tattoos! Fucking awesome! <<#Simple(6)>> ->He's not our man? Tighe Liu: Huh? You stupid or what? He's here to help out for the day. Tighe Liu: Nathan says we could use more hands for this cargo delivery. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Tighe Liu: Speaking of, where the heck is Yang? Yevin He: My brother is presently attending to nature's call.;<> Tighe Liu: Crap. The shithouse is like 5 miles away. Stupid design. Tighe Liu: You know where the shithouse is, Neigh?;<>;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Um, woof? Tighe Liu: The hell? I'm asking you a question. Tighe Liu: You're Neigh, remember? ->No idea. Where is it? Tighe Liu: It's stupid far, lemme tell ya... <<#EndSimple>> Tighe Liu: ... Thought: He's staring at me very hard. Tighe Liu: Say, have we met somewhere before? I keep getting this feeling...;<> Yevin He: Is it verily so? Tighe Liu: Yeah. I swear I've seen him somewhere. Where exactly, though... Thought: I've got to break this conversation before it before he remembers... <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Hey, where's Nathan? Tighe Liu: He said he's got business, took a boy inside and never came out again. Tighe Liu: Speaking of the devil. ->Hey, you guys know where we're keeping the kids? Tighe Liu: The warehouse in the back. Where else?;<> Tighe Liu: Nathan said so. Tighe Liu: Plenty of space over there. <> ->You must have mistaken me for someone else.;<> Tighe Liu: Yeah, could be...;<> Tighe Liu: Hmm...;<> Tighe Liu: Ah!? Tighe Liu: You're...!?;<>;<> Tighe Liu: The hospital guy!? Thought: Shit! Thought: Come on, 23! I need your help right now! ->... <<#EndSimple>> //這時候突然爆出一陣雜訊干擾音效 <> Thought: What's this screech!? Thought: Fuck, my ears...;<> <<#End>>

title: 打贏雙子以後
body: Nathan Chuang: Splendid show! Splendid! Thought: Where the hell is 23? Situ and Helper? Anyone...? Thought: Why has everyone gone quiet? Nathan Chuang: They are nutjobs alright, but very strong nutjobs. Nathan Chuang: Gotta say, you're pretty good at this. <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What? Wanna tase me again? Nathan Chuang: Haha! You remember that. Good.;<> Nathan Chuang: Relax. Not gonna happen this time. ->Thanks and you're next. Nathan Chuang: No worries. You won't get to fight me today.;<> ->So? What do you want? Nathan Chuang: Nothing.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Nathan Chuang: I don't need to deal with you myself. Nathan Chuang: My employer wants to have an intimate meeting with you.;<> Nathan Chuang: His men are the real deal, nothing like these clowns. Nathan Chuang: You will see some professionals in action.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I can handle them just the same. Nathan Chuang: Confidence! Good! Nathan Chuang: It's your show time. ->I'm safe and sound as long as they don't catch me. Nathan Chuang: Makes sense. Nathan Chuang: Although... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nathan Chuang: Yeah... Nathan Chuang: They're already here. <<#End>> //門打開的聲音，主角轉頭被白壁虎打暈 //一群傭兵走進畫面，

title: 徐媛走後程芳評論
body: <> //if幫竊聽 <<#If($AgreedWiretap=0)>> Thought: I might as well do her this favor. Won't hurt... Frances Cheng(c): I think we should work with her. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah, sure better than working against her. ->I'm not so sure about that. Frances Cheng(c): You have trust issues, J. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She is not the trustworthy type. Frances Cheng(c): You're right. ->I tried. Frances Cheng(c): Haha, I can tell. You did agree to cooperate. <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if不幫竊聽 <<#If($AgreedWiretap=-1)>> Thought: Refusing to record the conversation with Yan should be a sound decision. Thought: The more I get involved, the more they will want to kill me. Frances Cheng(c): I think we should help her out. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why didn't you say so? Frances Cheng(c): I... Frances Cheng(c): I thought it would be rude to interrupt?;<> Frances Cheng(c): Well, I don't know... Frances Cheng(c): Maybe I wasn't so sure about it, either.;<> ->She's a dangerous woman. Frances Cheng(c): All the more reason to keep her on our side. Frances Cheng(c): Or so I believe. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Screwing with the CEO is like asking for trouble. Frances Cheng(c): We already have too much trouble to keep track of anyway... ->You know what? You're right. Frances Cheng(c): Yeah. ->No. She's only looking for a chance to backstab me. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): What's done is done. This discussion won't change anything. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): It's just my personal opinion, though. <<#EndIf>> //if告訴傭兵 <<#If($DontTellYuanMercenary=false)>> Frances Cheng(c): Is it really OK that you told her about the mercenaries? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What could possibly go wrong? Frances Cheng(c): You're right... ->In that case, she wouldn't have let me into the Flop Core.;//徐員幫忙進核心才出現 Frances Cheng(c): Yes, good point! <<#EndSimple>> ->She doesn't have a reason to silence me, does she? Frances Cheng(c): Haha, no, she doesn't. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if罵執行長，程芳擔心 <<#If($DLStateFloat3=0)>> Frances Cheng(c): Hey, Jason...;<> Frances Cheng(c): If, as Yuna said, you will meet with the CEO soon... Frances Cheng(c): Promise me you won't do anything stupid.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I promise. Frances Cheng(c): ...Good. ->Huh? Why? Frances Cheng(c): When she brought it up, your reaction was, um... Frances Cheng(c): ... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Um? // ->Excited? ->Anxious? Frances Cheng(c): No, it's more like... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Hate. Burning with hate. Frances Cheng(c): Don't let hate get the better of you. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Frances Cheng(c): OK, it's time to go. Frances Cheng(c): Meet up with Lawrence in the Screening office. <> <<#End>>

body:

<<CloseCommunicator()>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>

    <<CloseCommunicator()>>

    Shane Yan: Ah, right. Ms. Cheng had an accident, and is currently missing?;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐看內返回)>>
    Shane Yan: You must be worried sick.;<<Play(嚴勝和,MBU_嚴勝和_側坐抬頭返回)>>
    Shane Yan: Do you blame me for failing to protect my employees?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭)>>
    Shane Yan: In a sense, I should be responsible for her. I'm the CEO, after all.
    Shane Yan: I have told them to enhance safety measures at HQ. Hopefully that helps.;<<PlayUntil(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐看內)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->We both know what you did to her.
        //GLITCH再增強
        Shane Yan: I won't argue, because I see you're blinded by grief.;<<Play(嚴勝和,MBU_嚴勝和_側坐低頭)>>
        Shane Yan: Don't be too hard on yourself.
        Thought: Motherfucker! How could you say that with a straight face? ;<<Play(嚴勝和,MBU_嚴勝和_側坐低頭返回)>>   
    ->Sorry, I should have got a grip.

    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Shane Yan: Let's talk about something less personal.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐看內返回)>>
    <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回)>>
->She asked me to check on Ms. Yeh.
    Shane Yan: Hmm, that does sound like her style.;<<Play(嚴勝和,MBU_嚴勝和_側坐前傾返回)>>
    Shane Yan: She's proactive and thorough, often pointing out the root cause before an issue fully festers.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐看內返回)>>
    Shane Yan: I guess she must have found out Ms. Yeh was stealing company secrets.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回)>>
    Shane Yan: Good.;<<Play(嚴勝和,MBU_嚴勝和_側坐點頭)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Shane Yan: Lastly, I have one more question.

Wayne Zheng: ...I heard about it. There are IIB agents everywhere.
Shane Yan: Heh. Hopefully they're not disrupting your daily workflow.;<<Play(嚴勝和,MBU_嚴勝和_側坐抬手返回)>>
Shane Yan: What about you, Mr. Dai?
<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐看內)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Never heard of it.;<<Set($PlaySillyBackfire,0)>>

    Frances Cheng(c): Don't let him find out about your deal with Yuna.
    <<CloseCommunicator()>>

    <<@不然徐媛媛是為什麼找上你啊啊？2>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->She was asking me about Ms. Yeh.
        Shane Yan: How strange.;<<Play(嚴勝和,MBU_嚴勝和_側坐抬頭)>>
        Shane Yan: She submitted a closing report yesterday. I thought the case was closed.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐看內返回)>>
        Thought: Dammit! She did mention the closing report. I forgot!;<<Play(嚴勝和,MBU_嚴勝和_側坐抬頭返回)>>
        <<#Simple(10)>>
        ->Maybe they had more discoveries.
            Shane Yan: New discoveries, huh?
            Shane Yan: Could be.
        ->That you should ask her.
        ->I don't know.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Shane Yan: I will have a separate conversation with her later.
        Thought: I'm counting on you, Hsu.;//徐媛之後會吐槽主角駭到他
    ->She asked me some questions but didn't tell me what it was about.
        Shane Yan: I see. She does that a lot.;<<Play(嚴勝和,MBU_嚴勝和_側坐點頭)>>;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_簽約側坐看內返回)>>

        Thought: How much does he know...?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<@我聽說過她會或多或少的威脅調查的員工。2>>
    Shane Yan: And I heard she employs unorthodox approaches in her investigations, such as threats and coercion.

    ->She didn't.

        Shane Yan: Don't hesitate to let me know, if you need me to do that.;<<Play(嚴勝和,MBU_嚴勝和_側坐抬手返回)>>
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->Thank you.

        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->I heard about it, too.

        <<#GoTo(@不然徐媛媛是為什麼找上你啊啊？2)>>

    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>

//執行長走掉
<<#End>>

title: 篩選路線_鄭緯說話
body: Frances Cheng(c): Phew, that ended better than I expected.;<> <> Thought: How much does Yan know...?;<> Thought: Is he already suspecting me? Thought: I can't stay here much longer. They could catch me any time.;<> //if剛剛罵妍繩和 <<#If($CurseBossHurtFrances=0)>> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Why did you say that to Mr. Yan, Jason?;<> //if已經知道督導(程芳)是主角女友 <<#If($ToldWeiDooDauIsGF=-1)>> Wayne Zheng: And you said Ms. Cheng is your girlfriend? The farm supervisor? <<#EndIf>> <<#If($ToldWeiDooDauIsGF=0)>> Wayne Zheng: You did tell me that Ms. Cheng is your girlfriend, however... <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: You really think Mr. Yan is responsible for what happened to her? Frances Cheng(c): Don't tell him, J. He's better off not knowing about it. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sorry, I was pointing fingers. I didn't mean it. <> Wayne Zheng: So... Mr. Yan was right?;<> Wayne Zheng: That you were only accusing him of failing to protect his employee? Wayne Zheng: ...;<> ->Right, he's a murderer. Frances Cheng(c): Jason...!? <> Wayne Zheng: ... Thought: He's visibly shocked. Thought: I've hardly ever seen so much surprise on his face... Wayne Zheng: I'd otherwise pursue this subject further, but... Wayne Zheng: Let's just say, contact the police if you have any evidence or proof, Jason. <<#Simple(8)>> ->You believe me? Wayne Zheng: I...;<> Wayne Zheng: I'm not sure. Wayne Zheng: The bottom line is, I don't want to consider the possibility that you're insane. Wayne Zheng: This is putting me in a very difficult position...;<> ->The police won't help. Wayne Zheng: ...You think so?;<> Wayne Zheng: In that case, there's nothing you can do. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Anyway, I respect your privacy. Wayne Zheng: If you do need help, please do come to me any time. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Thank you. ->Sure. Wayne Zheng: Yeah. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <>;<> <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: ... <> //if剛剛罵妍繩和 <<#If($CurseBossHurtFrances=0)>> Wayne Zheng: Let's talk about farm closure. <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: What do you make of their proposal?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm not sure if keeping the farm is the right thing to do. Wayne Zheng: It's absolutely right.;<> Wayne Zheng: Shutting down Silencio will do a lot more harm than good. Unemployment rate will soar. Wayne Zheng: And hundreds of thousands of contributors will have their contracts terminated ahead of their terms. Wayne Zheng: I know the Cellar has a lot of problems, but they open up an opportunity for our cause. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What if they refuse to allocate funds? Wayne Zheng: I have workarounds.;<> Wayne Zheng: I've done the math. With some optimization of our existing budgets, we can lessen the Cellar's stress somewhat. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is it that simple? Wayne Zheng: I can't promise, but it's worth trying.;<> Wayne Zheng: Although I could totally have underestimated the situation in the Cellar. Wayne Zheng: We should work it out with Ops, if possible.;<> ->Why didn't Ms. Yeh do it? Wayne Zheng: She must have her reasons...;<> Wayne Zheng: Although I could totally have underestimated the situation in the Cellar. Wayne Zheng: We should work it out with Ops, if possible.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Will you work with Ops? Wayne Zheng: I've been thinking about that...;<> Wayne Zheng: We should work it out with Ops, if possible. <> ->I see. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@阿緯覺得時間不夠讓菌恩恩理解自己唉唉)>> ->What do you think? <<@阿緯覺得時間不夠讓菌恩恩理解自己唉唉>> Wayne Zheng: I still hope to work this out together with Ops.;<> Wayne Zheng: Unfortunately we only have one day left. There's no time. Wayne Zheng: Ops, no, Justin doesn't want to make any long term plans. Wayne Zheng: He's too focused on the present to see potential opportunities down the road.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: We are dealing with real life, not an imagined perfect world. Wayne Zheng: If we had unlimited time, I'd talk to Justin as much as I have to, until he's convinced. Wayne Zheng: Now I must take actions, by brute force if necessary. Wayne Zheng: I will inform Justin of this. He has the right to know.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Won't he fight back? Wayne Zheng: There's no time. With a board member on our side, he can't do anything. Wayne Zheng: I just hope he could accept reality without making too much fuss. ->Why tell him? Wayne Zheng: We may not agree with each other, but we have both bet our lives on the fate of this farm. Wayne Zheng: He deserves to know. ->I agree. Wayne Zheng: Thank you. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: I'm not trying to take over or destroy Ops.;<> Wayne Zheng: I know the Cellar is in terrible shape, but if we get the money they promised... Wayne Zheng: I believe we can fix the Cellar up, make it serviceable. Wayne Zheng: What I'm trying to do is to break down the wall between Ops and Screening. Wayne Zheng: The next step is to make the two sides really work together.;<> Wayne Zheng: I will notice the entire Screening team, keeping them in the loop. Wayne Zheng: Now I need to make some phone calls.;<> Wayne Zheng: See you later in the office. //阿緯走掉 <> <> Frances Cheng(c): Hmm... Frances Cheng(c): There's still some time before the meeting. This will work.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is Situ back yet? Frances Cheng(c): No. I haven't heard anything from them. ->Let me know when we're about to run out of time. Frances Cheng(c): Sure. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): You can work on farm stuff for now, J. <> <<#End>>

title: 篩選路線_叫住俊恩
body: Wayne Zheng: Wait.;<>;//俊恩停下(這個用playmaker作時間延遲) Wayne Zheng: If I do become the new manager, I will need your help running the Cellar.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Would you work for me, with me? Wayne Zheng: I need you, Justin. Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: Need me for what? Butchering juicers? Justin Wu: Why would I want to do that? Wayne Zheng: ...;<>;<<#Wait(2)>> //俊恩走調 Cathy Hsieh: ...;<> Quentin Qiu: Is he nuts or what?;<>;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: He's aware that I've won the game, so... Tyler Cao: Don't tell me you want his help with the report?;<>;<>;<>;<> Quentin Qiu: No way! Wayno's just nice, not stupid.;<> Quentin Qiu: ...;<>;<> Quentin Qiu: Hey, don't tell me you're seriously considering...;<>;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: I was, but then I saw it's impossible.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Trust me, now I'm 150% focusing on the report.;<> Wayne Zheng: Leave the rest for later. Cathy Hsieh: ... Cathy Hsieh: Wayne... What Justin said, is it true?;<>;<>;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Is what true?;<> Cathy Hsieh: I thought he let me into Ops as a trainee because I'm capable. Turns out...;<> Wayne Zheng: No. You are capable. Justin did recognize your talent.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: I only gave him a slight push. He was kind of on the fence because he had never been a mentor before.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Don't ever doubt yourself. Cathy Hsieh: ...;<>;<> Cathy Hsieh: Huh, I see.;<> Cathy Hsieh: Thank you. Wayne Zheng: Hmm...;<> Wayne Zheng: ...;<>;<>;<>;<> Jeff Wu: Um, what do we do now?;<> Wayne Zheng: Adhere to the old plan. Complete tasks I just assigned.;<> Wayne Zheng: Jason, please come to my desk.;<>;<> <>;<> <<#End>>

title: 到操作組
body:
Thought: The Cellar's still under maintenance. The Ops team has no reason to be here...
Thought: Jesse should be in the office, though, or else Wayne wouldn't send me over.
<<#End>>

title: 說服賴潔2
body: Jesse Lai: ...;<> Jesse Lai: Geez... Jesse Lai: Damn him... Jesse Lai: This is such a giant, boiling, stinky mess...;<> Jesse Lai: ... //if吵到底 <<#If($DLStateFloat=10)>> Jesse Lai: Do me a favor and show yourself out, Jason.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Why? Jesse Lai: ... Jesse Lai: Because of how you fought Packs. ->You've decided to not work with Wayne? Jesse Lai: Not yet. <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: I need more time to think about it. Jesse Lai: But if you try to lobby me, it's only gonna be counterproductive.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because that little episode between me and Packs? Jesse Lai: Yeah. ->Alright, you're the boss. <<#EndSimple>> Thought: Such a waste of time...;<> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if完美 <<#If($DLStateFloat=0)>> Jesse Lai: Honestly... //if最後嘴砲 <<#If($DLStateFloat2=-1)>> Jesse Lai: You didn't have to kill the conversation with that.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->By which you mean? Jesse Lai: You know what I mean. ->I couldn't help. Jesse Lai: I know. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Packs was practically provoking you.;<> Jesse Lai: ... Jesse Lai: But seriously, all things considered... <<#EndIf>> Jesse Lai: ...I think you handled that pretty well. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Huh? ->Um, thank you? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Packs went out of his way to provoke you, and you kept your cool.;<> Jesse Lai: You handled it with reason. Jesse Lai: I do appreciate that. Thought: That means I'm winning her favor?;<> //if剛剛幫鄭緯講話一次 <<#If($DLStateFloat3=1)>> Jesse Lai: I guess I misjudged you. Jesse Lai: You're not your boss' fanboy, after all. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Thank you. // ->You did think I was a fanboy...? Jesse Lai: Let's keep focused on the subject.;<> Thought: Did she just stifle a chuckle...? ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> //if還算克制 <<#If($DLStateFloat<0)>> Jesse Lai: Honestly...;<> //if最後嘴砲 <<#If($DLStateFloat2=-1)>> Jesse Lai: You didn't have to kill the conversation with that. <<#Simple(8)>> ->By which you mean? Jesse Lai: You know what I mean. ->I couldn't help. Jesse Lai: I know. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Packs was practically provoking you.;<> Jesse Lai: ... Jesse Lai: But seriously, all things considered... <<#EndIf>> Jesse Lai: ...I think you handled that pretty well. Jesse Lai: You did pretty well controlling your temper. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What do you mean? // ->Well, I tried. Jesse Lai: I can tell.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Packs went out of his way to provoke you, and you kept your cool.;<> Jesse Lai: At least you did not willingly take his bait and start a petty squabble. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I assume that means I did well? Jesse Lai: Of course. ->So? Jesse Lai: So... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: You have proven yourself, that you're not simple-minded powder keg.;<> //if剛剛幫鄭緯講話一次 <<#If($DLStateFloat3=1)>> Jesse Lai: I guess I misjudged you.;<> Jesse Lai: You're not your boss' fanboy, after all. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Thank you. // ->You did think I was a fanboy...? Jesse Lai: Let's keep focused on the subject. Thought: Did she just stifle a chuckle...? ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> // Jesse Lai: ... Jesse Lai: Do you know what's my top concern, about working with Wayne? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He won't pay you well. Jesse Lai: Ha! I don't care about the pay.;<> Jesse Lai: A genius like me could get great pay anywhere. Jesse Lai: It's not my concern at all.;<> Jesse Lai: How should I put it... ->Being seen as a traitor by the Ops team. Jesse Lai: Hmph. That would be a nuisance...;<> Jesse Lai: But overall manageable. Jesse Lai: So I wouldn't call it a concern. Jesse Lai: How should I put it...;<> ->Wayne won't really listen to you. Jesse Lai: You're right, kinda... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: I consider working with him, because I can stop him from making stupid decisions.;<> Jesse Lai: Screening has won the game, hands down. Jesse Lai: Given that, I should stay on their side, to keep them chaperoned, in case they get blinded by idealism and trip over themselves. Jesse Lai: Screening, though, is essentially a bunch of gung-ho idealists brought together by Wayne's cult of personality.;<> Jesse Lai: They do take their belief seriously, to the extent of being delusional. Jesse Lai: They will give one hell lot of pressure, to me and Wayne alike.;<> Jesse Lai: In that case, I probably won't be able to point out Wayne's mistakes. Jesse Lai: Don't get me wrong. Wayne is a smart guy. Normally he'd listen to me alright.;<> Jesse Lai: If surrounded and encouraged by his cultists, though... <<#Simple(8)>> ->You won't be able to talk to him? Jesse Lai: Not really. There will definitely be opportunities.;<> Jesse Lai: My concern is that... ->He won't listen to you anymore. Jesse Lai: Yes.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: I can talk till my tongue falls out and he won't listen to a word of it.;<> Jesse Lai: What's the point, if that's where we're going? Jesse Lai: This is why I must make sure at least someone in Screening could keep a cool head.;<> //if成功 <<#If($DLStateFloat>-3)>> Jesse Lai: You just did a lot to address my concern, really. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Meaning you agree to help Wayne? Jesse Lai: Of course. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if失敗 <<#If($DLStateFloat<-2)>> Jesse Lai: What you just did only worsened my concern. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I don't get it. Jesse Lai: You don't need to get it. ->Hold on. I'm not giving Wayne my unconditional support. Jesse Lai: Maybe, but you did show a very emotional side. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What's wrong with being emotional? I'm only human. Jesse Lai: Let's just say I expect something more than the average human. ->Normally I'm a lot cooler. Jesse Lai: Sorry, but I don't believe you. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Anyway, you can go now. Thought: Hmm...;<> Thought: Guess I have to bring Wayne bad news, then... <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> Jesse Lai: You can go now. I will discuss the specifics with Wayne. Jesse Lai: Unless you have something else to say? <>;<> <<@賴潔最後問答>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->How well do you think Justin is handling it? ($DLStateFloat4) <> Jesse Lai: Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He just put on one heck of a show at the Screening office. Jesse Lai: For real? How bad was it? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->He was shouting his brain out. ->Nuclear fallout. ->Let's just say he hurt a fair share of feelings. <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: ...;<> Jesse Lai: He was doing everything he could to stay on top of the situation... Jesse Lai: Nah, never mind. Jesse Lai: He came to me and gave me some assignments.;<> Jesse Lai: Whatever he did upstairs, he didn't do it here. ->I just care about him. Jesse Lai: Ah. <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: He got the notice from Wayne, and explained the situation to the entire Ops team via group email.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What did he say? // ->Let me guess. The message involved creative cursing...? Jesse Lai: No, he took it rather calmly. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Just said the lead of Screening might take over Ops going forward.;<> Jesse Lai: Then we had a nuclear fallout. Jesse Lai: I can't tell what's going on in his mind. Jesse Lai: However, if you do ask me... Jesse Lai: I guess he's brooding in a corner somewhere. Jesse Lai: He's the kind of guy with a ton of drama going on beneath the surface... <<#GoTo(@賴潔最後問答)>> ->Do you call that a fight? The dispute between me and Packs? ($DLStateFloat2) <> //if有吵起來 <<#If($DLStateFloat<-1)>> Jesse Lai: What else would you call it?;<> Jesse Lai: What? Having second thoughts? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No, just asking. ->It's not my fault. Jesse Lai: Whatever.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Whoever's fault it is, don't drag me into it. <<#EndIf>> //if沒吵起來 <<#If($DLStateFloat>-2)>> Jesse Lai: A quick guess, I'd say he's losing his temper somewhere.;<> Jesse Lai: It's his own problem, not your fault. Jesse Lai: Why? Do you really care that much about what he thinks of you?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Not really. Jesse Lai: Haha.;<> ->More or less. Jesse Lai: Oh? I'm surprised.;<> ->I don't like having fights with people. Jesse Lai: I'm exactly the opposite. Thought: That's why she's picking fights all the time, huh... Jesse Lai: Chillax.;<> <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#EndIf>> Jesse Lai: Packs doesn't hold grudges, at least not for long.;<> Jesse Lai: He did say a ton of crap, but chances are he didn't mean it. Jesse Lai: You guys can talk it out when he calms down.;<> <<#GoTo(@賴潔最後問答)>> ->I'm done with questions. Jesse Lai: Good. <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: ... Jesse Lai: Listen, Jason. Jesse Lai: I'm a software expert. Justin knows both software and hardware. Jesse Lai: Whatever opinion I can provide, is limited to my professional domain. Jesse Lai: That said, Justin is a much better source of opinions.;<> Jesse Lai: What I've learned from life is that it takes both sides of the story to get an accurate map of the big picture. Jesse Lai: We are now making a bet. Nothing is guaranteed, but we must maximize our chance in any way we can.;<> Jesse Lai: Wayne is still trying to keep Ops involved, but Justin has given up. Jesse Lai: This is why I'm taking Wayne's side. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I can tell. Jesse Lai: Yeah.;<> ->Why do you bother explaining this to me? Jesse Lai: Dunno, just wanna.;<> Jesse Lai: Aaaand you're a sucker if you believed that. Jesse Lai: I'm explaining because I want you to know that we don't have the perfect answer, yet.;<> Jesse Lai: This farm, this dispute, this whole drama...;<> Jesse Lai: There has to be a better solution somewhere, I believe. Jesse Lai: Even if this solution is no show in the end... Jesse Lai: I still want people to acknowledge its existence, to keep on looking.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I don't think it's gonna change anything. Jesse Lai: You have every right to. Thought: I can tell she doesn't want to admit it. ->I believe in the same thing. Jesse Lai: Good. Believing is the first step. You have made a good start. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Now, I have plenty of work to do. Jesse Lai: You're free to go now. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> <>;<> <<#End>>

title: 面談駱思敏
body:
//貧民窟刺青+9辣媽
Frances Cheng(c): Ms. Situ and 23 are not back yet. We must handle this on our own!
Frances Cheng(c): Jason, you can only pick one contract candidate.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐低頭)>>
Frances Cheng(c): Pay close attention. Find out the one ideal for questioning.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->How can I tell?
->Leave it to me.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng(c): 23 said you could press them on the child issue, do it in a harsh way.
Frances Cheng(c): See which one is more cooperative.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->What if they're both uncooperative?
    Frances Cheng(c): Flip a coin, maybe? Haha...
->Leave it to me.
    //
->Define "cooperative"?
    Frances Cheng(c): Hmm...
    Frances Cheng(c): More...willing to answer your harsh questions?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng(c): I will stay online for support.
Frances Cheng(c): Let me see...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐低頭返回)>>
Frances Cheng(c): The first candidate is here.
Frances Cheng(c): Name's Simone Lo. Barely anything on her profile.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐低頭)>>
Frances Cheng(c): It only says she deals drugs and has ties with certain gangs.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Drug dealer?
    Frances Cheng(c): Yes, a common profession in Taihe District.
->I thought dopeheads weren't fit for flop contribution?
    Frances Cheng(c): Wow, you know that?
    Frances Cheng(c): I see you've mastered the business of this farm.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng(c): If Helper's files are to be trusted, she doesn't use drugs herself.
Frances Cheng(c): Hey, she's coming...!
Frances Cheng(c): Good luck!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_面談側坐低頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 程芳和解前提醒
body: //簽約室外面乘方攔住主角進去前說了點話 Frances Cheng(c): Wait, J. Frances Cheng(c): Before you go in, hear me out.;<> Frances Cheng(c): A bit of advice from personal experience. Frances Cheng(c): ... Frances Cheng(c): Justin and Wayne are smart guys. They both believe they have the ideal solution. Frances Cheng(c): However, given everything that happened, they're both very much biased. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What should I do? // ->I think they should have left that behind. Frances Cheng(c): Not so simple. Frances Cheng(c): It takes years to really drop biases. Frances Cheng(c): Especially the bad ones. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //if操作組 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> Frances Cheng(c): Approaching Wayne, I suppose you might want to remind him of reality. Frances Cheng(c): He's an idealist. Frances Cheng(c): Being an idealist, sometimes he focuses on what could happen instead of what will happen. Frances Cheng(c): Without knowing, he'd resort to cherry-picking, in order to build his case. Frances Cheng(c): In severe cases, he could switch to denial mode. Frances Cheng(c): Wishing so hard for something that he disregards anything that suggests otherwise. Frances Cheng(c): This happens a lot to people who believe they're doing the right thing. Frances Cheng(c): The good guys never die, or so we believe, as told over and over again in stories and movies, right? <<#Simple(8)>> ->I kind of dig him. ->Ridiculous. Frances Cheng(c): Haha... ->We believe? Frances Cheng(c): Haha... Frances Cheng(c): I mean Wayne and I. I think we're the same kind of people. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Anyway, what I'm trying to say is... Frances Cheng(c): You might want to remind Wayne of this reality we're facing. <<#EndIf>> //if篩選組 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> Frances Cheng(c): I think you should make Justin understand that Wayne's plan is not a pipe dream. Frances Cheng(c): The problem with Justine is that he sees life as a linear queue of issues, to be tackled one at a time. Frances Cheng(c): He never suspected there are other perspectives, and doesn't care about issues two steps down the road. Frances Cheng(c): To him, casualties in the Cellar is the only issue, and the obvious solution is to shut it down. Frances Cheng(c): In that sense, anyone suggesting otherwise must be the bad guys. Frances Cheng(c): He simply does not see possibilities, alternatives, or human factors such as factions in the board. Frances Cheng(c): It's your job to help him understand. Frances Cheng(c): Make him realize that other people's ideas can be legit, too. Frances Cheng(c): That his usual you-know-nothing snobby stance is counterproductive. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I will try. Frances Cheng(c): Good. ->Is he snobby? Frances Cheng(c): Hard to say. Frances Cheng(c): He doesn't think so, but people who he talks to wouldn't agree. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): J, to be honest, I don't really enjoy talking to people like Justin. Frances Cheng(c): But they are often the experts of something, and sometimes we may need their expertise. Frances Cheng(c): Sometimes they need a gentle reminder. Frances Cheng(c): Reminding them that each coin has two sides. <<#EndIf>> Frances Cheng(c): Okay, that's all I wanted to say. Frances Cheng(c): Good luck! <<#Simple(8)>> ->Sure. // ->Thank you, Fran. Frances Cheng(c): You're welcome! ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#End>>

title: 兩人一起抵達2
body: Wayne Zheng: Phew...;<>;<> Justin Wu: ...;<> Wayne Zheng: Hell yes! We did it!!!;<>;<> Justin Wu: Well done, Wayne. Wayne Zheng: You deserve a pat on the back, Justin my friend!;<> Wayne Zheng: It's you who rushed out a report in barely any time at all, or else we wouldn't have a proposal! Justin Wu: Haha. Wayne Zheng: Time to celebrate!;<> Wayne Zheng: In my office! Justin Wu: Sounds like an idea. Wayne Zheng: Come on! You, too, Jason!;<> Justin Wu: Wayne, you forgot... Wayne Zheng: Ah, right!;<> Wayne Zheng: You will need to stay a little bit longer, Jason.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Why? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Yuna Hsu of the IIB wants to see you.;<> Wayne Zheng: She said you know about the appointment? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->OK, I see. Wayne Zheng: Yeah.;<> ->Nope, I don't. Wayne Zheng: Really? There must be some kind of miscommunication.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: You just wait here. Wayne Zheng: She got in touch with me before my meeting with Mr. Yan. Told me to pass the message that she needs you for something.;<> Wayne Zheng: Keep in mind that you're not obliged to bear with her. If you feel offended, just stand up and go.;<> Wayne Zheng: I will handle the fallout. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I see. ->It's gonna be OK. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Good to know.;<> Wayne Zheng: Then we're off. Time for a celebration party!;<> Wayne Zheng: Join us when you're done with Hsu! Wayne Zheng: See you later!;<> <> <<#End>>

title: 程芳評論寂靜結局
body: //政委或俊恩或兩人離開一段距離後 //IF雙贏 <<#If($FabWinWin=0)>> Frances Cheng(c): You have done it!!!;//主角抖一下被嚇到;<> Frances Cheng(c): Yay!!! Thought: Ouch, that was loud...;<> Frances Cheng(c): I was holding my breath the whole time in case I interrupted you. Frances Cheng(c): That was intense. Frances Cheng(c): Hee hee... Frances Cheng(c): That was extraordinary, J!;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Chalk it up to good luck. Frances Cheng(c): Luck is nothing without hard work. Frances Cheng(c): You wanted to induce changes, and worked hard toward it. Luck comes at a later stage. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): None of this would happen if you decided to give up. Frances Cheng(c): So, you're the hero of the day. You deserve it!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Thank you. Frances Cheng(c): Don't be so formal with me, haha! ->I couldn't have done it without your help. Frances Cheng(c): We make a perfect team! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): I love you, J! <<#Simple(6)>> ->I love you, too. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Phew... <<#GoTo(@跳過一切非雙贏路線點)>> <<#EndIf>> //if篩選或操作勝利 <<#If($ConvincedTsaiShin=0||$ConvincedLaiJie=0)>> Frances Cheng(c): It worked out smoothly enough, J. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah. // ->I sort of knew it would. Frances Cheng(c): Eh? Did you? //if在面談階段說壓力大。 <<#If($FrancesStressOutMC=0)>> Frances Cheng(c): I thought someone was complaining about anxiety back in the consultation lobby? <<#EndIf>> Frances Cheng(c): Hee hee. ->I feel a bit sorry for Ops. ($MCBelongSelectDepartment);//只出現一個 ->I feel a bit sorry for Screening. ($MCBelongSelectDepartment);//只出現一個 Frances Cheng(c): But you had to choose one? <<#Simple(6)>> ->You think there could have been a better solution? Frances Cheng(c): Could be. Frances Cheng(c): I'm not there, and I don't really know them. Frances Cheng(c): So, I don't know. Frances Cheng(c): As long as we're doing okay, it's a win! <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. Frances Cheng(c): Yeah! ->The way you said it, I kinda feel I must have done something wrong. Frances Cheng(c): No! I didn't mean that! <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> //if篩選勝利 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> Frances Cheng(c): I believe Silencio will have a bright future under the leadership of Wayne. Frances Cheng(c): He's a man of action, a recognized leader, working with a team of kind, helpful people. Frances Cheng(c): Things will only get better from here. <<#EndIf>> //if操作組勝力 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> Frances Cheng(c): If Silencio really is shut down in the end, it will save the world a lot of injuries and deaths. Frances Cheng(c): Justin is kind of a snob, but he knows what he's doing. Frances Cheng(c): I believe they will give Silencio a funeral it deserves. <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'm not so optimistic. ->Hopefully. Frances Cheng(c): Show some confidence! ->Yes. // ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@跳過一切非雙贏路線點)>> <<#EndIf>> //IF篩選或操作失敗 Frances Cheng(c): Our hard work, it's all for nothing... <<#Simple(8)>> ->What? ->Yeah. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Maybe maintaining the status quo is the best outcome for Silencio.;<> Frances Cheng(c): I mean, with so many opposing factions and forces wrestling for power... Frances Cheng(c): It's impossible to make any chance. Every action is cancelled out by a reaction. Thought: If only I could unite Ops and Screening... <<#Simple(8)>> ->What would you say, Fran? Is this my fault? Frances Cheng(c): What? <<#Simple(9999)>> ->Nah, never mind. Frances Cheng(c): OK. ->If only I managed to get Jesse on our side. ($MCBelongSelectDepartment);//只出現一個 ->If only I managed to get Cathy on our side. ($MCBelongControlDepartment);//只出現一個 Frances Cheng(c): ... Frances Cheng(c): I do think failing to get support from the other team is a critical factor. Frances Cheng(c): Things could have gone differently if you managed to get their help. Thought: Fran thinks so, too, huh... Frances Cheng(c): But fundamentally, the chronic lack of trust between Ops and Screening is to blame. Frances Cheng(c): The attempt to lobby them today is more like a last resort. Frances Cheng(c): It's not your fault, J. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Thank you, Fran. Frances Cheng(c): Good. ->I still feel guilty for not being able to do better. Frances Cheng(c): It's alright. Frances Cheng(c): You have the best you could at every step. Frances Cheng(c): Wouldn't you call it good enough? Thought: ...Good enough, huh? <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Hey, let's not dwell on it. Frances Cheng(c): This matter is now put to rest. <<@跳過一切非雙贏路線點>> Frances Cheng(c): That's one less thing to worry about. Thought: ...Yeah. Frances Cheng(c): Um, sorry, J, excuse me for a moment. Frances Cheng(c): 23 needs my help. Frances Cheng(c): I'll be off the radio for a while.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Are they back yet? Frances Cheng(c): They should be soon...enough? ->Sure. Go. Frances Cheng(c): Yeah. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Talk to you later. <<#End>>

title: 篩選組勝利慶功宴2
body:
Wayne Zheng: Jason.
Wayne Zheng: I know you're new to the company, so new that you haven't officially started yet.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手)>>
Wayne Zheng: However...
Wayne Zheng: Allow me to address you as a real member of the team.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: It's only been a couple of days, but you have witnessed the hardest time that Screening has ever faced, and stood with us.
Wayne Zheng: Furthermore, you have played a critical role in everything that happened.
Wayne Zheng: Thank you.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->You're welcome.
    Wayne Zheng: Haha.
->Well, no biggie.
->Just did what I've gotta do.
    Wayne Zheng: Don't be so modest.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng: However, like I said...;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭)>>
Wayne Zheng: Going forward, we will only face more challenges.
Wayne Zheng: I'm glad to have you with us.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭返回)>>
Wayne Zheng: OK. That's all I want to say, friend to friend.
Wayne Zheng: It's incredible, having survived everything and contributed so much as a new member.
Wayne Zheng: You're quite a piece of work, Jason.
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Um, thank you?
    Wayne Zheng: Yeah, take it as a giant compliment!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng: Now, don't let me hold you any longer. Go hang out with the team.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手)>>
Wayne Zheng: You deserve a break!
<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手返回)>>
<<#End>>
