title: 阿緯抵達2
body: //if說服賴潔成功 <<#If($ConvincedLaiJie=0)>> <> Wayne Zheng: We did it! This is incredible! Wayne Zheng: Hell yes!;<> Wayne Zheng: Now we've saved Silencio, saved the lives of many, many people.;<> Wayne Zheng: ... Thought: Is he shaking...? Wayne Zheng: ...;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->What's up? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: It feels so weird when this gigantic load is finally off my mind. Haha... Wayne Zheng: Geez...;<> Wayne Zheng: All the hard work we did, it's all paid off. Wayne Zheng: We can revive Silencio! We will!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->We most definitely will. Wayne Zheng: Yeah! Thank you. ->It's not gonna be easy. Wayne Zheng: Yeah. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: This may be cliché, but... Wayne Zheng: I seriously do believe in the power in unity. As long as we work as a team, we can do anything!;<> Wayne Zheng: Haha!; Wayne Zheng: Oh, I'll make an announcement to the entire Screening team!;<> Wayne Zheng: Can't wait to share the good news! Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: OK, let's go back to the office.;<> Wayne Zheng: Oh, wait, Jason, you may have to stay a bit longer.;<> <<#EndIf>> //if說服賴潔失敗 <<#If($ConvincedLaiJie=-1)>> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: We failed, huh.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You tried. Wayne Zheng: Haha, that I did... ->But we saved the farm. Wayne Zheng: Can't argue with that. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: If only we had the data and support from Ops... Thought: Because I failed to persuade Jesse... <<#Simple(8)>> ->My fault. ->Sorry, I failed you. Wayne Zheng: No, don't say that.;<> Wayne Zheng: None of this is your fault. Wayne Zheng: You were given a very challenging task on short notice, without any preparation. Wayne Zheng: If anyone is to blame, it's me.;<> Wayne Zheng: I should have started this conversation with Jesse sooner. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: We had an opportunity, but I failed to grasp it.;<> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: You know what? I'm actually feeling great, Jason. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Because Yan kept your position as the lead of Screening? Wayne Zheng: No. ->Because we saved Silencio? Wayne Zheng: Yeah. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Just between you and me, this is as good as I hoped for.;<> Wayne Zheng: Couldn't have asked for any better. Wayne Zheng: Phew... Wayne Zheng: It feels weird, with a gigantic load suddenly off my mind...;<> Wayne Zheng: Wonderful. We saved the lives of a lot of people. Wayne Zheng: I'm doing every bit of my job as a division lead and then some. Haha.;<> Wayne Zheng: Let me spread the news.;<> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: I wonder how well they will take this news...? Thought: He sounds nervous. <> <<#Simple(10)>> ->Probably not very well, because you didn't get the manager's position.;<> Wayne Zheng: Maybe... ->They should be happy enough. We saved the farm! Wayne Zheng: ...Is that so? Wayne Zheng: Hmm... ->I guess they will just take it as it is. Wayne Zheng: ...Is that so? Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: That would be great. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: This sucks.;<> Wayne Zheng: I really don't want to disappoint. Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Well, guess I can't do much about it, haha...;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->You didn't disappoint. They will hug you with a big smile. Wayne Zheng: Haha! Wayne Zheng: Thank you, Jason. Wayne Zheng: Thanks for saying that. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'm serious. //if剛剛選失落 <<#If($DLStateFloat=0)>> Wayne Zheng: Didn't you just say they may not take it very well? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I was kidding. ->They may, not necessarily. Wayne Zheng: I see, haha. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: Let's just hope so. ->You're welcome! ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: OK, we should go. Wayne Zheng: Oh, wait, Jason, you may have to stay a bit longer. <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Why? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Yuna Hsu of the IIB wants to see you. Wayne Zheng: She said you know about the appointment? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->OK, I see. Wayne Zheng: OK. ->Nope, I don't. Wayne Zheng: Really? There must be some kind of miscommunication. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: You just wait here.;<> Wayne Zheng: She got in touch with me before my meeting with Mr. Yan. Told me to pass the message that she needs you for something. Wayne Zheng: Keep in mind that you're not obliged to bear with her. If you feel offended, just stand up and go.;<> Wayne Zheng: I will handle the fallout. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I see. ->It's gonna be OK. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Good to know.;<> Wayne Zheng: I'll be going, then. They're waiting for me. Wayne Zheng: Join us when you're done with Hsu! Wayne Zheng: See you later! <> <<#End>>

title: 跟隆生確認怎麼簽約2
body: Lawrence Chang: We're in. Lawrence Chang: Eh, so...;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: What do we do next? Nin Situ(c): 23;<> 23(c): Listen up.;<> 23(c): Our objective is to find out which gang did they sell their children to. 23(c): They will not acknowledge the deal, because, obviously, human trafficking is illegal.;<> 23(c): Just hit them head-on with questions about their kids. 23(c): Also, work out a story to make these questions a legit part of contract due diligence. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Roger. // ->Will that even work? Lawrence Chang: Don't think so. ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): It's a probing move. See how they respond, then improvise.;<> Nin Situ(c): Let's play the good cop, bad cop trick. Lawrence Chang: Yeah, it works all the time!;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'm OK either way. 23(c): Good. ->What trick is that? 23(c): One of you be as oppressive as you can, then the other guy gives a helping hand just when they start to get unnerved.;<> 23(c): Essentially, create a situation where they would happily choose to rely on one of you. 23(c): It's a classic trick in interrogation.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ(c): One of you will be the good cop, the other the bad cop.;<> Nin Situ(c): Feel free to pick and choose. Lawrence Chang: Tough choice...;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You can play the bad cop. You did it yesterday. Lawrence Chang: You mean at the Flop Core...?;<> Lawrence Chang: You saw my acting and it was crap! <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Right. Lawrence Chang: ...Could you pretend to hesitate a little before saying right? 23(c): So what? You're the bad cop, Jason? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'd rather leave it to Lawrence.;<> Lawrence Chang: Sure thing! I'll nail the performance this time! ->Yeah, leave it to me.;<> 23(c): Roger. <<#EndSimple>> ->No, you did pretty good. Lawrence Chang: Okay...? I'll be the bad cop then? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah.;<> Lawrence Chang: No problem! ->Actually, I kinda want to play the bad cop this time.;<> Lawrence Chang: Then you're the bad cop, Jason. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->I'll be the bad cop.;<> ->I'll be the good cop.;<> Lawrence Chang: Then I'll leave that to you, Jason.;<> <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Made up your mind?;<> 23(c): Here goes the routine. The bad cop takes the lead, be as mean as possible. Bully them, break them.;<> 23(c): When they're about to crumble, the good cop takes over. 23(c): Make them grateful for what you offer and willingly do whatever you ask. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'll try. Lawrence Chang: Me, too!;<> ->Is there a red line somewhere for the bad cop? 23(c): Uh, truth be told... 23(c): You're not real cops. The worst you can do is to deny them this job. 23(c): There could be other cards to play, but let's not get ahead of ourselves.;<> 23(c): Invoke your inner bully and play whatever card you have. Nin Situ(c): There doesn't have to be much at stake. There are many ways to make them feel inferior or insecure.;<> Nin Situ(c): Take advantage of your higher social caste to instill fear.;<> Thought: We haven't even begun and I'm already ashamed of myself...;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ(c): Attention, you both. Nin Situ(c): You represent the power and privilege of a leading corporation. They, on the other hand, are the dregs of society. Nin Situ(c): In their eyes, your presence alone carries power.;<> Nin Situ(c): They will subconsciously see you as the avatars of Vision.;<> Nin Situ(c): Powerful, cold-blooded, indifferent, looking down your nose at them.;<> Nin Situ(c): Once this conversation starts, they will soon realize there's no negotiation to speak of.;<> Nin Situ(c): They are practically begging you for a bone.;<> Nin Situ(c): That realization will leave them shaken. Nin Situ(c): Take advantage of that. Lawrence Chang: Roger that.;<>;<> Thought: Lawrence is suddenly all serious... 23(c): OK, here comes the first one.;<> //if有洛斯 <<#If($ChooseWhoSign=1||$KnowTimeGapUseComputer=0)>> 23(c): Simone Lo. //if剛剛問過她小孩在哪 <<#If($KnowLuoWhereKids=0)>> <<#Simple(6)>> ->I already asked her about her child earlier. Nin Situ(c): What did she say?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Said the child's at home, taken care of by a grandparent or something. 23(c): Grandparent...? 23(c): Her profile shows there's only one grandma and she's in coma. 23(c): There can't possibly be anyone babysitting the child for her. ->Didn't really say anything useful. 23(c): Hmm... <<#EndSimple>> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Nin Situ(c): Try again and harder. Press her. //IF主角扮黑臉 <<#If($PlayGoodBadCop=-1)>> Nin Situ(c): Can you do that, Jason?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes, ma'am. Nin Situ(c): Good. <> ->I don't want to be so mean. 23(c): ...Then you're not the bad cop material. 23(c): Think again. Switch roles while you still can. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I can be the bad cop. Let me try. Nin Situ(c): Good. ->Sorry, I guess this should be Lawrence's job.;<> Lawrence Chang: Huh? Can I do it?;<> Nin Situ(c): That settles that. <> <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //IF隆生扮黑臉 <<#If($PlayGoodBadCop=1)>> Nin Situ(c): Assume your new role, Lawrence. Lawrence Chang: Roger!;<> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> //if是陳昇 <<#If($ChooseWhoSign=2)>> 23(c): Shawn Chen. 23(c): He's a special case because he did report to the police about a missing son. <<#EndIf>> <<#If($ChooseWhoSign=0)>> <<#GoTo(@第一簽約人直接是任誠磊)>> <<#EndIf>> 23(c): Let's begin. <<#End>>

title: 徐媛收尾2
body: //等一小段時間 Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: Listen, Jason.;<> Yuna Hsu: I trust you're doing this for Frances?;<> Thought: She's far from as harsh as before... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. // ->No. Yuna Hsu: Is that so? Yuna Hsu: Frances will be sad. Yuna Hsu: Although I think you're lying. ->What you want? ->None of your business. Yuna Hsu: Relax. This is our one last meeting. You won't see me again. Thought: ... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: I feel we are somehow alike.;<> Thought: Now she's almost friendly... Yuna Hsu: We both care about a special someone, willing to sacrifice the whole world for them.;<> Yuna Hsu: The thing is, this special someone keeps diving headlong into danger, despite our warnings. Yuna Hsu: What can we do, other than standing outside the field and watching? Thought: Fran...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What are you getting at? // ->Yeah, we are alike in that sense. Thought: She means it. It's not a trick question. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: There are only two things we can do.;<> Yuna Hsu: One, keep them on a tight leash, away from danger but against their will.;<> Yuna Hsu: Two, let them do whatever they want, and try to be an invisible guardian angel.;<> Yuna Hsu: I can't imagine Frances on a leash of any kind. So I assume you're taking approach two. Yuna Hsu: No, not quite.;<> Yuna Hsu: The things she does, you don't have what it takes to be a guardian angel. Thought: ...;<>;<> Yuna Hsu: That is, until now. Yuna Hsu: Now Frances is injured and confined. You're finally able to offer some real protection.;<> Yuna Hsu: Am I wrong?;<> Thought: Nope. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Nope. Yuna Hsu: You must be exhausted. Thought: ... ->So what? Yuna Hsu: So... ->I don't see where this conversation is going. Yuna Hsu: It's going toward our shared ailment, Dai. <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: We are the same, deep down inside. Yuna Hsu: And I pity us for that. Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: You made a grave mistake.;<> Yuna Hsu: You thought nothing bad could possibly happen to you as long as you mind your own business and stay below the radar. Yuna Hsu: You thought being a nobody within a behemoth organization provides shelter. Yuna Hsu: It's an irrational, childish idea.;<> Yuna Hsu: Hard as you tried, you couldn't keep Frances out of harm's way. <<#Simple(8)>> ->That's because she challenged the impossible. Yuna Hsu: What she did only made it happen sooner.;<> Yuna Hsu: Do you think she could stay out of this vortex, even if she did nothing? Thought: No, as the farm supervisor...;<>;<> Thought: She'd be caught in the middle of it anyway. <> ->She chose her own path. Yuna Hsu: And you chose yours. Yuna Hsu: Your path boils down to doing nothing other than waiting for catastrophes to happen. Thought: I... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Being an insignificant part of a behemoth gives a false sense of security. Yuna Hsu: The behemoth doesn't care about you, doesn't treat you well. It even abuses you sometimes.;<> Yuna Hsu: Still, you happily play your part. Yuna Hsu: Exploit as it may, it provides predictability, which could be construed as reliability. Yuna Hsu: Do your job, day in, day out, and nothing out of the ordinary will happen.;<> Yuna Hsu: Sadly, the world doesn't work that way. Yuna Hsu: The behemoth has weak spots, and people take advantage of them all the time.;<> Yuna Hsu: In doing so, they may damage your interest without being aware of it. Yuna Hsu: Suddenly you, the good boy obeying all the rules, take the blunt end of their actions. Yuna Hsu: Life is like a gamble, don't you get it?;<>;<> Yuna Hsu: "At least I'm not that sucker with the most to lose." Yeah, keep telling yourself that. Yuna Hsu: But sometimes you are that sucker. Yuna Hsu: Like right now.;<> Yuna Hsu: Be prepared, Dai. Be on your toes. Yuna Hsu: I'm not telling you to change the world, to start a revolution. Yuna Hsu: One change at a time, making the world a better place, yadda yadda... Yuna Hsu: This kind of thinking gets you killed.;<> Yuna Hsu: I'm telling you to stay alert, leap at any opportunity to take advantage of the system. Join them, not fight them. Yuna Hsu: Or better still, outplay them and be the master of the behemoth you're in. Yuna Hsu: This is what I've been doing, staying ahead of the game.;<> Yuna Hsu: You want a future? A cozy bubble of your own? Well, earn it, fight for it, kill for it. Yuna Hsu: You know how to keep yourself afloat when water starts rising?;<> Yuna Hsu: Always make sure you stand on top of somebody. Yuna Hsu: Stand on top of everybody. Yuna Hsu: Don't you agree?;<> Thought: She's making a hell lot of sense... <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I do. Yuna Hsu: Then you're a smart man. Yuna Hsu: You can still be salvaged. Thought: ... ->I beg to differ. Yuna Hsu: Oh? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Being on top of everybody is a shitty position. Yuna Hsu: Because you're everyone's target? That much is true.;<> Yuna Hsu: Don't forget you also wield more power than anyone else does. <> ->You're paranoid. Not everyone is out to get you.;<> Yuna Hsu: You still don't get it. Yuna Hsu: Everyone is not out to get me, not intentionally.;<> Yuna Hsu: They are simply maximizing their own benefits, pushing me around while they're at it. Yuna Hsu: You, me, we're part of the collateral damage.;<> Yuna Hsu: Like a tuft of grass. They trod on us without thinking. ->The world is going to hell if everyone takes your advice. Yuna Hsu: First of all, not everyone will take my advice. Yuna Hsu: There are selfless people who believe they live and die for the greater good.;<> Yuna Hsu: I respect them, although I wouldn't want to be in their shoes. You shouldn't be, either. Thought: ...True enough.;<> Yuna Hsu: Then, the world will not go to hell, not all of it. Yuna Hsu: The part that takes my wakeup call sooner will actually be better off. <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: The choice is up to you. Yuna Hsu: Will you sit on your ass and wait to be crushed? Yuna Hsu: Or would you rather take action before push comes to shove? <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: There, I have given my free advice. Yuna Hsu: What to make of it? It's all up to you.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Well, thanks for saying it. // ->It's a total waste of breath. Yuna Hsu: You can just say "I'm dumb", you know. <<#Simple(8)>> ->The hell did you say? Yuna Hsu: Haha... Yuna Hsu: That was supposed to be a joke. ->I'm not dumb. It's just that I don't agree. Yuna Hsu: OK good yeah I see. Yuna Hsu: I'm not here to argue with you. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I'll think about it. Yuna Hsu: Good for you. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: Now, seriously. Yuna Hsu: Do you think I'm a bad person? <> <<@回答徐媛她是不是壞人>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. Yuna Hsu: Thought so.;<> Yuna Hsu: ... ->No. Yuna Hsu: ... Thought: ...It feels creepy when she gives an actually friendly smile.;<> ->A bad person? Do you care? ($DLStateFloat2);//選過消失 <> Yuna Hsu: Just answer me. <<#GoTo(@回答徐媛她是不是壞人)>> <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: When you strive so hard toward a goal, paying all the prices and making all the sacrifices... Yuna Hsu: Sometimes it forms a self-sustaining cycle.;<> Yuna Hsu: The more you learn... Yuna Hsu: The more enemies and traps you see. Yuna Hsu: Suddenly the world is a giant minefield. Yuna Hsu: You must try even harder to keep what you have. //IF剛剛有選你覺得別人都在害你 <<#If($DLStateFloat=0)>> Yuna Hsu: Just like you said. <<#EndIf>> Yuna Hsu: I grow paranoid, believe the whole world is out to get me.;<> Yuna Hsu: I'm so tired, Dai. I sleep with one eye open and my armor on. Yuna Hsu: That's why I cherish moments like this.;<> Thought: ... Yuna Hsu: A moment that I can speak my mind to someone who will never be my enemy, not in the foreseeable future.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Don't be so sure. Maybe I will be your enemy. Yuna Hsu: That I'm not worried about. Yuna Hsu: Even if you turn against me, you won't be a threat. Thought: ... Yuna Hsu: Don't take offense just yet.;<> Yuna Hsu: You won't be a threat, because you're a good man. Yuna Hsu: A good man won't have the heart to do what it takes to bring me down. Yuna Hsu: Wouldn't you say so?;<> Thought: ... ->This conversation...is to make you unwind? Yuna Hsu: Exactly. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: It's about time. I should go.;<> Yuna Hsu: Too much time wasted. Thought: Ah, the old Yuna Hsu is back. Yuna Hsu: One last thing that you might want to know.;<> Yuna Hsu: I ran a thorough background research on you. Yuna Hsu: And I found nothing at all. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Good for me. Yuna Hsu: As simple-minded as ever, huh... ->Why did you do that? Yuna Hsu: At this stage I have more than enough reason to do that. Yuna Hsu: ...But that is not the point. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: I, with the resources and connections of Vision, can't find anything on you? That's ridiculous.;<> Yuna Hsu: It means whoever is backing you could outplay Vision. Yuna Hsu: You're working with a ticking bomb, you know that? Yuna Hsu: When they need to work with a nobody like you, they only want a tool.;<> Yuna Hsu: A disposable tool. Easy to silence. Can't fight back. Yuna Hsu: You'd better keep that in mind. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I will. // ->Is this from personal experience? Yuna Hsu: ... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Goodbye, Dai. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Thought: ...;<> Thought: I should go back to the office. <<#End>> //if早上跟執行長對話有牽扯徐媛 // 對了，最後警告你一下。 // 控制好自己的情緒。 // 你之前在跟嚴勝和進行無意義爭吵的時候，說出了你跟芳姊的關係。 // 嚴勝和很可能會利用這點。 // 別讓你的敵人對你有所了解 // 如果真的要這樣做，也應該是你為了利用他而主動洩漏情報。 // 不是控制不住自己的亂發飆。 ////

title: 雙贏路線阿緯俊恩頂樓3
body: //海風吹過的聲音安靜了一下子 Wayne Zheng: ...;<>;<> Justin Wu: ...;<> Wayne Zheng: Can't believe we did it...;<>;<> Justin Wu: Yeah.;<> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: I mean, this is almost too good to be true.;<>;<> Justin Wu: This is where you wake up and find out it's just a dream.;<> Wayne Zheng: Oh yeah? Haha.;<> Wayne Zheng: ...;<> Justin Wu: ... Wayne Zheng: Come to think about it... Wayne Zheng: I guess we know the final solution all along... Wayne Zheng: We didn't have to rush it out at the last moment. Wayne Zheng: We just chose not to recognize it as a possibility... Justin Wu: Yeah, more or less. Justin Wu: We have been avoiding this partnership... Wayne Zheng: In hindsight, I was ridiculously stubborn. Justin Wu: I wasn't doing any better, either.;<> Wayne Zheng: ... <<#Simple(18)>> ->Because you each had your own responsibilities?;<> Justin Wu: Care to explain?;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Yeah, enlighten me. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->A whole team of people was relying on you. The stake was too high. Justin Wu: The stake, huh... Wayne Zheng: You're right. I was trying everything to secure a future for the Screening team.;<> Wayne Zheng: What you said was true, Justin. Justin Wu: I didn't mean it...;<> Wayne Zheng: Didn't mean it, but true nonetheless. Justin Wu: The same applies to me, I guess. Justin Wu: Instead of juicers, what I really cared about was the wellbeing of the Ops team. Wayne Zheng: We were in the same boat. Justin Wu: Yeah. ->You were so desperate to prove yourselves right that every differing opinion had to be wrong. Wayne Zheng: That... Justin Wu: That I can relate.;<> Justin Wu: I was so focused on getting this one thing done, then someone told me I was not doing it quite right... Justin Wu: Of course I'd be hostile.;<> Justin Wu: I mean, why the hell can't this guy see I'm doing the right thing? Justin Wu: What will he get from screwing up my goals? Wayne Zheng: Ha! I was feeling kind of the same... Justin Wu: That's what makes us human, I guess. Wayne Zheng: That's what makes us real! Haha! <<#EndSimple>> ->Because you were both dead sure that you were doing the right thing. Wayne Zheng: Haha, is that so? Justin Wu: What do you mean?;<> Wayne Zheng: Who knows me best? Myself. A matter of course, eh?;<> Justin Wu: Yeah, and? Wayne Zheng: Since I knew that I was fighting for a good cause, and that I had tried everything... Wayne Zheng: Naturally, I couldn't possibly be wrong. Not too wrong, at least. Justin Wu: ... Wayne Zheng: This kind of thinking occurs especially when I feel challenged. Wayne Zheng: Then, as a knee jerk reflex, I snap back. Justin Wu: That summarizes my case. Wayne Zheng: My case, too. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: ... Justin Wu: ... Wayne Zheng: Jason.;<> Wayne Zheng: Me and Justin, together, we owe you a thank you.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I just did what I had to. ->Nah, don't bother with formalities. Wayne Zheng: You deserve it! Haha! ->Why? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: We would keep on fighting each other and dragging the farm further down the abyss, if not for you. Wayne Zheng: You opened our eyes.;<> Justin Wu: And saved us from a lot of mistakes.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Thank you, really.;<>;<> Justin Wu: Yeah, thank you.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You're totally welcome! ->And thank you for giving me this chance. Wayne Zheng: Haha! Justin Wu: Heh. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: ...;<>;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Seriously, guys, I'm not used to these good-ending moments. Wayne Zheng: Haha!;<> Justin Wu: I feel awkward, too. <> ->Man, I hope this moment could last forever. Wayne Zheng: Yeah.;<> Justin Wu: Agreed. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Breeze, beer, buddies.;<> Wayne Zheng: I wouldn't mind if this moment stretches into eternity.;<> Justin Wu: I wouldn't want that.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Huh?;<> Justin Wu: It's just a moment, dude. Don't overrate it.;<> Wayne Zheng: But— Justin Wu: If we want another one, we can just make it happen, any time!;<> Wayne Zheng: Eh...;<> Wayne Zheng: Hahahahaha! Wayne Zheng: You're right!;<> Justin Wu: Next time we should bring Cynthia along. Wayne Zheng: C-Cynthia?;<> //if有讓何芯翊去約鄭尾 <<#If($ConvinceHeShinYeeWeiLove=3)>> Justin Wu: Why so surprised? Bring your girlfriend, bro.;<> Wayne Zheng: Sure!;<> Wayne Zheng: Speaking of...;<> Wayne Zheng: I owe you my life, Jason!;<> Wayne Zheng: Cynthia told me everything!;<> Wayne Zheng: She wouldn't have asked me out if not for your counselling! <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Next time, take the initiative, when you're ready to move the relationship forward. Wayne Zheng: I will!;<> Wayne Zheng: ...Will try. <> ->Thank me with a fat raise, Mr. Manager. A promotion will do, too. Wayne Zheng: I can't abuse my power! Wayne Zheng: How about a dinner? I can make it a feast. Justin Wu: Meh. Wayne Zheng: Ugh... <<#Simple(8)>> ->That will do, too. ->I was kidding. Haha. Wayne Zheng: Phew... ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Justin Wu: Say, what do you do when you go out with Cynthia? Just tense up and freeze for hours at a time? Wayne Zheng: I'm not like that!;<> <<#EndIf>> Justin Wu: Sometimes you should man up.;<> Justin Wu: What do you say, Jason?;<> <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Can't agree more. ->Totally right! // ->Not necessary. Girls find him cute in his own way. Justin Wu: Hmm, I didn't think of that. Good point. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Hey, you folks!;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Phew...;<> Wayne Zheng: Yeah... Wayne Zheng: Change is coming to Silencio. I could use some change myself, too.;<> Justin Wu: We both.;<> Wayne Zheng: Right! Wayne Zheng: Let's make history!;<>;<> Justin Wu: Here be uplifting background music.;<> Wayne Zheng: Come on! Don't you feel the anticipation building?;<> Justin Wu: I do. It's slowly crushing me.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Haha! Wayne Zheng: Now.;<> Wayne Zheng: Jason, we've occupied enough of your time.;<>;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: Don't let us keep you any longer. Wayne Zheng: Keep in mind, though!;<> Wayne Zheng: We both owe you a big one, for saving this farm. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No such thing, man. Wayne Zheng: We do owe you one. I insist! Justin Wu: Me, too. ->I'll write that down. Haha. Justin Wu: Good. You do that. ->No, you saved the farm, you two together. Justin Wu: Someone puh-lease take the credit. Or else this will keep going forever. Wayne Zheng: Yeah, haha! <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: See you later, then. Justin Wu: Your job formally starts next week, right?;<> Wayne Zheng: Damn, I totally forgot about it.;<> Wayne Zheng: You did a hell of a lot before even starting the job.;<>;<> Wayne Zheng: I wonder how much more you will achieve afterwards.;<> Justin Wu: I've been wondering about that for a while. Wayne Zheng: Is this some kind of competition? Who has a better eye for talent?;<>;<> Justin Wu: Not at all. Wayne Zheng: I won't admit defeat, mind you! Wayne Zheng: Oh, you're free to go now, Jason.;<>;<> Justin Wu: See you later.;<> Wayne Zheng: See you later! <<#Simple(8)>> ->See you! // ->Can't wait to start my job for real. Wayne Zheng: Ha! Employee of the month. Justin Wu: Heh heh. ->It's been an honor working with you. Goodbye. Wayne Zheng: Why do you make it sound like we're parting ways for good? Justin Wu: Does he? Wayne Zheng: Yeah! It's like one of us is about to die! Wayne Zheng: Jason, you're an asset, a critical part of the team now! Wayne Zheng: Step up. Play your part with pride! Justin Wu: He just phrased it a bit more formally than necessary. Don't make so big a deal out of it. Justin Wu: You are right that he's a critical member of the team, though. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Ha! Thank you. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Okay, won't want to keep you any longer. Wayne Zheng: See you! Justin Wu: See you later. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <>;<>;<> <<#End>> //這裡之後可以加兩組爭寵，依據主角選得組

title: 跟黑面搭話2
body: Nathan Chuang: You clowns are screwing around again. The boss will—;<>;<> //if認出來 <<#If($DLStateFloat=0)>> Tighe Liu: Oi! Nathan! Isn't this the guy from the hospital— <<#EndIf>> Nathan Chuang: ...The hell?;<>;<> Nathan Chuang: He's the guy who beat the shit out of you at the hospital. Nathan Chuang: Don't tell me you didn't recognize him?;<>;<> Tighe Liu: Huh? I-I was about to say that!;<>;<> Thought: The shit's about to hit the fan... Thought: Come on, 23. Where are you when I'm in need? Nathan Chuang: Damn...;<> Nathan Chuang: You. Nathan Chuang: Shut down the mask already. We know who you are. Thought: ...;//這裡把投影關掉，然後下面主角的動畫都要換成沒有臉譜的版本 <> Nathan Chuang: So? What are you doing here? What do you want? Nathan Chuang: Revenge? Nathan Chuang: Tiger here wants to settle the score with you alright.;<> Nathan Chuang: You mopped the floor with him at the hospital.;<> Nathan Chuang: He still has bruises to show you.;<> Tighe Liu: Shut the fuck up.;<>;<>;<> Nathan Chuang: Listen up. We're in the middle of some real business. Nathan Chuang: You just walked into the wrong place at the wrong-est time ever. If I were you, I'd tell myself to—;<> Nathan Chuang: Get. The. Fuck. Out. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Where are you keeping the kids? Nathan Chuang: Kids...? Nathan Chuang: ...You know about our business, huh? ->I'm getting the fuck out, alright. // ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nathan Chuang: ...;<> Nathan Chuang: Wait. Nathan Chuang: Say, you're a mighty interesting guy, aren't you? Nathan Chuang: That bitch the boss told us to get rid of, she's your girlfriend, right? Nathan Chuang: ... Nathan Chuang: Now I want you to stay.;<> Nathan Chuang: I have a lot of questions for you. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Ask away. I can give answers right now. Nathan Chuang: Nope, don't bother. Nathan Chuang: You invent some bullshit on the fly, I call your bullshit out, you deny, then I beat the truth out of you? Nathan Chuang: Let's just cut the crap then skip ahead to the beating part. ->And I have a score to settle with you. Nathan Chuang: Aha! For real? Nathan Chuang: You know how many men I have in this room, in case you're visually impaired? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nathan Chuang: Teach him a lesson, Yin.;<> Tighe Liu: Hey! Let me do it! He's mine!;<>;<> Nathan Chuang: You got your ass handed to you last time.;<>;<> Nathan Chuang: What made you think you can beat him now? Tighe Liu: ...;<> Nathan Chuang: Sit on your ass and watch.;<> Nathan Chuang: Come on, Yin. Earn your pay. Yevin He: I must, with regret, decline.;<> Nathan Chuang: ... Nathan Chuang: ...Huh? Yevin He: The art of combat I practice is known as the Technique of Twins. Lacking my brother's presence, true power eludes me. Tighe Liu: Dayum... Nathan Chuang: ...The fuck? Where's your damn brother? Yevin He: In the midst of nature's call.;<> Nathan Chuang: Damn you! Are you fucking nuts or what? //聽到開門聲，攝影機往右移 <> Yannick He: BROTHER!!!!!!;<>;<>;<> Yevin He: MY BROTHER!!!!! Yannick He: I have made my return from the privy's call! Yevin He: My brother, lend thine ear to my words! Yevin He: The warrior before us stands as our foe!;<> Yannick He: If such is the case, we must engage him in battle! Nathan Chuang: Whatever. Cut this chivalry story crap...;<>;<>;<>;<> Nathan Chuang: Beat seven shades of shit out of him! Yevin He: By your command!;<>;<>;<> <<#End>> //進戰鬥

Thought: I, I can't breathe...

Camleon Bai: Come on, one kick can't kill you.
Camleon Bai: Keep breathing.
<<#End>>

title: 白壁虎踹人後對話2
body: Seth Lo: You're right. We caught an owl. Camleon Bai: But not a white-haired birdie.;//白壁虎沒有轉頭 Seth Lo: ...Yes. Camleon Bai: ... Seth Lo: We should pull out now. Seth Lo: The cargo is loaded. Ready to move any time. Camleon Bai: I told you to catch birds and keep them under watch, no? Seth Lo: He's in a cage, and there are four— Camleon Bai: Catch and watch. Isn't that what I told you? Seth Lo: ... Seth Lo: Yes, but for safety, we should now take everyone and go. Camleon Bai: No, no, no no no no no.;<> Camleon Bai: N and O both capitalized and written in red paint. Seth Lo: ... Camleon Bai: I don't blame you, though. You have never dealt with her.;<> Seth Lo: The order was to deliver the cargo on time. Everything else is— Camleon Bai: The order? The order was to NOT fire a bullet in the Flop Core. What did you do, huh? Seth Lo: ... Camleon Bai: Enough. You can go now. Seth Lo: Go where? Camleon Bai: To the hideout. I don't need you anymore. Seth Lo: ... Camleon Bai: Also, pass on my message.;<>;//白壁虎微轉頭看副官 Camleon Bai: Execute the old plan. No one comes into this room without me giving the green light. Seth Lo: ...;<> Camleon Bai: Now, get lost. //副官出去 <<#End>>

title: 白壁虎踹人後對話3
body:
Thought: If what they said was true...
Thought: They must have got Helper. And the children...
Camleon Bai: Phew.
Camleon Bai: He's a nuisance, eh?;<<Set($DLState,白壁虎開始走向主角)>>;//開始走到主角身邊
Camleon Bai: Hey, I almost forgot. You guys have met before.
Camleon Bai: Quite a piece of work he is, eh?
Camleon Bai: Packs one heck of a punch.
//蹲下開始(確定播完才能進下段對話，然後接著撥蹲下收尾
//<<playuntil(蹲下開始)>>
<<#End>>

title: 白壁虎踹人後對話4
body: Camleon Bai: There, there. Camleon Bai: Feeling better, eh? Thought: I've recovered from the shock alright... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->A little bit. Camleon Bai: Great. ->What do you want? // ->I'm passing out. Camleon Bai: Hahahahaha! Camleon Bai: Come on, you're tougher than that. <<#EndSimple>> Thought: Maybe I can grab one of them, take his gun and shoot my way out... Camleon Bai: You're one of those things like Situ, huh? Camleon Bai: I can feel it from that kick. Thought: ...He knows about engineered humans, too. Camleon Bai: I've delt with your kind. Tough bastards. Camleon Bai: Come on, sit up. Camleon Bai: Drop the act. I know you've recovered. Thought: ...;<> Camleon Bai: Don't try any heroic shit. Camleon Bai: You can't dodge bullets from point blank range, not from so many guns. Camleon Bai: Don't even dream about breaking out. You hear me? Thought: ... Camleon Bai: Okay, now.;<> Camleon Bai: Calm down. I only need you for a few quick questions. Camleon Bai: Correct me if I'm wrong. You're a civilian brought into this mess by Situ? Camleon Bai: And you're local? From Wanpei?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. Camleon Bai: Heh. Figured. ->Die, you piece of shit! Camleon Bai: Die I will, eventually. Camleon Bai: But not today, I'm afraid. ->Why do you want to know? Camleon Bai: Every friendship starts with self introduction. <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: Why are you helping her? <> <<@白壁虎問主角幹嘛幫司徒寧>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I want to rid the world of scum like you. ->I must stop your crime. Camleon Bai: ...You are that type, too, huh...;<> Camleon Bai: Damn... Camleon Bai: You know what? Situ has this habit of keeping a bunch of brainwashed minions around.;<> Camleon Bai: That makes her a huge pain in the ass to deal with. Waves of kamikaze attacks by her gung-ho minions. Camleon Bai: Me? You could say I'm allergic to their kind. Camleon Bai: I see you're one of them, huh. <<#Simple(6)>> ->I'm not. Camleon Bai: Hmph. Whatever you say. Thought: Damn... ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I'm not helping her. We just happen to have aligned interests for now. Camleon Bai: Aha! Great!;<> Camleon Bai: I appreciate men who fight for their own interests. Sure I do. Camleon Bai: You know what? Situ has this habit of keeping a bunch of brainwashed minions around.;<> Camleon Bai: That makes her a huge pain in the ass to deal with. Waves of kamikaze attacks by her gung-ho minions. Camleon Bai: Me? You could say I'm allergic to their kind. Camleon Bai: You're not one of them. This makes things much easier. ->Go fuck yourself. ($DLStateFloat);//選過消失 <> Camleon Bai: Heeey, calm down. Camleon Bai: Let's pretend you didn't say that. Camleon Bai: It's just a simple question, eh? Camleon Bai: Why are you helping Situ? Come on, you can tell me. <<#GoTo(@白壁虎問主角幹嘛幫司徒寧)>> <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: Your mission today is to take the children from us by force. Am I right? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Take? We're rescuing them! Scum! ->What if yes? ->Our mission is to rescue them. Camleon Bai: Ah, I see. Camleon Bai: However, that creates one tiny problem. ->I have no idea what you're talking about. Camleon Bai: Ha! I appreciate the effort, but you can drop the act now. Camleon Bai: Unless you enjoy wasting time, that is? <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: My boss paid big money to lease these kids. Camleon Bai: They're not being hurt or abused. Camleon Bai: My boss is even providing them with nutritionally balanced meals and comfy rooms. Better than their own back at home.;<> Camleon Bai: They will stay with us for a short while, and return to their own parents without a scratch. Camleon Bai: It's a perfect deal. Everyone is happy. Why do you have to ruin it all?;<> <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You're lying. Camleon Bai: Maybe I am. ->You can't use kids for experiment subjects. Camleon Bai: Hey, who said we're using them for experiments? Camleon Bai: Do you have any proof? Does Situ have any? Thought: The lead we extracted from the Flop Core data only mentioned Vision needed kids... Thought: It didn't say what they need these kids for. Camleon Bai: But again, I could be lying, right? ->Human trafficking is against the law. Camleon Bai: Hahahahaha! Camleon Bai: We are the bad guys just because what we do is against the law? Camleon Bai: Have you thought about it the other way around? Camleon Bai: Sue us if you have a problem. Camleon Bai: What are you doing now, eh? Breaking into an occupied facility, armed, without a search warrant.;<> Camleon Bai: People could get killed, my friend. Camleon Bai: Is your little mission any less against the law?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Sue you? The court will be on Vision's side. Camleon Bai: What happened to your faith in the law? Camleon Bai: Just admit it. ->We have to do it, in case you hurt the children. Camleon Bai: Yes, in case. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: Being legal or not has never been the point. Camleon Bai: You just keep assuming my boss wants to do bad things to these kids. Camleon Bai: All these shenanigans are based on a silly assumption. ->Okay, I didn't know that. Camleon Bai: Ha! You take that rather well. Camleon Bai: Have you thought that I could be lying? Camleon Bai: "This guy is lying." I bet you're thinking.;<> Camleon Bai: "I should keep him talking and buy myself some time." <> <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: The bottom line is, you had no idea what you're stepping into. Camleon Bai: At least, you were not sure. Thought: ... Camleon Bai: Hey, I have another question. Camleon Bai: You know we have caught someone on your team? Thought: He's referring to Helper. Camleon Bai: I know he's from OWL, although that doesn't make sense... Camleon Bai: Why would OWL want to screw up one of Vision's deals? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Beats me. ->You're the smart ass. You tell me. Thought: Geez I hate it when he chuckles. ->His boss wants to see Vision screwed. Thought: I can't tell what his chuckle means. Camleon Bai: So... <<#GoTo(@他的老闆想讓我的老闆吃點苦頭。)>> ->Because even a weasel like him knows human trafficking is wrong. Thought: I can't tell what his chuckle means. <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: I did some quick thinking, and the answer seemed plain enough. <<@他的老闆想讓我的老闆吃點苦頭。>> Camleon Bai: His boss wants to see my boss screwed. Camleon Bai: Is that so? <<#Simple(8)>> ->So what? ->Probably. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: What made you think Situ is any different from our mutual friend? Thought: Huh...? Camleon Bai: As far as I know, she's been poking around to get the dirt on my boss for a long time. Camleon Bai: Just poking around, nothing dramatic.;<> Camleon Bai: Sticking her nose where it doesn't belong, and making a run for it when things start to go awry. Camleon Bai: Being the superhero that you believe she is, don't you think she should have done more? Camleon Bai: If you ask me, it's almost like she's a hired private eye.;<> Thought: He means Situ is hired by one of them corporations... <<#Simple(10)>> ->I don't know what you're getting at, but it's not working. ->You mean I'm deceived? Camleon Bai: Of course not, don't take offense. Camleon Bai: I'm just sharing a bit of personal observation. ->...I have no idea what you mean. Camleon Bai: It means whatever you want it to mean. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: ... Camleon Bai: Feeling the headache, eh?;<> Camleon Bai: So many secrets. Camleon Bai: So much uncertainty. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Get to the point. Camleon Bai: Do I sense doubt? Fear, even? ->Yeah. Camleon Bai: Taking it like a man. Good. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: Listen. Camleon Bai: I don't know if Situ ever bothered to remind you, but... Camleon Bai: You have now stepped into our world. Both feet down. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Your world? Camleon Bai: Yes. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: From the moment that your girlfriend went to confront my boss...;<> Camleon Bai: ...You were hauled out of your old boring world. You're not that blissfully ignorant salaryman anymore. Camleon Bai: No matter how this ends, there's no going back for you, or your girl. Thought: ... Camleon Bai: But! Here comes the good news!;<> Camleon Bai: You came into this world a stupid pawn, being played around without a single clue. Camleon Bai: Now, thanks to me, you know the rule of the game. Camleon Bai: You're a player now. Make your own moves. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Meaning? Camleon Bai: Don't just wait for things to happen. Camleon Bai: Go find out what they're hiding from you. Camleon Bai: You can thank me later. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: Think about it, my friend. Camleon Bai: A little advice won't hurt. Thought: Gosh I hate this face... <<#End>>

title: 白壁虎踹人後對話5
body:
//背景遠方開始有模糊的槍聲(一陣一陣的)，最右邊傭兵抬頭張望了一下回正。最左邊的也抬了一下頭，之後又低回去看主角。

Camleon Bai: *Sigh*;<<PlayUntil(白昕城,MBU_白壁虎_對話演出2嘆氣)>>
Camleon Bai: Well, well.;<<Play(白昕城,MBU_白壁虎_對話演出2嘆氣返回)>>
Camleon Bai: It's beginning.
?Mercenary A: ...Boss.;//右二的傭兵發言
<<#End>>

title: 白壁虎踹人後對話6
body:
Camleon Bai: What do you say? Can I kill her?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Why would you?
    Camleon Bai: Because she's a pain in the ass.
->Probably.;<<Set($GuessWhiteWin,1)>>
    Camleon Bai: Haha, you don't have much faith in her.
    Camleon Bai: I wouldn't be that optimistic myself.
->You will fail.;<<Set($GuessWhiteWin,-1)>>
    Camleon Bai: Hmm...
    Camleon Bai: Agreed.
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>;//槍聲停了

title: 白壁虎踹人後對話7
body:
Camleon Bai: ...;<<Play(白昕城,MBU_白壁虎_關手機)>>;//白壁虎關閉手機投影，抬頭看向右邊的門
Camleon Bai: ...Hey, have you noticed?;//白壁虎轉上半身看主角
Camleon Bai: The gunshots have died down.
<<#End>>

title: 白壁虎踹人後對話8
跟黑面搭話3
body: Yevin He: Little did I expect the chance for a bout to arise so swiftly, noble warrior. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Dude, occasionally read something that is not fantasy stories. ->Let's dance. ->Okay. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yannick He: BROTHER!!!!!! Yevin He: ATTACK!!!!! <<#End>>

title: 白壁虎踹人後對話5.5
body: Camleon Bai: Leave it to the boys. Camleon Bai: We just wait it out. Part of the plan. Camleon Bai: ...;<> Camleon Bai: Hey, Jason Dai. Thought: ...He knows my name? Camleon Bai: Do you know why I'm keeping you here? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Nope. // ->You need a hostage. Camleon Bai: That I do.;<> Camleon Bai: But with those kids, don't you think I've got enough hostages? ->You're using me as bait to lure Situ in. Camleon Bai: Don't flatter yourself. Camleon Bai: What made you think she cares about you that much? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She won't just see me killed. Camleon Bai: Assumption again. You know what they say? Assume makes an ass out of u and me. Camleon Bai: Who said I'm gonna kill you? Camleon Bai: Except for, of course, if you make me.;<> Camleon Bai: ... Camleon Bai: But you're not entirely wrong... ->She promised to keep me safe. Camleon Bai: Are you sure she'd keep every single promise ever made? Camleon Bai: Gods bless your optimistic soul. Camleon Bai: I do agree, though, or you'd have died twice over.;<> Camleon Bai: So, you're not entirely wrong... ->No. You think she cares about me that much. Camleon Bai: ... Camleon Bai: Sharp mind! I'm beginning to like you.;<> Camleon Bai: You're right. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Camleon Bai: I planned to kill her today, right in this room.;<> //白壁虎頭回正然後示意中間的手下走到主角旁邊，自己則走到超級動畫位置看手機(保持背對主角) Camleon Bai: Your role is not bait, but a distraction. Camleon Bai: However, the plan is now a mess, thanks to my stupid boys. Camleon Bai: Now I'm not so sure if I can pull it off. <<#End>>

title: 超級動畫結束2
body:
Camleon Bai: Huh...
Camleon Bai: You have anti-cloaking devices now?
Nin Situ: No need.
Nin Situ: Cloaking or not, I know you well enough to predict your next move.
Camleon Bai: Hahaha...
Camleon Bai: This is exactly why I want you dead, Situ.
Nin Situ: Put the knife down.
Camleon Bai: And give up my only leverage in this bargain?
Nin Situ: Unless you think that knife is faster than my bullet.
Camleon Bai: ...
Nin Situ: ...
Camleon Bai: Hahahahaha!;<<Set($DLState,白壁虎收刀起身)>>;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_超級動畫結束抬手)>>;<<PlayUntil(白昕城,MBU_白壁虎_超級動畫結束起身)>>
//if說白壁虎會成功
<<#If($GuessWhiteWin=1)>>
    Camleon Bai: What did I say? You should have more faith in Ms. Situ.
<<#EndIf>>
//if說白壁虎會失敗
<<#If($GuessWhiteWin=-1)>>
    Camleon Bai: There, you're right. I failed.
<<#EndIf>>

//白壁虎把刀收起來，
Camleon Bai: Okay, stop beating around the bush.;<<PlayUntil(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_超級動畫結束抬手轉舉黑樁)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_超級動畫結束起身)>>
Camleon Bai: You need to find out the whereabouts of those kids. There, I said it.
Camleon Bai: So, you dare not touch me before making sure they're safe.
Nin Situ: ...
Camleon Bai: I told the gangsters to load them onto those vans in the parking lot.
Nin Situ: One boy was taken into this room.
Camleon Bai: As bait.
Camleon Bai: And the bait worked.
Nin Situ: Where is he?
Camleon Bai: Out through the other door and back to the van.
Nin Situ: ...
Camleon Bai: Come on, show some trust!
Nin Situ: ...
Camleon Bai: I can tell you're starting to believe me, although not quite wanting to.
Nin Situ: ...
Camleon Bai: Has anyone told you that you're a terrible conversationalist?;<<Play(白昕城,MBU_白壁虎_超級動畫結束起身低頭)>>
Camleon Bai: Well, well.
//司徒寧也站起來，但司徒繼續瞄準白壁虎，主角則勉強起身半蹲之類的
Camleon Bai: Let's go over the situation, eh?;<<Play(白昕城,MBU_白壁虎_超級動畫結束起身低頭返回)>>
Camleon Bai: I want to take these kids back and make a load of money.
Camleon Bai: You want to stop me from doing so, preferably without hurting any of them kids.
Camleon Bai: On top of that.
Camleon Bai: We both want the other dead.
Camleon Bai: Agreed?
Nin Situ: ...
Camleon Bai: You can kill me, then save the kids. Mission accomplished.
Nin Situ: But you told your man to use them as human shields if I killed you.
Camleon Bai: Ha!
Camleon Bai: You do know me.;<<Play(白昕城,MBU_白壁虎_超級動畫結束起身低頭)>>
Camleon Bai: If the cargo is damaged, I won't get the pay.
Camleon Bai: If I'm dead, I won't get the pay, either.
Camleon Bai: So, If I'm to choose, the cargo is of secondary concern.;<<Play(白昕城,MBU_白壁虎_超級動畫結束起身低頭返回)>>
Nin Situ: ...
<<#End>>

title: 跟幫手討論要不要殺出去3
body: Thought: It's happening... A direct assault.;<> Thought: I'm fucked through and through if Situ turns up dead. //幫手慢慢爬起來，主角轉身看他 Yaron Kun: Fuck me...;<> Yaron Kun: She's insane. Yaron Kun: How much did her boss pay, to have her go berserk like that? <<#Simple(6)>> ->Her boss? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yaron Kun: Ah. Yaron Kun: I'm supposed to keep her little secret. Yaron Kun: Tsk. Screw it. Yaron Kun: Now, listen up. She's not been honest with you.;<> Yaron Kun: Every agent of OWL serves a corporation. No exceptions. Yaron Kun: That includes, AHEM! Situ herself.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->She was recruited through a referral program. Yaron Kun: She told you that? ->You mean...she's lying to me? Yaron Kun: Totally. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yaron Kun: She's recruited through a special referral program alright, with no corporate sponsorship. Yaron Kun: The catch of the program is, the referee works for the referrer's sponsoring corporation.;<> Yaron Kun: Ha, you didn't really believe in such thing as independent agents, did you? Yaron Kun: No corporation would allow rogue agents in OWL.;<> Yaron Kun: Whatever Situ told you, she's just one of us. Yaron Kun: By which I mean a regular human with her own share of interest to defend.;<> Thought: Is she intentionally keeping this from me? Yaron Kun: *Cough*;<> Yaron Kun: Ugh.;//幫手站起身 Thought: Not necessarily. Maybe he made it up to sway me.;<> Thought: Which side should I believe? Yaron Kun: *Wheeze* Yaron Kun: There, I've said my piece. Time to make myself scarce.;<>;<> Yaron Kun: Just know that she made yet another enemy within OWL today. Yaron Kun: You'd better watch out, too, Dai. Yaron Kun: I'm no good guy, which I don't think you need any reminding. Yaron Kun: At least I'm the honest kind of bad guy. Yaron Kun: I'm selfish, alright. You know I am, and I won't dispute.;<> Yaron Kun: But Situ... Yaron Kun: Let's just say you don't want to trust her too much.;<> Yaron Kun: She puts on one hell of heroic show, while you never know what's going on behind the scenes. Yaron Kun: She could abandon you without warning. Think about it. The possibility is real. Yaron Kun: She's... Haha.;<> Yaron Kun: She's kinda formless. Yaron Kun: There's no pattern in her actions. No...principle? Thought: ... Yaron Kun: Maybe she's even more selfish than I am. Yaron Kun: The example being, she dragged you, an innocuous civilian, into her scheme.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->She's trying hard to save children. Yaron Kun: No doubt. My point is, did she ask for your opinion? Yaron Kun: She's putting your life on the line. Surely you deserve to have a say? ->You're right. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yaron Kun: Have you thought how incredibly selfish that is? Yaron Kun: What if she dies? What will happen to you then? Thought: I'll be dead, too... //槍聲停止 Yaron Kun: ... Thought: The gunshots have died down.;<> Yaron Kun: Time to go.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Maybe she won. Yaron Kun: Not counting on it. I wouldn't have tried to talk her out of it if I had that much faith in her. ->You can't. The back door is barricaded. Yaron Kun: I know. I have my own ways. ->How? Yaron Kun: The same way that I came in. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yaron Kun: Climb back to the ducts with my faithful grapple hook here, then to infinity and beyond. Yaron Kun: Better do it while Situ's keeping them occupied. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Can you bring me along? Yaron Kun: I can. Yaron Kun: But I don't want to.;<> Yaron Kun: You will only slow me down. Yaron Kun: Chameleon could have left me a few traps, you know. Yaron Kun: Weren't you talking about having faith in Situ?;<> Yaron Kun: Now is the time to test your faith. Thought: Damn... ->Good luck. Yaron Kun: Save it. You need good luck way more than I do. ->Coward. Yaron Kun: Let's talk about cowardice when you can tell courage from stupidity. ->... <<#EndSimple>> //幫手在準備她的勾鎖(摸手上的裝備) Yaron Kun: ... Yaron Kun: Heh.;<> Yaron Kun: Whether or not to trust her, it's all up to you. Yaron Kun: Anyway... Yaron Kun: Don't say you weren't warned. Yaron Kun: Ciao.;<> Thought: ...;<> Thought: I don't really have a choice...;<> Thought: Time to go out and face reality.;<> <<#End>>

title: 屠殺結束2
body: Nin Situ: *Wheeze* Nin Situ: The guy in exoskeleton, it's not Chameleon... Nin Situ: It's an empty shell, in remote control mode. Nin Situ: The remote control link only works in close range. He can't be too far away. Nin Situ: I'm... Nin Situ: I'm going after him. <<#Simple(8)>> ->He could still be here, cloaked and waiting for a chance to strike. ->Are you sure? Nin Situ: He used explosives in a confined space. The dust cloud makes his cloaking ineffective. Clearly he didn't plan to stay. Nin Situ: He's running away. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: I have to go after him. We've come this far. Can't let him get away.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What should I do? // ->But you're hurt really bad. Nin Situ: ...This is nothing. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Lawrence is outside. He will evacuate you. Nin Situ: 23 and I are going after Chameleon. Nin Situ: ...And we will call for reinforcement from OWL, too. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Won't Vision interfere? Nin Situ: Unlikely. Nin Situ: Vision is not desperate enough to publicly defend a wanted fugitive yet. Nin Situ: OWL will catch Chameleon. Then Vision will downplay the story with their news censorship. ->Will there be any reinforcement? On such short notice? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Chameleon is a top priority. OWL will call in all available agents. Nin Situ: He won't be able to escape all of us. No one can. Nin Situ: So far, everything is within my expectation. Thought: ...What? Nin Situ: I'm terribly sorry to have you trapped here with me, but... Thought: Wait, does that mean she's expecting this trap of Chameleon's, too? <<#Simple(3)>> ->Hold it. You knew this is a trap? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Time to go. //司徒寧跑走 <> Thought: I... Thought: ... Thought: I'd better meet up with Lawrence. <<#End>>

title: 跟隆生離開工地2
body:
Lawrence Chang(c): Let's move?
Lawrence Chang(c): Next stop, to collect Ms. Cheng. Sit tight!
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Hurry up already.
    //
->Wait, where's 23?
    Lawrence Chang(c): She's fine. Let's get going.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang(c): Yee-haw!
<<#End>>

title: 鄭緯請主角去寂靜大廳
body:
Wayne Zheng(c): Hey, Jason.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
Wayne Zheng(c): I forgot to tell you, wait for me and Mr. Yan in the entrance lobby.
Wayne Zheng(c): We have an upcoming appointment to discuss our disposal.
Wayne Zheng(c): The location is the same place where we met him before.
Wayne Zheng(c): I'll grant you elevator access to the ground floor.
Wayne Zheng(c): If he's there first, please keep him entertained.
<<#Simple(3)>>
->Roger that.
->Uh, how am I supposed to entertain him?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng(c): I'll leave it to you, Thanks!
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Thought: He hung up...
Thought: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
Thought: If I don't have anything better to do, just wait for Yan in the lobby? Got it.
<<#End>>

title: 跟陳莉堯
body:
Lily Chen: Huh?;<<Play(陳莉堯,MBU_陳莉堯_藍桶抬頭)>>
Lily Chen: Hey, rookie.
Lily Chen: What's up?
<<Set($DLStateFloat,1)>>
<<Set($DLStateFloat2,1)>>
<<@陳莉堯的問答集>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Where are we keeping the kids? ($DLStateFloat)
    <<Set($DLStateFloat,-1)>>
    Lily Chen: Oh?
    Lily Chen: You heard about the kids, too?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Yeah.
        Lily Chen: Not bad for a rookie.
    ->"Heard"?
        Lily Chen: Yeah, there are rumors...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Lily Chen: Nathan called us in to guard the cargo. What cargo, and whom to watch out for? He didn't say.
    Lily Chen: They say we're dealing with hot cargo this time.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Hot cargo?
        Lily Chen: The kind that attracts the cops.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Lily Chen: He didn't say much, but I heard stuff anyway.
    Lily Chen: The people who moved the cargo told me it's a bunch of kids.
    Lily Chen: I guess we're delivering for some seriously big potatoes, or else they wouldn't need this many people...;<<Play(陳莉堯,MBU_陳莉堯_藍桶抬頭返回)>>
    Lily Chen: Again, if that's the case, why didn't they hire bigger gangs?
    Lily Chen: Anyway, you didn't hear this from me. Just shut the hell up and take your money.;<<Play(陳莉堯,MBU_陳莉堯_藍桶抬頭)>>
    Lily Chen: As to where the cargo is, I have no idea.
    Lily Chen: It was already moved and locked up when we came.
    Lily Chen: OK, enough about that.
    Lily Chen: What else do you want?
    <<#GoTo(@陳莉堯的問答集)>>
->Who's that hunk practicing kungfu over there? ($DLStateFloat2)
    <<Set($DLStateFloat2,-1)>>
    <<PlayUntil(陳莉堯,MBU_陳莉堯_藍桶抬頭返回)>>
    Lily Chen: That one?
    Lily Chen: Hired muscle.;<<Play(陳莉堯,MBU_陳莉堯_藍桶看外)>>
    Lily Chen: And his younger brother, too. No idea where that guy went.
    Lily Chen: Couple of weirdos. Read too many chivalry stories or something...;<<Play(陳莉堯,MBU_陳莉堯_藍桶看外返回)>>
    Lily Chen: Just leave them alone.
    Lily Chen: Anything else?;<<Play(陳莉堯,MBU_陳莉堯_藍桶抬頭)>>
    <<#GoTo(@陳莉堯的問答集)>>
->Nope.
<<#EndSimple>>
<<Play(陳莉堯,MBU_陳莉堯_藍桶抬頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 超級動畫結束4
body: ?Mercenary C: ...Boss? ?Mercenary C: You still alive? Camleon Bai: Alive and kicking. ?Mercenary C: Everyone is here, ready for action. <> Nin Situ: ... Camleon Bai: I thought you killed everyone outside, Situ. Nin Situ: You... Camleon Bai: Chill. I won't tell them to rush in and shoot everything that moves. Camleon Bai: I know how fast you are.;<> Camleon Bai: Before they rush in and take shooting position, you'd grab this guy and escape through the ducts. Camleon Bai: Why would I ruin our date? I've spent time and money to make it happen. Camleon Bai: Now, we're back to square one.;<> Camleon Bai: What should we do? Give each other a break and leave in peace? Camleon Bai: That's what I'd call a rational decision. Nin Situ: ... Camleon Bai: Haha... Camleon Bai: No, you don't have to say it. I know you well enough. Camleon Bai: You can't even stand the idea of it, can you? Camleon Bai: You absolutely must, have to save those kids. Failure is not an option.;<> Camleon Bai: The Situ I know never admits defeat. Camleon Bai: Plus... Camleon Bai: You really, really hate to let me go for a second time, yes?;<> Nin Situ: ... Camleon Bai: So, let's look at the next best thing. Camleon Bai: It starts with me walking out of this room, without a scratch. Camleon Bai: I will take my men outside, along with the cargo, back to my hideout. Camleon Bai: Heh heh. Camleon Bai: Meanwhile, you try to intercept us. Nin Situ: ...Do I look like an idiot? Camleon Bai: Hey, hey, not so fast. Calm down and think for a moment.;<> Camleon Bai: This is the only ticket to the good ending we both want, no? Camleon Bai: From your perspective. Camleon Bai: You can finally kill this pain-in-the-ass Chameleon and his bunch of troublemakers. Camleon Bai: And!;<> Camleon Bai: You'll get to rescue all the kids! Camleon Bai: Perfect victory! The legendary Nin Situ saves the day again! Camleon Bai: From my perspective, I'd pay anything for an opportunity to kill you.;<> Camleon Bai: All my best men, fully armed, in a confined space, against your self. Camleon Bai: Man, opportunities like this don't come twice. Camleon Bai: Finally, I won't see your face again, old nemesis.;<> Nin Situ: It's not happening. Nin Situ: I'm not stupid. Once I crossfire with your men, you'll bolt and take the children as hostages. Nin Situ: I won't let you get away again. Camleon Bai: You underestimated me. Thought: He's suddenly colder by 10 degrees... Camleon Bai: Like I said, I'd pay everything to finish you off. Camleon Bai: Rest assured. There's no one watching the vans. Camleon Bai: Every man I have is outside this room. Camleon Bai: They serve one single purpose. Camleon Bai: That is, to kill you, Situ. Camleon Bai: I could lie, alright. Camleon Bai: But you can always trust how much I hate you. Nin Situ: ... Camleon Bai: ...;<> Camleon Bai: What do you say? Camleon Bai: Are you gonna play it safe and let everyone go, me included? Camleon Bai: Or shall we duke it out in a death match?;<> Nin Situ: ... Camleon Bai: No hurry. Take your time. Camleon Bai: I know what you will say, anyway. Camleon Bai: We could also use some time to clean up the, um, mess you left outside.;<> Camleon Bai: My boss keeps telling me to do a clean job... Camleon Bai: Better clean after myself while I work. Haha!;<> Camleon Bai: You have 10, no, 15 minutes. Camleon Bai: Take your time. Camleon Bai: Don't disappoint me.;//白壁虎轉身 <<#End>> //白壁虎開始走然後隱形，接著突然一把刀插在被司徒寧制服的傭兵頭上，同時他隱形開關門出去。全程司徒寧都瞄準著他，直到門關上他才放下槍。

title: 超級動畫結束3
body: Camleon Bai: So... Camleon Bai: I reckon you have figured out that we don't really have a second option. Camleon Bai: Now you let me go. I will take my men and the cargo with me. Camleon Bai: And I let you go. This guy is all yours. Camleon Bai: Do we have a deal? Nin Situ: ... Camleon Bai: Hey, I know it feels bad, all this fuss over nothing. Look at the bright side. No one's getting hurt, eh?;<> Nin Situ: ... Nin Situ: Save your crap. Nin Situ: All your men are dead. I personally saw them off on the way here. Camleon Bai: Oh Geez! Really!;<> Camleon Bai: You took out the reinforcement, too!? Nin Situ: ... Camleon Bai: I take that as a no. //if有套出情報 <<#If($GetIntel>0)>> Camleon Bai: You know I'm not bluffing.;<> Camleon Bai: Don't you, Situ? Camleon Bai: I can tell you know what I'm talking about.;<> Camleon Bai: Heh. I'd be surprised if you didn't know. Camleon Bai: You just couldn't tell if the reinforcement was already here when you arrived. <<#EndIf>> //if沒套出情報 <<#If($GetIntel<1)>> Camleon Bai: ... Camleon Bai: Wait... Camleon Bai: You really don't know...? Camleon Bai: Hahahahaha!;<> Camleon Bai: You didn't know about my reinforcement! Camleon Bai: Oh boy. Situ, my old friend. Camleon Bai: You're better than that! Camleon Bai: Look at you!;<> Camleon Bai: Brain turning twice as fast, hoping against hope that I'm bluffing! <<#EndIf>> Nin Situ: ... //敲門聲，攝影機往右帶 <<#End>>

title: 跟幫手討論要不要殺出去2

Nin Situ: No time to convince you.;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_機動_射昆燁轉大跑待機)>>
Nin Situ: Wait here, don't move. This will be over soon enough.

    Nin Situ: ...
    Nin Situ: I'm unkillable.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>

Yaron Kun: Calm...the...fuck...down...
<<#End>>
//司徒走道被插刀的傭兵旁邊，把他身上固定的離肢(定在肩膀上？)抽出來收到手上，屍體滑落。

body:

title: 操作路線_執行長坐下前
body: Thought: Shane Yan...;<>;<>;//同時微弱glitch Shane Yan: Justin! Have a seat.;<> //俊恩坐下 <> <<#If($AgreedWiretap=0)>> Thought: I should activate the bug... <<#Simple(12)>> ->[Activate the bug];<> //撥主角摸一下領子的動畫 <> Shane Yan: Hm? title: 跟俊恩走去地窖電梯
body:
//自動撥放
//兩人邊走邊講話 by凡
Justin Wu: Oh.
Justin Wu: Did you get the update?
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Update about what?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Justin Wu: The repair of the Cellar is smoother than expected.
Justin Wu: It's almost back in working order again.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->And soon after that, permanently shut down.
    Justin Wu: It won't be that quick.
    Justin Wu: Closing this farm takes about five to eight years.
->Quicker than I expected indeed.
    Justin Wu: Yeah.
    Justin Wu: Because we gave up on some parts that can't be salvaged.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Can you do that?
        Justin Wu: Yes. We have outdated equipment, barely ever used.
        Justin Wu: Fixing them is not worth the trouble. We just wrote them off.
        Justin Wu: We have a lot of these old junks in the Cellar.
    ->I see.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Justin Wu: What I really wanted to say is, this Cellar elevator won't shake again.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Fantastic news.
->It's scary, I mean when the elevator shakes.
    Justin Wu: Yeah.
->A little shake doesn't scare me!
    Justin Wu: I see.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 操作組演說
body: //來潔在看螢幕用電腦 Jesse Lai: Been waiting for you for a while.;<>;<> Justin Wu: What's going on, Jesse? Jesse Lai: Yesterday I said there's not much we can do, but in fact we can do something for the Cellar repair.;<>;<> Jesse Lai: I asked who's interested in giving me a hand. Here we are.;<>;<> Justin Wu: Everyone came?;<>;<>;<> Justin Wu: But they won't be p— Jesse Lai: Won't be paid? We all know that.;<>;<> Jesse Lai: Now that you sent that message, I reassigned their priorities.;<> Justin Wu: That means... Paxton Luo: Heh, means we're already working on the data needed by your report! Justin Wu: But I need a lot of data, about pretty much everything. Do you know where to start? Jesse Lai: Trust the team you built, Justin. Jesse Lai: I just gave them a vague direction and they figured out what to do. Paxton Luo: This baby will earn you a promotion all the way to the manager's office! Justin Wu: I... Jesse Lai: I'm not done yet. Jesse Lai: We know very well what farm closure means for the team. Still, you have our full support. Paxton Luo: Yeah! We believe this is the right thing to do!;<> Jesse Lai: We all believe in you, Justin. <> Justin Wu: ...;<>;<> Justin Wu: You guys...;<> <> //俊恩低頭感覺要哭了 Justin Wu: ...;<>;<> Paxton Luo: Now! Now!;<> Wyatt Ke: Here comes the tears!;<>;<> Penelope Lai: Camera! Light! Action! Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: ...You guys stop it. Paxton Luo: Cut!;<> Paxton Luo: Cut! Let's go again. Take two, "Scene One, Justin Wu's Grateful Tears.";<> Penelope Lai: Meh.;<> Kaylee Chen: That was close. Wyatt Ke: Told you it won't work!;<>;<> Wyatt Ke: Now you owe me $500, Packs. Paxton Luo: ...Come on! I saw tears in his eyes!;<>;<> Wyatt Ke: Doesn't count if it doesn't fall!;<> Justin Wu: Damn...;<> Justin Wu: ...I love you guys.;<> Paxton Luo: No way! Now he's laughing! Justin Wu: Haha... Jesse Lai: Okay, everyone!;<> Jesse Lai: Now seriously... Jesse Lai: The show is yours. Give the orders, boss.;<> <> Justin Wu: ...;<> //吳俊恩轉身 Justin Wu: Team A and B, continue collecting and compiling data. Justin Wu: Team C, process compiled data, following the quarterly report format.;<> Justin Wu: Hardware, support Logistics in Cellar repair. Paxton Luo: Shall I keep a note of all issues and malfunctions?;<> Justin Wu: Please do. Justin Wu: This is our make-or-break moment, guys.;<> Justin Wu: We have been dealing with way too many things that are not supposed to be our responsibility. Justin Wu: Keeping Silencio running is one giant mistake. Now we have a chance to correct it.;<> Justin Wu: This time, we will fix it once and for all. Justin Wu: We won't allow tragedies to repeat themselves. Justin Wu: This man-eating monster, Silencio, will be put to rest. Justin Wu: Let's start.;<>;<>;<>;<> //所有人轉向螢幕繼續工作。 <> //士傑在俊恩右邊 by凡 Justin Wu: ...Come here, Jason. Justin Wu: I have a special task for you. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Roger that. // ->Can't we talk about it here? Justin Wu: I'd rather do it in private. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: What secret mission would that be?;<> Justin Wu: You will know soon enough. Justin Wu: Come with me, Jason. <> <<#End>> //俊恩到安裝發送走廊上跟主角說 //柯義偉 //賴羽嬪 //陳家騏(被賴潔欺負)

title: 簽約陳昇文
body:
//跟陳昇文簽約的時候他都很擔心小孩，完全演到底，中途23會指示換成談條件(說只是在考驗他)，陳昇文就會露出真正的陰險。他根本不在乎孩子，對妻子抱有怨恨。
//


Shawn Chen: Good day, dear officers.
Shawn Chen: Have anyone told you that you look fabulous! What a pair of stately young men!;<<Play(陳昇文,MBU_陳昇文_側站前傾)>>
Thought: Not again...
Lawrence Chang: We? Stately?;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐抬頭)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內)>>
Shawn Chen: Yes!
Lawrence Chang: Woah, thanks!;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐抬頭返回)>>
Thought: Lawrence is buying his crap?;<<Play(陳昇文,MBU_陳昇文_側站前傾返回)>>
Shawn Chen: Can I have a seat?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內返回)>>
Lawrence Chang: Please, make yourself at home.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐請吧)>>
<<#End>>

title: 簽約任誠磊2
