title: 簽約駱思敏(黑臉)3
body:
//if成功
<<#If($AddStressOnRo>2)>>
    Lawrence Chang: He won't be so mean anymore. I promise.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐抬手)>>
    Lawrence Chang: From here on, he's just gonna sit and watch. Are we good?
    Simone Lo: ...Yeah.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐抬手返回)>>;<<Play(駱思敏,MBU_駱思敏_簽約側坐靠桌低頭)>>
    <<Set($DLState,第一黑臉扮完主角自動走去坐椅子)>>
    Lawrence Chang: And don't worry. We won't report you to the police.
    Lawrence Chang: Please be honest and cooperative. We just need some information as part of the due diligence.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐前傾)>>
    Lawrence Chang: Like I said before, I'm on the same side, okay?;<<Play(駱思敏,MBU_駱思敏_簽約側坐靠桌低頭返回)>>
    Simone Lo: ...Okay.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐前傾返回)>>
    <<#GoTo(@駱思敏被成功說服吐露更多)>>
<<#EndIf>>
//if失敗
<<#If($AddStressOnRo<3)>>
    Thought: Simone Lo is gone...
    Thought: Did she leave?;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐看外)>>
    Lawrence Chang: I screwed up, Jason.
    Lawrence Chang: Sorry, I couldn't convince her.
    23(c): I'd say it's Jason's fault. The bad cop didn't push her hard enough.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Sorry.
        23(c): Relax. You did pretty good on the first try.
    ->I was pressing very hard.
        23(c): Not hard enough.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Nin Situ(c): We can afford one miss. There's a second shot coming up.
    <<Set($DLState,第一黑臉扮完主角自動走去坐椅子)>>
    Nin Situ(c): What's the background of the next candidate, 23?;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐看外返回)>>
    <<#GoTo(@第一簽約人直接是任誠磊)>>
<<#EndIf>>

title: 簽約駱思敏(白臉)
body: <<@簽約駱思敏白臉>> Lawrence Chang: I mean you're a fucking liar.;<>;<> Thought: Lawrence's suddenly a whole different person... Simone Lo: Liar!?;<> Simone Lo: Why the hell would I want to lie?;<> Lawrence Chang: You tell me. Why the hell would you want to lie?;<> Simone Lo: !? Simone Lo: Are you saying I sold my own daughter?;<> Lawrence Chang: Oh? I didn't say no shit. You said it yourself. Shall I take it as a confession?;<>;<> Simone Lo: What confession? No!;<> Simone Lo: I just—;<> Lawrence Chang: You just let slip. Thought: Lawrence seriously has a knack for this bad cop role... Simone Lo: I... Simone Lo: You have no proof! Lawrence Chang: We have done our investigation. Guess what? Your daughter is not home.;<> Simone Lo: I said you have no proof! Your investigation doesn't—;<> Lawrence Chang: Doesn't count? I can have a police officer search your place in 10 minutes. Simone Lo: They don't have my consent!;<> Simone Lo: I have my rights!;<> Lawrence Chang: Ha!;<> Lawrence Chang: A Shithole dweller, talking about rights!;<> Thought: ... Simone Lo: I can sue you! And Vision! And the cops! I'm gonna sue all your asses off!;<> Lawrence Chang: Hahahahaha! You're funny.;<> Lawrence Chang: How much did you get from selling your daughter? Enough to pay the lawyer?;<> Lawrence Chang: ...You.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Listen very carefully and remember damn well. Lawrence Chang: You are nothing. People like you are the trash of this world. Lawrence Chang: No rights. No value. No one cares about you.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Do what you're told and shove your stupid opinions where the sun doesn't shine.;<> Lawrence Chang: It's the least you can do to make everyone's life easier. Lawrence Chang: Do me a favor and just be a good sport, will ya? 23(c): Jason, it's about time for your turn. 23(c): Take over the conversation, good cop.;<> <> Lawrence Chang: Jason, don't just sit there. Say something.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah, you should take a break. ->You might want to take a breath outside. Leave this to me. <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: ...;<> Lawrence Chang: Okay.;<> Lawrence Chang: She'd better be cooperative when I'm back. Lawrence Chang: Or else we will hand this over to the cops.;<> Simone Lo: ...;<> <<#End>>

title: 簽約駱思敏(成功)
body: // <<@駱思敏被成功說服吐露更多>> Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: I did have an arrangement with someone...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Someone? //if黑臉 <<#If($PlayGoodBadCop=-1)>> Simone Lo: ...;<>;<> Thought: Why is Lawrence staring at me like that? 23(c): Quiet, Jason. It's Lawrence's show.;<> <> <> <<#EndIf>> ->Gangs? //if黑臉 <<#If($PlayGoodBadCop=-1)>> Simone Lo: ...;<>;<> Thought: Why is Lawrence staring at me like that? 23(c): Quiet, Jason. It's Lawrence's show.;<> <> <> <<#EndIf>> //if白臉 <<#If($PlayGoodBadCop=1)>> Simone Lo: Yes... <<#EndIf>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: I owe them money. So they gave me some advice. Simone Lo: They want my daughter, but only for a few weeks. Thought: So it's not selling, but leasing the child to Vision?;<> Lawrence Chang: ...Why? That's a rather weird thing to ask.;<> Simone Lo: They said they need young children for some harmless experiment.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Experiment? Simone Lo: I don't know what it is. They just said they could write my debts off, plus some extra payment...;<> 23(c): Ask her who this someone is. <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Who is this someone? ->Who did you make this arrangement with? <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: Why do you want to know?;<> Lawrence Chang: Due diligence means finding out everything we may need to know. Let's do a thorough job while we're at it.;<> Simone Lo: ...I don't really know who they are. It's my boyfriend who owes them money. Simone Lo: I do have a name, though, of the guy who met with me.;<> Simone Lo: Nathan Chuang, member of a gang.;<> Simone Lo: They have a white symbol. I can't describe what it looks like...;<> Lawrence Chang: That doesn't matter.;<> Simone Lo: Do you think I should contact the police?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Police? // ->They will arrest you. Simone Lo: Thought so... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: They will investigate and get my daughter back, right? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Maybe. ->They will. ->I don't know. ->Don't count on it. <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: Is that so...;<> Thought: If Helper is to be trusted, the police is Vision's oyster... Thought: I guess there won't be any investigation. Simone Lo: ... Lawrence Chang: You daughter is still with them? When are they giving her back? Simone Lo: I don't know. It's already long past the agreed date.;<> Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: Actually, I changed my mind right after giving her out.;<> Simone Lo: I asked them to give her back, but they said I must pay them back. Simone Lo: This farm is my only chance to make that much money. Lawrence Chang: Wait...;<> Lawrence Chang: You need this contributor opportunity to make money for that...?;<> Lawrence Chang: Don't you have a sick mother to take care of? Lawrence Chang: Flop contribution takes years. Who's gonna be there for your daughter and mom?;<> Simone Lo: ...;<> Simone Lo: I contacted an orphanage. At least my daughter will have a place to stay. Simone Lo: As to my mom... Simone Lo: Well, gods bless her... Simone Lo: Can we sign the contract now?;<> 23(c): Ask about the people who she had this arrangement with, Lawrence. <> Lawrence Chang: Wait a minute. You're abandoning your daughter...? Simone Lo: ...She's better off that way. Lawrence Chang: ...;<> Lawrence Chang: No. Simone Lo: Huh?;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: I can't let you sign this contract.;<> Simone Lo: You can't? Who the hell do you think you are? 23(c): Lawrence!;<> <> //發出逼的音效通訊被切斷 Thought: ...Lawrence cut off the comms. Lawrence Chang: You must stay with your daughter. Lawrence Chang: You can't... Lawrence Chang: Can't just abandon her... Lawrence Chang: It's your obligation as a mother.;<> Lawrence Chang: ... Simone Lo: ...;<> Simone Lo: ...Obligation? Simone Lo: I had this child with my ex.;<> Simone Lo: The son of a bitch ditched me when he heard I was pregnant. My whole life went to hell after her birth. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Did you consider abortion? Simone Lo: Abortion in the Shithole?;<> Simone Lo: Seriously? I don't want to wake up and find myself missing two kidneys as well as a fetus. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Ugh. Simone Lo: "Ugh" doesn't even begin to describe it. ->What? They can keep you alive with both kidneys gone now? Thought: Judging by her reaction, that was a very stupid thing to say.;<>;<> Thought: Well, I deserve it... <>;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->But it's not her fault. Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: ...I know that. ->I'm sorry. Simone Lo: That son of a bitch should be sorry. <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: I've given this child my everything, those I can afford or not.;<> Simone Lo: I don't know if I love her, but I tried. Swear to gods I tried.;<> Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: Now I'm really, really desperate.;<> Simone Lo: No safety net to fall back on, no one wants to help me. Simone Lo: My ex left me a mountain of debt, and my mom's sick.;<> Simone Lo: This fucking brat is milking me dry. Every hard-earned penny.;<> Simone Lo: And she's crying, wailing, all the time. I can't even get two hours sleep a day. Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: What have I done to deserve this?;<> Simone Lo: Why does shit keep happening to me? Simone Lo: I mean, this whole goddamn time! <> Simone Lo: I never even agreed to have this child!!! //激動站起，場子冷調一下 <<#End>>

title: 簽約駱思敏(黑臉)2
body: 23(c): Wait outside, Jason. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What's going on in there? I'm curious. 23(c): Not now. Give Lawrence some time. ->Alright. <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): I'll tell you when it's time. Thought: ...;<> Frances Cheng(c): ...J. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Fran? ->What's up? ->... <<#EndSimple>> //if數值夠 <<#If($AddStressOnRo>2)>> Frances Cheng(c): 23 says you did well. Lawrence should be able to convince her. Thought: ... <<#EndIf>> //if數值不夠 <<#If($AddStressOnRo<3)>> Frances Cheng(c): 23 says you didn't try hard enough. Lawrence's chance isn't very good. Thought: She calls that not hard enough? <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I see. // ->That was painful. Frances Cheng(c): You feeling painful? For treating people badly? <<@程芳談扮黑臉不會不好嗎？>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->It was actually kind of relieving in an unexpected way. Frances Cheng(c): ...Huh? Frances Cheng(c): Being mean to people... You think it's relieving? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Well, she's not one of the good guys. Frances Cheng(c): Still, she doesn't deserve to be treated like that! ->Being given a free license to be mean for once? Of course it's relieving. Frances Cheng(c): License or not, it's wrong! ->I don't mean I enjoyed it. Frances Cheng(c): ... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): So, you find pleasure in that... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Not pleasure. Frances Cheng(c): Some kind of positive feedback, at least. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. ->Probably. <<#EndSimple>> ->I don't know. Just speaking of my feelings. Frances Cheng(c): But— <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I did feel that way. You can't deny a fact. ->I don't mean it's justified or something, I just felt that way. <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): I know what you mean. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): ... Frances Cheng(c): Let's put that subject aside for now. Frances Cheng(c): ... Frances Cheng(c): ...;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Hey, are you mad at me? Frances Cheng(c): ... Frances Cheng(c): ...A little bit. Frances Cheng(c): But not against you, not personally. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): ...You're very unlike you recently.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Really? ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@程芳談扮黑臉不會不好嗎結束)>> ->Yeah, I didn't enjoy it, to say the least. Frances Cheng(c): Are we really on the right track? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You mean working with Situ? Frances Cheng(c): No. Frances Cheng(c): I mean what we just did to Ms. Lo. ->You mean what I did inside? Frances Cheng(c): ...Yes. <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): We humiliated her for our personal gains. <<#Simple(10)>> ->She sold her own child. She doesn't deserve better. Frances Cheng(c): For that, she should be punished by the law, not by us. <<#Simple(8)>> ->We are doing this to help people. Frances Cheng(c): And to help ourselves, too. <<#Simple(8)>> ->It's not an either/or situation. Frances Cheng(c): That I agree. ->You feel we're being selfish. Frances Cheng(c): I don't, but— ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->We must save our own asses. Frances Cheng(c): And help other people, too. Frances Cheng(c): At least I think so... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): ... ->It's the necessary evil. Frances Cheng(c): Evil committed to prevent further evil? ->What do you think we should do? Frances Cheng(c): I can't think of anything. This is the only option we have. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): I suppose the only thing we can do is to stay vigilant.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->What do you mean? Frances Cheng(c): We don't know if what we're doing is the right thing. Frances Cheng(c): So we must keep questioning ourselves, in case to go too far. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Totally agreed. // ->That's a lot of stress. Frances Cheng(c): Haha... Frances Cheng(c): Peace of mind doesn't come easily. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#GoTo(@程芳談扮黑臉不會不好嗎結束)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): ... Frances Cheng(c): J. Frances Cheng(c): Don't you feel bad for treating people like that? <<#GoTo(@程芳談扮黑臉不會不好嗎？)>> <<@程芳談扮黑臉不會不好嗎結束>> 23(c): Am I interrupting you love birds? 23(c): Lawrence is done. Jason, you can come in now. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Roger. // ->How did it go? 23(c): Find out for yourself. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>>

title: 簽約駱思敏(白臉)2
body: Simone Lo: ...;<> Simone Lo: ... Thought: She's totally broken. Thought: Lawrence pushed her pretty hard... 23(c): Negotiate with her, Jason.;<> 23(c): Make her admit selling her daughter. Tell her you don't want to report her to the police. 23(c): Invent an excuse, like you just want to assess her risk. <> <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Are you OK, Ms. Lo?;<> Simone Lo: No. ->Work with me, Ms. Lo. Simone Lo: ... Thought: She wants to play dumb now? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: What do you people want?;<> Simone Lo: Report me to the police? Or blackmail me? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No, we only want to minimize the risk of accidents.;<> Simone Lo: What accidents? ->We told you before. We are helping the police with some investigation. <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: You're helping the police to investigate what? Human trafficking?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. It's part of our job. ->Not quite investigation, just asking some questions.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: I-I didn't do anything like that!;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You can relax, Ms. Lo.;<> Simone Lo: Relax how? Simone Lo: How can I relax when you keep suspecting me?;<> ->I don't know if I should trust you yet. Simone Lo: I said I'm clean! Simone Lo: That guy kept pushing and pushing, didn't I keep saying no? Simone Lo: You're suspecting me, too!;<> <<#EndSimple>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I never suspected you.;<> Simone Lo: Good! Then let me sign the contract and be done with it! ->I do suspect you but it doesn't matter. Simone Lo: How come? ->Suspect or not, what I think doesn't count.;<> Simone Lo: ...Huh? <<#EndSimple>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I need you to be cooperative. Simone Lo: I've been cooperative all along.;<> Simone Lo: It's you who keep bringing up the cops. <<#Simple(8)>> ->My colleague, not me.;<> Simone Lo: You're a little better than him alright. ->He doesn't mean it.;<> Simone Lo: I don't think so. He means every word. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: All I want is to not have the cops after me. ->Tell me, why are you so concerned?;<> Simone Lo: I'm afraid that you will say shit about me...;<> Simone Lo: Then they throw me in jail. ->Be cooperative if you don't want that to happen. Simone Lo: I am being cooperative.;<> Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: Again, if I did anything bad...;<> Simone Lo: Being cooperative means the cops will know everything. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Did you do anything bad? Simone Lo: I DIDN'T!;<> Simone Lo: Damn, do you people even listen! ->Not necessarily. Simone Lo: What do you mean?;<> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What if I promise the cops won't know? Simone Lo: You can do that? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes, I can.;<> ->At least they won't know anything from us.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: ...;<> Simone Lo: Let's say I have something to hide. Why would you cover it up for me? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because I need this contract for my performance review, and I need to know who I'm dealing with.;<> ->What do I get from reporting you?;<> <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: ...;<> ->You can be honest with me, Ms. Lo. It's only a matter of time. Simone Lo: Matter of time, huh? ->... <<#EndSimple>> //if數值購 <<#If($DecreaseStressRo>2)>> Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: OK, I trust you.;<> Simone Lo: I will be fully cooperative from now on. Simone Lo: And you must promise not to report me to the cops. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I promise. // ->Sure. Let's talk. Simone Lo: No! You must promise me first. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I promise. ->I swear to the gods, I will never report you to the police. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: ... Simone Lo: OK, I'm ready. 23(c): I'll bring Lawrence in. <> Simone Lo: I...;<>;<> Simone Lo: ...!?;<> Simone Lo: He's...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->He's not gonna report you, either. Simone Lo: Really? ->He's what? Simone Lo: I don't trust him. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: I won't report you. Promise. Simone Lo: But you were like... Lawrence Chang: Honestly, I just need to find out as much about you as we can. Don't want to deal with nasty surprise after we rack you up.;<> Lawrence Chang: Crime and investigation are the cops' job. We don't care at all. Lawrence Chang: I'm sorry if I was too harsh.;<> Simone Lo: ...Okay.;<> <<#GoTo(@駱思敏被成功說服吐露更多)>> <<#EndIf>> //if數值不夠 <<#If($DecreaseStressRo<3)>> Simone Lo: No, I don't believe you.;<> Thought: Dammit... <<#Simple(8)>> ->I give my word. I will help you. Simone Lo: Your word? Am I supposed to trust that? ->Think again, Ms. Lo. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: I'm getting the hell out of here.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Step out of this door, and you will deal with the police. Simone Lo: ... Thought: She's swaying... Is she? Simone Lo: Go tell the cops!;<> Simone Lo: Whatever I do, you're gonna talk to the cops anyway. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No, I don't have a reason to do that. ->You're just being paranoid. Simone Lo: Then go, report me. I dare you.;<> ->Let's sit down. Simone Lo: No. I'm sick of this room.;<> <<#EndSimple>> ->Don't go just yet. Simone Lo: I've had enough, of this talk, of you. Simone Lo: Don't you dare stop me. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Simone Lo: Bye. <> Thought: That didn't go well...;<> 23(c): Don't worry, Jason. 23(c): It's your first time. Failure is expected. 23(c): I'll bring Lawrence in.;<> <> <> Thought: I can tell she said that to make me feel better...;<> Lawrence Chang: Huh? We failed? title: 簽約任誠磊
body:
//從倒到尾怕到抱依據話不說，只願意簽約，其他問題都沒有，也不回答。
//最好只好放他離開


<<@第一簽約人直接是任誠磊>>
23(c): This one is from Lawrence. Name's Leo Ren.
23(c): He has two sons. Sold the older one to Vision.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐低頭)>>
23(c): He said both sons are at home, but Helper found out he's lying.
23(c): The man himself is quite a mess. Substance abuse, alcoholism, gambling problem, domestic violence, theft.
23(c): Adding human trafficking to the list is not surprise at all.
23(c): Lawrence, tell us what you found out during consultation.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐低頭返回)>>
Lawrence Chang: Sure. He's a softie. Should be easy enough to crack.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內)>>
Lawrence Chang: I pushed him a little bit and he just spilled the beans.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐看外)>>
Lawrence Chang: Told me quite a lot during consultation already.
Nin Situ(c): Anything else?
Lawrence Chang: Um... He's not very well, physically.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐看外返回)>>
23(c): Substance abuse and alcoholism? I'm not surprised.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內返回)>>
Lawrence Chang: He's kinda abnormally nervous. Not sure if it's from health issues or drugs.
Lawrence Chang: He kept saying he's being watched.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐看外)>>
Nin Situ(c): Being watched?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內)>>
Lawrence Chang: Yeah, so he said.
Nin Situ(c): ...
23(c): Good. Let's stick to the original plan.
23(c): Press him and see what happens.
23(c): He's coming in. Get ready.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐看外返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 簽約任誠磊3
body:
//門關上以後，韓啟漢按下一個裝置，突然房間燈光閃爍，然後監視器熄燈。
//接著他掏出槍瞄準主角跟隆生，兩人抬手。

<<Set($DLState,陳祥儒舉槍)>>;<<Play(陳祥儒,MBU_陳祥儒_靠牆舉槍)>>
Rory Chen: Freeze, motherfuckers. Don't try anything funny.

Lawrence Chang: ...Who are you really?
//陳祥儒開一槍。

Lawrence Chang: ...
Rory Chen: Why do you keep asking about human trafficking?;<<Play(陳祥儒,MBU_陳祥儒_靠牆舉槍抬頭)>>
Rory Chen: You, the mask guy. I'm asking you.
Lawrence Chang: We are cooperating with the police.;<<Play(陳祥儒,MBU_陳祥儒_靠牆舉槍抬頭返回)>>
Rory Chen: Bullshit. The police is on our side.
Rory Chen: Your turn, the other guy. Answer.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐舉雙手轉頭)>>;<<Play(陳祥儒,MBU_陳祥儒_靠牆舉槍看主)>>;//改瞄準主角
<<Set($DLStateFloat,1)>>
<<Set($DLStateFloat,2)>>
<<@回答簽約室惡棍>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->What the hell do you want? ($DLStateFloat)
->Answer what? ($DLStateFloat2)
    <<Set($DLStateFloat,-1)>>
    <<Set($DLStateFloat2,-1)>>
    Rory Chen: I'll give you one more chance. Play dumb again and I'll shoot you in the face.
    <<#GoTo(@回答簽約室惡棍)>>
->We really are cooperating with the police.
    Rory Chen: That so? Which department of the police? Spill.
    Rory Chen: Or else I'll shoot your little buddy.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐舉雙手轉頭返回)>>;<<Play(陳祥儒,MBU_陳祥儒_靠牆舉槍看主返回)>>
    Rory Chen: And don't let me catch you lying.
    Rory Chen: Three seconds. The clock's ticking.;<<Play(陳祥儒,MBU_陳祥儒_靠牆舉槍看主)>>
    <<#Simple(3)>>
    ->SWAT.
    ->Wanpei PD.
        Rory Chen: Do you think I'm stupid?
        Rory Chen: Your buddy dies now.
    ->OWL.
        Rory Chen: OWL...?
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->We are paid by a private eye to ask questions.
    Rory Chen: Private eye?
    Rory Chen: ...Name?;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐舉雙手轉頭返回)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 簽約駱思敏(成功)3
body: //章隆生把臉摀住往前靠著桌子，主角低頭 <> Thought: She's already gone.;<> //通訊恢復的音效聲 23(c): You had every chance to get the intel out of her! 23(c): Lawrence, your impulse ruined everything.;<> Lawrence Chang: ... 23(c): If we fail to rescue the kids because of this... Lawrence Chang: It's all my fault.;<> 23(c): ... 23(c): Yeah, it's your fault. Does that change anything? 23(c): Don't you ever cut comms in the middle of a mission.;<> 23(c): Don't. You. Ever. Dare.;<> 23(c): Are we clear? Lawrence Chang: Yes, ma'am.;<>;<> 23(c): ...I'll be offline for a while, trying to salvage what little we found out. Thought: I've never seen her so angry. Nin Situ(c): You have done well, Lawrence and Jason. Nin Situ(c): Getting everything we need from the first candidate is too much to ask for.;<> Lawrence Chang: ... Nin Situ(c): I understand why you did what you did, Lawrence. Nin Situ(c): But 23 is right. We could have learned more from Simone Lo.;<> Lawrence Chang: Sorry for not being the perfect agent that you are. Nin Situ(c): No, this has nothing to do with being an agent. Nin Situ(c): We should not judge other people's life choices. Nin Situ(c): You are not her. You have no idea what her family is like. Lawrence Chang: Her family? If she signed the contract, there wouldn't be a family!;<> Lawrence Chang: She's abandoning her daughter, Nin! Nin Situ(c): ... Nin Situ(c): You don't know what the consequences of your words are. Nin Situ(c): Whatever consequence, you can't take it for her. Lawrence Chang: ... Nin Situ(c): I know how you feel, Lawrence. Trust me, I do. Nin Situ(c): As an orphan myself, I know a lonely childhood sucks. Lawrence Chang: ...;<> Nin Situ(c): Still, we are not Simone Lo. She has her own difficulties. Nin Situ(c): We have no right to judge her. Nin Situ(c): Do you understand? Lawrence Chang: ...I do. Nin Situ(c): Good. //if隆生扮黑臉(玩家白臉) <<#If($PlayGoodBadCop=1)>> Lawrence Chang: ... Lawrence Chang: Nin... Lawrence Chang: I said very bad things to her, when I was playing the bad cop. Nin Situ(c): ... Nin Situ(c): ...I know. Nin Situ(c): You were quoting the exact same words those Tendril people said to you years ago. Lawrence Chang: I... Lawrence Chang: I'm no better than them, aren't I? Lawrence Chang: They said that to make me cooperate. Lawrence Chang: And I said it to her for the same purpose. Nin Situ(c): Yes. You did to her essentially what they did to you. I won't lie to just make you feel better. Nin Situ(c): But keep in mind that you're doing it for a higher purpose. Nin Situ(c): You did a terrible, cruel thing. But I'll tell you this... Nin Situ(c): No, you're nothing like them. Lawrence Chang: ... Lawrence Chang: Hmm. <<#EndIf>> Nin Situ(c): Again, Lawrence. Nin Situ(c): Don't cut comms ever again. Lawrence Chang: ...I know it's unprofessional. Nin Situ(c): 23 lost a friend because of something like what you did. She's still in trauma. Lawrence Chang: ...I didn't know that. Nin Situ(c): You're not supposed to know. Lawrence Chang: ... 23(c): I'm back.;<> 23(c): What were you talking about? Nin Situ(c): Nothing. 23(c): Really? Lawrence Chang: Hey, 23.;<> 23(c): Huh? Lawrence Chang: Really sorry for cutting comms back there.;<> 23(c): ... 23(c): Nah, I'll let it slide. 23(c): Be a good boy next time. Lawrence Chang: I'm not your puppy!;<> 23(c): Haha! Nin Situ(c): What do we know about the next candidate, 23?;<> <> <<#GoTo(@第一簽約人直接是任誠磊)>> <<#End>>

title: 簽約陳昇文2
body: Shawn Chen: About the contract, I have done my homework. Shawn Chen: I'm applying for free insurance, because I don't have insurance coverage myself. Shawn Chen: Otherwise it's all good. Ready to sign when you are! Thought: He's very well prepared. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Very well prepared. Good. Shawn Chen: Ha! Thank you. //if黑臉 <<#If($PlayGoodBadCop=-1)>> 23(c): Jason, you're supposed to be the bad cop. <<#EndIf>> ->Did I ask you to speak? Shawn Chen: *Cough*;<>;<> Shawn Chen: Sorry... //if白臉 <<#If($PlayGoodBadCop=1)>> 23(c): Jason, you're supposed to be the good cop. Put up your nice guy face. <<#EndIf>> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Now, Mr. Chen. I trust you have heard about human trafficking activities in Taihe District? Shawn Chen: Human trafficking? Gosh! Never heard of that. Thought: He's not surprised at all? Lawrence Chang: Huh. We are cooperating with the police to investigate these cases.;<> Lawrence Chang: Because we work with Taihe residents all the time and do due diligence, the police came to us asking for help. Lawrence Chang: For that reason, we have some extra questions before signing the contract.;<> Shawn Chen: Ah, sure thing! I'm happy to answer any question you have.;<> Lawrence Chang: This concerns your son...;<> Shawn Chen: My son...;<> Shawn Chen: ... Shawn Chen: My son is not something I feel comfortable talking about. Sorry.;<>;<>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->We ask, you answer. Or else you will find out what's really uncomfortable. Shawn Chen: Ah, sure! <<#GoTo(@跳過陳昇文以為主角自己而失蹤)>> ->And why's that? Shawn Chen: Because... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: I thought you already know, dear officers? <<@跳過陳昇文以為主角自己而失蹤>> Shawn Chen: My son has been missing for a while.;<> Shawn Chen: It's all written in my application, remember? //if黑臉 <<#If($PlayGoodBadCop=-1)>> Thought: He looks genuinely at loss...;<> Thought: But that could be just fine acting. He sold his own son. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Missing, or sold? Did you sell him? Shawn Chen: What!?;<>;<> ->And you can say you're the king of the world in your application. No one's gonna stop you. Shawn Chen: Are you suggesting that I'm lying?;<>;<> <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: How can you say that!? Shawn Chen: You're talking about my one and only son! My only family after my ex left! Shawn Chen: I'm sorry but I want you to take it back.;<> Thought: The reaction looks genuine... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Aren't you overreacting? Admit it already. Shawn Chen: My son means the world to me!;<> Shawn Chen: And you accuse me of selling him? Shawn Chen: I don't know how much you care about your family, sir. Shawn Chen: I am very much offended by what you just said.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah, sure, calm down. Shawn Chen: *Panting* ->What you need is an acting class, man. Shawn Chen: How dare you— ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I've seen worse. You Shithole crawlers do anything to make a few quick bucks. Shawn Chen: What did you say!?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I said you sold your son. We both know. Admit it already. ->You heard me. <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: You...!?;<>;<> Shawn Chen: This is discrimination against the poor! <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I don't know about the poor, but I've figured you out. Shawn Chen: ... ->Being poor makes selling your child right or what? Shawn Chen: I didn't! <<#EndSimple>> <> ->Okay, I take it back. Shawn Chen: Good...;<> Shawn Chen: I'm sorry. I lost control for a moment. 23(c): Jason, you're supposed to be the bad cop. Keep pressing him.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: ... Shawn Chen: Phew...;<> Shawn Chen: Enough distraction. Let's talk about what we're here to do today, shall we? Thought: He's swaying a little bit...;<> Shawn Chen: Today we're to sign a contract.;<> Shawn Chen: Let's get to the signing part.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Not so fast. Shawn Chen: What's that supposed to mean? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Sorry, Mr. Chen.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Before signing your contract, we must make sure you're note involved in human trafficking. Shawn Chen: How can I prove that?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Don't ask me. How can you prove yourself, eh? ->Well, get the hell out of my contract room if you can't. <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: Hey, wait...;<> Shawn Chen: Think, officers.;<> Shawn Chen: Why would I report to the police if I did sell my own child? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->To establish yourself as the victim, of course. Shawn Chen: In your logic, I'm guilty no matter what!;<> ->Because you know the police won't take Shithole cases seriously. Shawn Chen: They do pretend we don't exist, alright...;<> Shawn Chen: But in your logic, I'm guilty no matter what... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: How can I make you trust me?;<> Shawn Chen: Maybe check my bank account? For incoming money? Shawn Chen: Why would I want this contributor job if I sold my child? I'd have money!;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Maybe you owe someone even more. Shawn Chen: ... Shawn Chen: I'm speechless. Shawn Chen: This is a waste of breath if you've already determined I'm guilty. ->That is irrelevant. Shawn Chen: That is very much relevant! ->Okay, you have a point. <<#EndSimple>> Thought: ...He has me totally convinced. <<#EndIf>> //if白臉 <<#If($PlayGoodBadCop=1)>> Lawrence Chang: So you say. And you can say you're the king of the world in your application. No one's gonna stop you.;<>;<> Shawn Chen: Are you suggesting that I'm lying?;<> Shawn Chen: How can you say that!?;<>;<> Shawn Chen: You're talking about my one and only son! My only family after my ex left! Shawn Chen: I'm sorry but I want you to take it back.;<> Thought: The reaction looks genuine... Lawrence Chang: Aren't you overreacting? Admit it already.;<> Shawn Chen: My son means the world to me!;<> Shawn Chen: And you accuse me of selling him? Shawn Chen: I don't know how much you care about your family, sir.;<>;<> Shawn Chen: I am very much offended by what you just said. Lawrence Chang: What you need is an acting class, man.;<> Shawn Chen: How dare you— Lawrence Chang: You Shithole crawlers do anything for a couple of quick bucks.;<>;<> Shawn Chen: What did you say!? Lawrence Chang: I said you sold your son. We both know. Admit it already.;<> Shawn Chen: You...!?;<> Shawn Chen: This is discrimination against the poor! Lawrence Chang: I don't know about the poor, but I've figured you out. Shawn Chen: Hey, wait...;<> Shawn Chen: Think, officers. Shawn Chen: Why would I report to the police if I did sell my own child?;<> Lawrence Chang: To establish yourself as the victim, of course.;<> Shawn Chen: In your logic, I'm guilty no matter what!;<> Shawn Chen: How can I make you trust me? Shawn Chen: Maybe check my bank account? For incoming money? Shawn Chen: Why would I want this contributor job if I sold my child? I'd have money!;<> Lawrence Chang: Um...;<> Thought: Lawrence is stuck. Thought: Actually, he has me totally convinced, too...;<> <<#EndIf>> Thought: We are not getting anything out of this guy. 23(c): Wait, I have an idea.;<> //if主角面談進來的 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1||$ConvinceFailed>-2)>> 23(c): I just went over your consultation transcription with him, Jason.;<> <<#EndIf>> 23(c): Let's drop the good cop, bad cop play. 23(c): Now tell him you're buyers from Vision. 23(c): All those questions are part of a test. You want to see how dependable he is.;<> Frances Cheng(c): I don't think he will buy it. 23(c): Give it a try. Could work.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: ... Lawrence Chang: Good, Mr. Chen. Now we can talk. Lawrence Chang: You have passed our test.;<> Shawn Chen: Test? Shawn Chen: What are you talking about? Lawrence Chang: We represent the buyer in our deal.;<> Shawn Chen: Buyer? What deal? 23(c): Last Tuesday, 5 PM, Pier 7. 23(c): Tell him that. <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Last Thursday, 6 PM, Pier 8. Shawn Chen: I have no idea what you're talking about.;<> Frances Cheng(c): That was wrong, J!;<> Lawrence Chang: Last Tuesday, 5 PM, Pier 7. Remember?;<> Shawn Chen: What...!?;<> ->Last Tuesday, 5 PM, Pier 7. Shawn Chen: That was...!? Lawrence Chang: That was when you met with us for the deal. ->Last Tuesday, 5 AM, Pier 9. ->Last Wednesday, 9 PM, Pier 10. Shawn Chen: I have no idea what you're talking about.;<> Frances Cheng(c): That was wrong, J!;<> Lawrence Chang: Last Tuesday, 5 PM, Pier 7. Remember?;<> Shawn Chen: What...!?;<> <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Trust us now? We can cut the acting.;<> Shawn Chen: ... Shawn Chen: You are the buyer alright!;<> Shawn Chen: For a second I thought you were the cops, haha... Shawn Chen: How was it?;<> Shawn Chen: How's my acting? Airtight, eh? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You did well. Shawn Chen: Haha.;<> ->Full of holes. Shawn Chen: Was it that bad?;<> <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: Wait. Shawn Chen: You set this whole thing up just to test me? 23(c): Ask him about the gang who took his son. <> Lawrence Chang: We need to verify a few things with you.;<> Shawn Chen: No problem! Haha... Lawrence Chang: Do you remember which gang was there to pick up the cargo?;<> Shawn Chen: Hmm...;<> Shawn Chen: There's nothing to remember. I didn't know who they are to begin with. <<#Simple(8)>> ->You have passed the test. No need for acting anymore. ->Think again. Shawn Chen: I mean, I really don't know. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: They didn't say, and who am I to ask questions?;<> Thought: I think he's being honest... Shawn Chen: That's it? Done with questions? 23(c): Ask him if there's anyone that looked special, anyone standing out among the gangsters. <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Did you notice anyone out of the ordinary? ->There should be someone that looked special, unlike the others. <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: ...There was this one man alright.;<> Shawn Chen: Classy dressing, way better than the rest of them. Shawn Chen: He kinda had this get-lost-before-I-kill-you vibe. Shawn Chen: The guy didn't talk much, but the rest of them gangsters treated him like their boss or something.;<> 23(c): I could be a mercenary officer sent by Chameleon.;<> Frances Cheng(c): Or Chameleon himself? 23(c): He wouldn't risk it. 23(c): Lawrence, Jason, ask him about this man.;<> <> Lawrence Chang: Did you talk to him? Shawn Chen: No, he just sat there and watched. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Like, supervising? Shawn Chen: I guess you could say that. ->Are you sure? Shawn Chen: Of course. I'm not blind. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: Hey, why are you asking this? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Don't ask, just answer. Shawn Chen: Ah, OK... ->This is part of an investigation. Shawn Chen: Investigation? About what? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->There's a snitch among us. Shawn Chen: What!? Shawn Chen: What does that mean to me? Will the police come after me?;<> Lawrence Chang: Calm down.;<> Lawrence Chang: You're safe. Shawn Chen: Oh, good to know...;<>;<> ->We ask questions. You answer. Shawn Chen: Y-yessir. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: Tell us whatever you can remember about that man. Shawn Chen: What I can remember, like...;<> Shawn Chen: He's driving a pretty special vehicle? 23(c): Ask about the van. It could be the key. <> Lawrence Chang: What kind of vehicle?;<> Shawn Chen: I don't know. Never seen that make or model.;<> Shawn Chen: It looked new, but there's no hovering system, I think...;//軍用車要能在任何地方行駛，不會特別裝懸凝 Shawn Chen: It was sort of a van, but with huge tires, the kind you see on semi-trailer trucks. 23(c): Jackpot! This could be very helpful.;<> 23(c): This is good enough. Wrap it up. 23(c): Remind him, don't tell anyone about this conversation, not even to other Vision employees. 23(c): I'll see what I can find about this vehicle. <> Lawrence Chang: Thank you for your cooperation, Mr. Chen. That's it for today. Lawrence Chang: Please keep our conversation today secret. Don't tell anyone, including other Vision employees. Shawn Chen: May I know why? Lawrence Chang: You may not. Just do as I say.;<> Shawn Chen: Yessir.;<> Shawn Chen: Um, about my contributor contract...? Lawrence Chang: Ah, that. Please sign it.;<> Shawn Chen: Phew... Shawn Chen: I thought the contract was a part of your test, too.;<>;<>;<> //播放他簽名動畫 Shawn Chen: ... Shawn Chen: ... <<#Simple(8)>> ->You may go now. ->Can I help you with anything else? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: About my son... Thought: Asking about the child's wellbeing, huh? Shawn Chen: I'm wondering, um... Shawn Chen: Can we maybe extend his lease, by any means?;<> Lawrence Chang: Extend lease? <<#Simple(8)>> ->You mean, you want the child back later rather than sooner? ->What do you mean? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: I mean, if by any chance you want to keep him longer and don't mind paying more, be my guest. Shawn Chen: As you can see, I need money. Or else I wouldn't bother with this contributor job, haha...;<> Thought: Piece of shit...;<> Lawrence Chang: ...How much money do you need, exactly?;<> Shawn Chen: Not sure. How much does an average house in central Wanpei cost?;<> Lawrence Chang: Don't tell me you want to...;<> Thought: Definitely not the typical poor people mindset... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Man, that's a fucked up way of financing. Shawn Chen: Haha... ->A house? Why? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: Haha, it's a personal issue...;<> Shawn Chen: You know I had a divorce, right? Shawn Chen: Guess why my ex divorced me?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because you don't own a home in central Wanpei? Shawn Chen: Yep.;<> Lawrence Chang: She said that? The reason for your divorce?? Shawn Chen: Not in exactly the same words, but the principle is the same. ->Relationship went sour or something? Shawn Chen: No. ->Because she found out you're willing to sell your own son for money? Shawn Chen: ...;<> Shawn Chen: Hahaha, please...;<> Shawn Chen: ...;<> Shawn Chen: Of course not. Even if I decided to sell him back then, I wouldn't let her know.;<> <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: She thought I was poor, so did her family. Shawn Chen: ... Shawn Chen: And frankly, I was poor. Even I had to admit myself.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Did she complain about you being poor? Shawn Chen: She didn't have to. It's written all over her face. ->She should have known your financial condition before the wedding. Shawn Chen: She did know. Shawn Chen: She said she didn't care, and I believed her. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: I just have to show her...;<> Thought: This is taking long enough. Gotta wrap it up. Shawn Chen: That I'm not a useless piece of shit. She'll come back to me, begging...;<> Shawn Chen: ...;//陳昇文低頭 <<#Simple(99999)>> ->We will not extend the lease. Now, please leave. ->We can't authorize a lease extension. Now, please leave. <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: ...Just because I can't afford fancy stuff? Shawn Chen: What happened to the wedding vow? For better or worth? For richer or poorer?;<> Thought: He's clenching his teeth...;<> Shawn Chen: I said I was looking for a damn job. I can't do shit jobs! Shawn Chen: No drugs, no gambling, nothing illegal, nothing with health risks. I'm a man with class, dammit!;<> Shawn Chen: Ungrateful, money-grasping, gold-digging cunt. Shawn Chen: Left me because I wasn't the riches man!;<> Lawrence Chang: There could be other reasons? <<#Simple(8)>> ->That is irrelevant. Our session is concluded. Please leave, Mr. Chen. Shawn Chen: ... ->Yeah, money can't be the only reason. Thought: Why the hell am I encouraging him...? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: What else could it be?;<> Thought: Do we just keep this show going? Lawrence Chang: From what I've heard so far, I don't think money is the issue.;<>;<> Shawn Chen: ...Huh? Lawrence Chang: There are things that you may not have noticed yet.;<> Lawrence Chang: You didn't notice because you've been too focused on the money issue.;<> Shawn Chen: Oh, no, no such thing. Shawn Chen: You've got it all wrong, mister.;<> Shawn Chen: These women, they talk about personality and stuff. At the end of the day, all they care about is power. Shawn Chen: Money is power. If you have money, you have everything. Plain and simple.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I think I know why your ex wanted a divorce now. Shawn Chen: What...?;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Me, too. Shawn Chen: You people...!?;<>;<> ->Some of them are like that, yeah. Shawn Chen: Not some. Most of them. Shawn Chen: The overwhelming majority of them are like that. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yeah, good point. // ->I don't agree. Shawn Chen: Whatever. You're too young. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: ...;<> Shawn Chen: Enough about my ex. Anyway, I need money. A lot of money. Shawn Chen: Can we please extend the lease? I don't mind at all, if that's your concern.;<> <> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No. We can't. Shawn Chen: ... Shawn Chen: Okay. ->You're one fucked up sonovabitch, man. Shawn Chen: What...!?;<> 23(c): Jason, don't. Lawrence Chang: You're one fucked up sonovabitch, he said!;<> 23(c): Not you too, Lawrence! <> Lawrence Chang: Selling your own son to buy a fucking house! That's a new low for the human race. Shawn Chen: You were buying from me!;<> Lawrence Chang: Right! Now I guess we need a seller screening program.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You should be ashamed of yourself. ->Get out of my contract room before I kick you out. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: ...;<> Shawn Chen: Okay, good...;<> Shawn Chen: I'm a sonovabitch, a piece of shit. Shawn Chen: You fuckers on your high horses have no idea what real life is like in the Shithole.;<> Shawn Chen: Easy enough to judge, huh?;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->There's a limit to empathy. Shawn Chen: Huh?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You can't keep living in denial. ->Take a look at yourself. Stop blaming everyone else. Shawn Chen: I'm not— <<#Simple(6)>> ->Yes, the world is not fair, but that doesn't mean you're faultless.;<> Shawn Chen: ... <<#Simple(6)>> ->Think about it when you can't sleep at night. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: Enough! Shawn Chen: I've had enough of your bullshit! ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Shawn Chen: I'm getting the hell out of here. <<#End>>

title: 簽約陳昇文3
body:
Lawrence Chang: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內)>>
Lawrence Chang: Fuck me...;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐低頭)>>
Lawrence Chang: I can't believe we're sharing the planet with people like him.
23(c): You shouldn't have encouraged him.
Lawrence Chang: Sorry. Couldn't help myself...;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐低頭返回)>>
23(c): Nah, forget about it. I'd do the same if I were there.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內返回)>>
//if最後狂罵
<<#If($DLStateFloat=0)>>
    23(c): And you, Jason. Well said at the end of it.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐看外)>>
    23(c): I couldn't have phrased it any better.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Well, it just came out.

    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_簽約側坐看外返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回)>>
<<#EndIf>>
